LanguageData.FCP_Infestation_Burrow.description: 活跃的鼹鼠洞穴。如果不管它，它会产生更多的鼹鼠，并在整个区域散布更多的洞穴。啮齿动物会积极保卫自己的领地。
LanguageData.FCP_Infestation_Burrow.label: 鼹鼠洞穴
LanguageData.FCP_Egg_Beachlurk_Fertilized.description: 受精的海滩潜伏卵。如果一切顺利，它应该会孵化成海滩潜伏者。它可以生吃，但煮熟后效果更好。
LanguageData.FCP_Egg_Beachlurk_Fertilized.label: 海滩潜伏蛋（已受精）
LanguageData.FCP_Egg_Beachlurk_Unfertilized.descripti: 未受精的海滩潜伏卵。这些浅沙色的蛋是在沿海巢穴中发现的。它可以生吃，但煮熟后效果更好。
LanguageData.FCP_Egg_Beachlurk_Unfertilized.label: 海滩潜伏者蛋（未受精）
LanguageData.FCP_Egg_Deathclaw_Fertilized.description: A fertilized deathclaw egg. If properly incubated, this will hatch into one of the most 危险 predators in the wasteland. These eggs are extremely rare and highly sought after by beast masters and scientists alike. It can be eaten, but most would consider that a terrible waste.
LanguageData.FCP_Egg_Deathclaw_Fertilized.label: 死亡爪蛋（已受精）
LanguageData.FCP_Egg_Deathclaw_Unfertilized.descripti: 未受精的死亡爪蛋。这些巨大的鸡蛋非常稀有且珍贵。虽然它们可以食用，但大多数人会认为这是浪费如此宝贵的商品。
LanguageData.FCP_Egg_Deathclaw_Unfertilized.label: 死亡爪蛋（未受精）
LanguageData.FCP_Egg_Fire_Gecko_Fertilized.descriptio: 受精的火壁虎卵。如果一切顺利，它应该会孵化成火守宫。这些蛋非常温暖，必须保持在高温下才能孵化。它可以生吃，但煮熟后效果更好。
LanguageData.FCP_Egg_Fire_Gecko_Fertilized.label: 火壁虎蛋（已受精）
LanguageData.FCP_Egg_Fire_Gecko_Unfertilized.descript: 未受精的火壁虎卵。这些鸡蛋摸起来很温暖。它可以生吃，但煮熟后效果更好。
LanguageData.FCP_Egg_Fire_Gecko_Unfertilized.label: 火壁虎蛋（未受精）
LanguageData.FCP_Egg_Gecko_Fertilized.description: 受精壁虎卵。如果一切顺利，它应该会孵化成壁虎。它可以生吃，但煮熟后效果更好。
LanguageData.FCP_Egg_Gecko_Fertilized.label: 壁虎蛋（受精）
LanguageData.FCP_Egg_Gecko_Unfertilized.description: 未受精的壁虎蛋。它可以生吃，但煮熟后效果更好。
LanguageData.FCP_Egg_Gecko_Unfertilized.label: 壁虎蛋（未受精）
LanguageData.FCP_Egg_Golden_Gecko_Fertilized.descript: A fertilized g老旧en gecko egg. If all goes well, it should hatch into a g老旧en gecko. It can be eaten raw, but it's much better cooked.
LanguageData.FCP_Egg_Golden_Gecko_Fertilized.label: G老旧en Gecko Egg (fert.)
LanguageData.FCP_Egg_Golden_Gecko_Unfertilized.descri: An unfertilized g老旧en gecko egg. These eggs have a distinctive shimmer. It can be eaten raw, but it's much better cooked.
LanguageData.FCP_Egg_Golden_Gecko_Unfertilized.label: G老旧en Gecko Egg (unfert.)
LanguageData.FCP_Egg_Green_Gecko_Fertilized.descripti: 受精的绿色壁虎卵。如果一切顺利，它应该会孵化成一只绿色的壁虎。它可以生吃，但煮熟后效果更好。
LanguageData.FCP_Egg_Green_Gecko_Fertilized.label: 绿色壁虎蛋（已受精）
LanguageData.FCP_Egg_Green_Gecko_Unfertilized.descrip: 未受精的绿色壁虎蛋。它可以生吃，但煮熟后效果更好。
LanguageData.FCP_Egg_Green_Gecko_Unfertilized.label: 绿色壁虎蛋（未受精）
LanguageData.FCP_Egg_Lakelurk_Fertilized.description: 受精的湖潜卵。如果一切顺利的话，它应该会孵化成湖水中的生物。它可以生吃，但煮熟后效果更好。
LanguageData.FCP_Egg_Lakelurk_Fertilized.label: 湖沼蛋（已受精）
LanguageData.FCP_Egg_Lakelurk_Unfertilized.descriptio: 未受精的湖潜卵。这些来自受辐射湖泊顶级捕食者的大而黑的蛋非常稀有且有价值。它可以生吃，但煮熟后效果更好。
LanguageData.FCP_Egg_Lakelurk_Unfertilized.label: 湖沼蛋（未受精）
LanguageData.FCP_Egg_Mirelurk_Fertilized.description: 受精的泥沼鱼卵。如果一切顺利，它应该会孵化成泥沼。它可以生吃，但煮熟后效果更好。
LanguageData.FCP_Egg_Mirelurk_Fertilized.label: 米尔鲁克蛋（已受精）
LanguageData.FCP_Egg_Mirelurk_Unfertilized.descriptio: 未受精的泥沼鱼卵。这些又大又粘的鸡蛋在一些荒地定居点是美味佳肴。它可以生吃，但煮熟后效果更好。
LanguageData.FCP_Egg_Mirelurk_Unfertilized.label: 米尔卢克蛋（未受精）
LanguageData.FCP_Egg_Rad_Chicken_Fertilized.descripti: 受精的辐射鸡蛋。如果一切顺利，它应该会孵化成小鸡。它可以生吃，但煮熟后效果更好。
LanguageData.FCP_Egg_Rad_Chicken_Fertilized.label: 拉德鸡蛋（受精）
LanguageData.FCP_Egg_Rad_Chicken_Unfertilized.descrip: 未受精的辐射鸡蛋。它可以生吃，但煮熟后吃效果更好。
LanguageData.FCP_Egg_Rad_Chicken_Unfertilized.label: Rad 鸡蛋（未受精）
LanguageData.FCP_Egg_Rad_Raven_Fertilized.description: 受精的辐射乌鸦蛋。如果一切顺利，它应该会孵化成小鸡。它可以生吃，但煮熟后效果更好。
LanguageData.FCP_Egg_Rad_Raven_Fertilized.label: 辐射乌鸦蛋 (fer.)
LanguageData.FCP_Egg_Rad_Raven_Unfertilized.descripti: 一颗未受精的辐射乌鸦蛋。它可以生吃，但煮熟后吃效果更好。
LanguageData.FCP_Egg_Rad_Raven_Unfertilized.label: 辐射乌鸦蛋（未受精）
LanguageData.FCP_Egg_Radgull_Fertilized.description: 受精的雷鸥蛋。如果一切顺利，它应该会孵化成小鸡。它可以生吃，但煮熟后效果更好。
LanguageData.FCP_Egg_Radgull_Fertilized.label: 拉德鸥蛋（受精）
LanguageData.FCP_Egg_Radgull_Unfertilized.description: 未受精的拉德鸥蛋。它可以生吃，但煮熟后吃效果更好。
LanguageData.FCP_Egg_Radgull_Unfertilized.label: 拉德鸥蛋（未受精）
LanguageData.FCP_Egg_Radroach_Fertilized.description: 受精的蟑螂卵。如果孵化，它将孵化成蟑螂若虫。这些害虫繁殖迅速，它们的卵在受感染地区很常见。
LanguageData.FCP_Egg_Radroach_Fertilized.label: 蟑螂卵（受精）
LanguageData.FCP_Egg_Radroach_Unfertilized.descriptio: An unfertilized radroach egg. S商场 and unappetizing, but edible in a pinch. Radroaches lay eggs in large clusters.
LanguageData.FCP_Egg_Radroach_Unfertilized.label: 蟑螂卵（未受精）
LanguageData.FCP_Egg_Riverlurk_Fertilized.description: 受精的河潜卵。如果一切顺利，它应该会孵化成河潜鱼。它可以生吃，但煮熟后效果更好。
LanguageData.FCP_Egg_Riverlurk_Fertilized.label: 潜河蛋（已受精）
LanguageData.FCP_Egg_Riverlurk_Unfertilized.descripti: 未受精的河潜卵。这些绿色的蛋是在淡水巢中发现的。它可以生吃，但煮熟后效果更好。
LanguageData.FCP_Egg_Riverlurk_Unfertilized.label: 潜河卵（未受精）
LanguageData.FCP_Egg_Thrasher_Fertilized.description: A fertilized thrasher egg. If properly incubated, it will hatch into an aggressive rad turkey. While they can be domesticated, their temperamental nature makes them 危险 livestock.
LanguageData.FCP_Egg_Thrasher_Fertilized.label: 鸫鸟蛋（受精）
LanguageData.FCP_Egg_Thrasher_Unfertilized.descriptio: 未受精的鸫蛋。比战前的火鸡蛋更大、更美味，尽管有些人觉得轻微辐照的味道令人反感。尽管如此，它仍然是荒地中宝贵的食物来源。
LanguageData.FCP_Egg_Thrasher_Unfertilized.label: 鸫鸟蛋（未受精）
LanguageData.FCP_Meat_Beast.description: 荒野野兽的生肉。与家养动物相比，其肉质更坚韧，味道稍有不同，带有辐射和恶劣环境的痕迹。适合食用，但可能含有微量的荒地污染物。
LanguageData.FCP_Meat_Beast.label: 兽肉
LanguageData.FCP_Meat_Bug.description: 从变异的荒地昆虫中收获的生肉。果肉具有不寻常的质地和微苦的味道。虽然营养丰富，但昆虫饮食中的辐照材料中含有高浓度的奇怪化合物，使其具有一定的毒性。
LanguageData.FCP_Meat_Bug.label: 虫肉
LanguageData.FCP_Meat_Crab.description: 从荒地甲壳类动物中收获的坚硬的白肉。肉质致密且味道鲜美，但它往往会吸收来自该生物水生栖息地的水中污染物。尽管辐射轻微，但仍深受沿海幸存者的欢迎。
LanguageData.FCP_Meat_Crab.label: 泥沼肉
LanguageData.FCP_Meat_Herptile.description: 来自荒地爬行动物和两栖动物的瘦肉。肉质粘稠，但可食用，略带野味。这些生物特别擅长在其组织中储存辐射，从而使肉比大多数生物更容易受到污染。
LanguageData.FCP_Meat_Herptile.label: 爬虫肉
LanguageData.FCP_Meat_Plumb_Bug.description: 来自喂养良好的突变昆虫的异常肥美多汁的肉。这种组织充满了营养化合物，使其比典型的虫肉更美味。荒地幸存者很珍惜这些削减，尽管它们仍然带有来自该生物的辐射饮食的中等毒性。
LanguageData.FCP_Meat_Plumb_Bug.label: 铅垂虫肉
LanguageData.FCP_Meat_Plumb_Poultry.description: 来自喂养良好的荒地鸟类的肉质异常丰富。胸肉厚实多汁，品质可与战前家禽相媲美。尽管有辐射，这仍然被认为是荒地中的优质食物来源。
LanguageData.FCP_Meat_Plumb_Poultry.label: 铅辐照家禽
LanguageData.FCP_Meat_Poultry.description: 来自变异荒地鸟类的肉。肉可被识别为家禽，但由于辐射暴露而颜色变差并具有异常气味。虽然仍然可以食用并且质地熟悉，但它显然不是来自战前的鸡肉。
LanguageData.FCP_Meat_Poultry.label: 受辐射的家禽
LanguageData.FCP_Meat_Prime_Beast.description: 来自健康、喂养良好的荒地野兽的优质肉。考虑到其起源，肌肉组织具有良好的大理石花纹，而且出奇地干净。像这样的优质切割是罕见的，并且价格昂贵。仍然受到来自荒地环境的最小辐射暴露。
LanguageData.FCP_Meat_Prime_Beast.label: 优质兽肉
LanguageData.FCP_Meat_Prime_Herptile.description: 来自发育良好的标本的优质爬行动物肉。肌肉组织坚实且发育良好，比典型的爬行动物肉具有更好的质地和风味。即使是最优质的样本，也会因它们的荒地饮食而携带中等程度的辐射。
LanguageData.FCP_Meat_Prime_Herptile.label: 优质爬行动物肉
LanguageData.FCP_Meat_Prime_Varmint.description: Surprisingly good meat from a healthy wasteland varmint. The animal was well-fed and its meat is tender despite the s商场 size. These cuts are prized by survivors who know how to prepare them properly. Still moderately radioactive.
LanguageData.FCP_Meat_Prime_Varmint.label: 优质恶鼠肉
LanguageData.FCP_Meat_Succulent_Fish.description: 来自荒地鱼的肉质细腻、味道鲜美。其质地细嫩湿润，是幸存者中不可多得的美味佳肴。虽然营养丰富，但它仍可能携带来自辐照水中的微量污染物。
LanguageData.FCP_Meat_Succulent_Fish.label: 多汁的鱼肉
LanguageData.FCP_Meat_Varmint.description: S商场 game meat from wasteland rodents and other vermin. The portions are meager and the meat quality is poor, but beggars can't be choosers. These scavengers accumulate significant radiation from eating contaminated food scraps.
LanguageData.FCP_Meat_Varmint.label: 恶鼠肉
LanguageData.FCP_Animal_Yao_Guai.description: 一种可怕的变异熊，比它战前的祖先体型更大、更具攻击性。 “妖怪”这个名字来源于中文，意为“恶魔”，这些顶级掠食者名副其实。它们厚厚的皮毛提供了极好的保护，而它们的凶猛使它们成为荒地中最危险的生物之一。
LanguageData.FCP_Animal_Yao_Guai.label: 妖怪
LanguageData.FCP_Animal_Yao_Guai.tools.0.label: 左爪
LanguageData.FCP_Animal_Yao_Guai.tools.1.label: 右爪
LanguageData.FCP_Animal_Yao_Guai.tools.3.label: 头
LanguageData.FCP_Animal_Rad_Chicken.description: A common sight on wasteland farms and ranches as well as s商场 towns. It can grow fast and be farmed for eggs, meat and the occasional feather.
LanguageData.FCP_Animal_Rad_Chicken.label: 拉德鸡
LanguageData.FCP_Animal_Rad_Chicken.tools.0.label: 爪子
LanguageData.FCP_Animal_Rad_Chicken.tools.1.label: 喙
LanguageData.FCP_Animal_Rad_Chicken.tools.2.label: 头
LanguageData.FCP_Animal_Rad_Raven.description: A clever and opportunistic scavenger that has thrived in the wasteland. These large black birds are known for their intelligence and adaptability, often following travelers and raiders to feed on carrion. While they prefer scavenging, rad ravens are capable predators that hunt s商场 creatures. They can be trained to a useful degree, making them valuable companions for wasteland scouts.
LanguageData.FCP_Animal_Rad_Raven.label: 拉德·乌鸦
LanguageData.FCP_Animal_Rad_Raven.tools.0.label: 爪子
LanguageData.FCP_Animal_Rad_Raven.tools.1.label: 喙
LanguageData.FCP_Animal_Rad_Raven.tools.2.label: 头
LanguageData.FCP_Animal_Radgull.description: 一种顽强的海鸟，非常适应荒地受辐射的海岸。这些群居鸟类成群结队地迁徙，它们独特的叫声在受污染的海岸线上回响。拉德鸥对辐射具有很强的抵抗力，几乎可以吃任何东西，这使它们成为成功的清道夫。它们常见于沿海地区，在那里潜水寻找变异的鱼并捡拾碎片。具有中等智力的它们可以接受各种任务的训练。
LanguageData.FCP_Animal_Radgull.label: 拉德鸥
LanguageData.FCP_Animal_Radgull.tools.0.label: 爪子
LanguageData.FCP_Animal_Radgull.tools.1.label: 喙
LanguageData.FCP_Animal_Radgull.tools.2.label: 头
LanguageData.FCP_Animal_Thrasher.description: A mutated, aggressive turkey that survived the nuclear holocaust. These irradiated birds are larger and more 危险 than their pre-war ancestors, often attacking on sight. They've adapted well to the wasteland, thriving in various environments.
LanguageData.FCP_Animal_Thrasher.label: 思拉舍
LanguageData.FCP_Animal_Thrasher.tools.0.label: 爪子
LanguageData.FCP_Animal_Thrasher.tools.1.label: 喙
LanguageData.FCP_Animal_Thrasher.tools.2.label: 头
LanguageData.FCP_Animal_Bighorner.description: 大角羊的变异后代。这些生命力顽强的生物通常在荒地中被用作驮畜和牲畜，因其力量、肉和皮而受到重视。雄性拥有令人印象深刻的弯曲角，比雌性更大、更具攻击性。
LanguageData.FCP_Animal_Bighorner.label: 比格霍纳
LanguageData.FCP_Animal_Glowing_Radstag.description: A heavily irradiated radstag that emits an eerie green glow. Prolonged exposure to radiation has made these creatures larger and more aggressive than normal radstags. Their meat is highly radioactive and 危险 to consume, but their glowing presence makes them easy to spot at night.
LanguageData.FCP_Animal_Glowing_Radstag.label: 发光的辐射雄鹿
LanguageData.FCP_Animal_Glowing_Radstag.tools.0.label: 左蹄
LanguageData.FCP_Animal_Glowing_Radstag.tools.1.label: 右蹄
LanguageData.FCP_Animal_Glowing_Radstag.tools.2.label: 左头
LanguageData.FCP_Animal_Pale_Radstag.description: A rare albino variant of the radstag, with pale white fur and lighter build. These creatures are less affected by radiation than their common cousins, making them slightly weaker but also less 危险 to handle. They're prized for their distinctive appearance.
LanguageData.FCP_Animal_Pale_Radstag.label: 苍白的辐射雄鹿
LanguageData.FCP_Animal_Pale_Radstag.tools.0.label: 左蹄
LanguageData.FCP_Animal_Pale_Radstag.tools.1.label: 右蹄
LanguageData.FCP_Animal_Pale_Radstag.tools.2.label: 左头
LanguageData.FCP_Animal_Radstag.description: A mutated two-headed deer, one of the more common creatures in the wasteland. Despite their unusual appearance, radstags are generally docile herbivores that travel in s商场 herds. Their meat is edible and their hides make decent leather, though both carry traces of radiation.
LanguageData.FCP_Animal_Radstag.label: 拉德斯塔
LanguageData.FCP_Animal_Radstag.tools.0.label: 左蹄
LanguageData.FCP_Animal_Radstag.tools.1.label: 右蹄
LanguageData.FCP_Animal_Radstag.tools.2.label: 左头
LanguageData.FCP_Animal_Alpha_Deathclaw.description: The largest and most 危险 deathclaws rise to dominance through combat. Alpha males are massive predators with thicker hide and more powerful attacks, while matriarch females are the mothers of the pack and lay eggs to continue the species. Both are incredibly deadly and nearly impossible to tame.
LanguageData.FCP_Animal_Alpha_Deathclaw.label: 阿尔法死亡爪
LanguageData.FCP_Animal_Alpha_Deathclaw.tools.0.label: 左爪
LanguageData.FCP_Animal_Alpha_Deathclaw.tools.1.label: 右爪
LanguageData.FCP_Animal_Alpha_Deathclaw.tools.3.label: 头
LanguageData.FCP_Animal_Deathclaw.description: A large, agile, and powerful creature with deadly claws, the deathclaw is the most fearsome predator of the wasteland. Created through pre-war genetic engineering, these apex predators are incredibly 危险 and nearly impossible to tame. They hunt in packs and can tear through armor with ease.
LanguageData.FCP_Animal_Deathclaw.label: 死亡爪
LanguageData.FCP_Animal_German_Shepherd_Dog.descripti: Some dogs are wild, plaguing the wastes and killing livestock, but tame versions are necessary for many struggling wastelanders. There are also rare cases of domestic breeds that act as companions towards their bipedal counterparts. Humans and 超级变种人 are the only species known to truly tame and domesticate these canines.
LanguageData.FCP_Animal_German_Shepherd_Dog.label: 德国牧羊犬
LanguageData.FCP_Animal_Minutemen_Guard_Dog.descripti: Some dogs are wild, plaguing the wastes and killing livestock, but tame versions are necessary for many struggling wastelanders. There are also rare cases of domestic breeds such as German Shepherds act as companions towards their bipedal counterparts. The Minutemen around the 废墟s of Boston in particular have used them as working and guard dogs for their military.
LanguageData.FCP_Animal_Minutemen_Guard_Dog.label: 民兵护卫犬
LanguageData.FCP_Animal_Nightstalker.description: 夜行者是战前基因实验的可怕产物，是一种融合了郊狼和响尾蛇 DNA 的杂交生物。这些隐秘的掠食者在黑暗的掩护下成群结队地捕猎，用毒液咬住猎物。它们拥有犬科动物的群体智慧，加上蛇的隐秘性和毒液，使它们成为荒原上最可怕的掠食者之一。它们独特的轮廓和发光的眼睛会让遇到它们的人感到恐惧。
LanguageData.FCP_Animal_Nightstalker.label: 夜行者
LanguageData.FCP_Animal_Nightstalker.tools.0.label: 有毒的叮咬
LanguageData.FCP_Animal_Nightstalker.tools.1.label: 爪子
LanguageData.FCP_Animal_Nightstalker.tools.2.label: 头
LanguageData.FCP_Animal_Vicious_Dog.description: 恶毒的狗是一种几乎没有毛、并且明显部分被尸化的荒地犬类。这些饥饿、受辐射的杂种狗是荒野中无情的幸存者，它们会攻击任何会移动的东西。
LanguageData.FCP_Animal_Vicious_Dog.label: 恶狗
LanguageData.FCP_Animal_Vicious_Guard_Dog.description: 恶毒的狗是一种几乎没有毛、并且明显部分被尸化的荒地犬类。这些饥饿、受辐射的杂种狗是荒野中无情的幸存者，它们会攻击任何会移动的东西。有些狗已经被驯化，甚至被赋予保护主人及其所有财产的责任，这种动物会尽其所能。
LanguageData.FCP_Animal_Vicious_Guard_Dog.label: 恶狗
LanguageData.FCP_Animal_Fire_Gecko.description: A 危险 mutated gecko with the ability to breathe fire. These fearsome creatures have developed specialized glands that allow them to expel flames at their enemies. Fire geckos are highly aggressive and territorial, making them extremely 危险 to encounter in the wild. Their unique physiology makes them resistant to heat and fire, and their hide is particularly valuable. They are typically found in hot, desert regions.
LanguageData.FCP_Animal_Fire_Gecko.label: 火壁虎
LanguageData.FCP_Animal_Fire_Gecko.tools.1.label: 头
LanguageData.FCP_Animal_Gecko.description: A large mutated gecko that has grown to the size of a s商场 dog. These reptilian creatures are common throughout the wasteland, particularly in desert regions. While not particularly aggressive, they will defend themselves when threatened. Their meat is edible and their hide makes decent leather.
LanguageData.FCP_Animal_Gecko.label: 壁虎
LanguageData.FCP_Animal_Golden_Gecko.description: A large mutated gecko with distinctive g老旧en scales that shimmer in the light. These creatures are prized for their valuable hide, which can be crafted into high-quality leather goods. G老旧en geckos are stronger and more aggressive than their common cousins, and their bite can deliver a mild poison. They are found in desert regions and rocky terrain.
LanguageData.FCP_Animal_Golden_Gecko.label: G老旧en Gecko
LanguageData.FCP_Animal_Golden_Gecko.tools.1.label: 头
LanguageData.FCP_Animal_Green_Gecko.description: A large mutated gecko with green scales and a more aggressive temperament than common geckos. Green geckos are tougher and more 危险, with a stronger bite that can deliver toxins. They are commonly found in rocky areas and caves throughout the wasteland. Their hide is valuable and their meat is edible, though it must be properly prepared.
LanguageData.FCP_Animal_Green_Gecko.label: 绿壁虎
LanguageData.FCP_Animal_Green_Gecko.tools.1.label: 头
LanguageData.FCP_Animal_Giant_Mantis.description: 一只严重变异的螳螂因长期暴露在辐射下而长得巨大。这些侵略性的掠食者以闪电般的快速反应和毁灭性的猛禽前腿捕猎，能够在一次攻击中刺穿猎物。它们的几丁质外骨骼提供了相当大的保护，并且众所周知，它们在受到威胁时具有很强的领地意识和高度攻击性。主要出现在干旱地区，它们伏击毫无戒心的受害者。
LanguageData.FCP_Animal_Giant_Mantis.label: 巨螳螂
LanguageData.FCP_Animal_Giant_Mantis.tools.0.label: 左前肢
LanguageData.FCP_Animal_Giant_Mantis.tools.1.label: 右前肢
LanguageData.FCP_Animal_Giant_Mantis.tools.2.label: 下颌骨
LanguageData.FCP_Animal_Giant_Mantis.tools.3.label: 头
LanguageData.FCP_Animal_Glowing_Radroach.description: 一种吸收了大量辐射的蟑螂，使其发出怪异的绿光。这些突变体比它们的普通表亲更具攻击性，并且它们的身体充满了放射性同位素。接触它们可能很危险，但它们发光的甲壳对某些商人来说有一定的价值。
LanguageData.FCP_Animal_Glowing_Radroach.label: 发光的蟑螂
LanguageData.FCP_Animal_Radroach.description: 一只变异的蟑螂，因辐射暴露而长得巨大。蟑螂是适应性很强的害虫，几乎可以在任何环境中生存。虽然个体较弱，但它们繁殖迅速，可以聚集到粗心的受害者身上。它们的肉可以食用，但不是特别开胃。
LanguageData.FCP_Animal_Radroach.label: 蟑螂
LanguageData.FCP_Animal_Radroach.tools.0.label: 下颌骨
LanguageData.FCP_Animal_Radroach.tools.1.label: 头
LanguageData.FCP_Animal_Beachlurk.description: 泥沼鱼的沿海变种，已适应沙滩环境。这些生物的外壳颜色较浅，与沙滩融为一体，在它们从海浪中出现之前很难被发现。海滩潜伏者比居住在沼泽的近亲更具攻击性，经常将自己埋在沙子里伏击猎物。
LanguageData.FCP_Animal_Beachlurk.label: 海滩潜伏者
LanguageData.FCP_Animal_Beachlurk.tools.0.label: 左爪
LanguageData.FCP_Animal_Beachlurk.tools.1.label: 右爪
LanguageData.FCP_Animal_Beachlurk.tools.2.label: 头
LanguageData.FCP_Animal_Lakelurk.description: 一种高度进化的突变生物，结合了鳄龟和墨鱼的特征。与泥沼鱼不同，湖沼鱼更具攻击性，并且拥有可以迷惑猎物的声波攻击。它们的外壳极其坚韧，而且比其他潜伏变种更加聪明。它们主要生活在大湖泊和深水中，是荒地的顶级水生掠食者。
LanguageData.FCP_Animal_Lakelurk.label: 莱克勒克
LanguageData.FCP_Animal_Lakelurk.tools.0.label: 爪子
LanguageData.FCP_Animal_Lakelurk.tools.1.label: 咬
LanguageData.FCP_Animal_Lakelurk.tools.2.label: 头
LanguageData.FCP_Animal_Lakelurk_King.description: A massive male lakelurk that has grown to enormous proportions. Lakelurk kings are territorial apex predators that claim entire lakes as their domain. They possess enhanced sonic abilities that can stun multiple targets, incredibly thick shells, and devastating strength. These solitary giants are always male and highly aggressive, attacking anything that enters their territory. Extremely rare and highly 危险.
LanguageData.FCP_Animal_Lakelurk_King.label: 湖潜王
LanguageData.FCP_Animal_Lakelurk_King.tools.0.label: 左爪
LanguageData.FCP_Animal_Lakelurk_King.tools.1.label: 右爪
LanguageData.FCP_Animal_Lakelurk_King.tools.2.label: 咬
LanguageData.FCP_Animal_Lakelurk_King.tools.3.label: 头
LanguageData.FCP_Animal_Mirelurk.description: 一种严重变异的甲壳类动物，已经长到了巨大的尺寸。这些生物拥有厚厚的几丁质外壳，可以针对大多数武器提供出色的保护。泥沼鱼具有领地意识和攻击性，用它们强大的爪子来保卫它们的筑巢地。它们通常出现在水域和沿海地区附近，以惊人的凶猛程度寻找食物并保卫自己的领地。
LanguageData.FCP_Animal_Mirelurk.label: 米雷勒克
LanguageData.FCP_Animal_Mirelurk.tools.0.label: 左爪
LanguageData.FCP_Animal_Mirelurk.tools.1.label: 右爪
LanguageData.FCP_Animal_Mirelurk.tools.2.label: 头
LanguageData.FCP_Animal_Mirelurk_King.description: 尽管有它的名字，泥沼王实际上根本不是泥沼。这种高大的双足掠食者被认为是一种严重变异的杰克逊变色龙，与甲壳类动物的泥沼鱼没有直接关系。这个名字来源于它们倾向于居住在泥沼聚居地附近的地区。国王用两条腿站立，拥有强大的爪子手，并能发出毁灭性的声音尖叫。它们裸露的肉体和缺乏保护壳的优点是非凡的敏捷性和致命的近距离攻击。
LanguageData.FCP_Animal_Mirelurk_King.label: 米尔鲁克王
LanguageData.FCP_Animal_Mirelurk_King.tools.0.label: 左爪
LanguageData.FCP_Animal_Mirelurk_King.tools.1.label: 右爪
LanguageData.FCP_Animal_Mirelurk_King.tools.2.label: 咬
LanguageData.FCP_Animal_Mirelurk_King.tools.3.label: 头
LanguageData.FCP_Animal_Riverlurk.description: A freshwater variant of the mirelurk found primarily in rivers and streams. These creatures have darker shells that help them blend into murky river bottoms. Riverlurks are somewhat more docile than their coastal relatives but still 危险 when threatened. They prefer fast-moving water and are excellent swimmers.
LanguageData.FCP_Animal_Riverlurk.label: 潜河
LanguageData.FCP_Animal_Riverlurk.tools.0.label: 左爪
LanguageData.FCP_Animal_Riverlurk.tools.1.label: 右爪
LanguageData.FCP_Animal_Riverlurk.tools.2.label: 头
LanguageData.FCP_Animal_Molerat.description: A grotesque mutated rodent that has grown to an unusually large size. These hairless, aggressive creatures are common throughout the wasteland, particularly in underground areas and 废墟s. They travel in packs and will attack anything that enters their territory. Their meat is barely edible and their hide is nearly worthless, but they breed rapidly and can overwhelm unprepared travelers.
LanguageData.FCP_Animal_Molerat.label: 鼹鼠
LanguageData.FCP_Animal_Molerat.tools.0.label: 爪子
LanguageData.FCP_Animal_Molerat.tools.2.label: 头
LanguageData.FCP_Animal_Rad_Rabbit.description: 适应放射性荒地的变异兔子。这些生物比它们战前的祖先要大得多，并且对辐射具有惊人的抵抗力。它们很容易受惊，但繁殖速度很快，这使得它们在荒原上随处可见。尽管它们受到辐射，但它们的肉食用相对安全，而且很容易驯化。
LanguageData.FCP_Animal_Rad_Rabbit.label: 拉德兔
LanguageData.FCP_Animal_Rad_Rabbit.tools.0.label: 爪子
LanguageData.FCP_Animal_Rad_Rabbit.tools.2.label: 头
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_AK_112_AR.description: AK-112 是一款坚固的战前突击步枪，装有 5.56 毫米子弹。它以其可靠性和易于维护而闻名，仍然是荒地幸存者的热门选择。
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_AK_112_AR.label: AK-112 突击步枪
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_AK_112_AR.tools.0.label: 库存
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_AK_112_AR.tools.1.label: 桶
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Assault_Carbine.description: 紧凑型全自动卡宾枪，可发射 5 毫米子弹。它专为军事用途而设计，具有高射速和出色的操控性，使其成为近距离战斗和压制火力的理想选择。
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Assault_Carbine.label: 突击卡宾枪
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Assault_Carbine.tools.0.label: 库存
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Assault_Carbine.tools.1.label: 桶
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Chinese_Assault_Rifle.descriptio: 一款坚固耐用、威力强大的中国突击步枪。它在中美战争期间被中国军队广泛使用，以其高伤害输出和在恶劣条件下的可靠性而闻名。
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Chinese_Assault_Rifle.label: 中国突击步枪
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_G11_AR.description: G11 是一款革命性的德国突击步枪，使用无壳弹药。其高射速和先进的设计使其成为废土上稀有但备受追捧的武器。
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_G11_AR.label: G11突击步枪
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_G11_AR.tools.0.label: 库存
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_G11_AR.tools.1.label: 桶
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Marksman_Carbine.description: 轻型半自动卡宾枪，可发射 5.56 毫米子弹。它专为精确和中距离交战而设计，因其准确性和可靠性而受到 NCR 射手的青睐。
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Marksman_Carbine.label: 射手卡宾枪
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Marksman_Carbine.tools.0.label: 库存
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Marksman_Carbine.tools.1.label: 桶
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Power_Armor_Assault_Rifle.descri: 突击步枪是一款战前的全自动步枪，装有 5.56 毫米子弹。其独特的弹鼓和坚固的结构使其成为荒地中持续射击的最爱，尽管与需要使用动力装甲的更现代的设计相比，它笨重且笨重。
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Power_Armor_Assault_Rifle.label: 动力装甲突击步枪
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_R91_Rifle.description: R-91 是一款战前全自动突击步枪，可装 5.56 毫米子弹。它是第一次世界大战前美国武装部队的标准步枪，以其可靠性和战斗多功能性而闻名。
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_R91_Rifle.label: R-91 突击步枪
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_R91_Rifle.tools.0.label: 库存
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_R91_Rifle.tools.1.label: 桶
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_ChunkyBoi.description: 一种巨大的定制重型武器，专为最大火力和恐吓而设计。
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_ChunkyBoi.label: 矮矮胖胖的博伊
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_ChunkyBoi.tools.0.label: 桶
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Light_Machine_Gun.description: 轻机枪是一种战前全自动支援武器，可发射 5.56 毫米子弹。它专为持续压制火力而设计，具有大容量弹匣和高射速，非常适合在公开战斗中压制敌人并提供掩护火力。
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Light_Machine_Gun.label: 轻机枪
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Light_Machine_Gun.tools.0.label: 库存
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Light_Machine_Gun.tools.1.label: 桶
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Minigun.description: 转轮机枪是一种多管旋转机枪，能够以极高的射速发射 5 毫米子弹。其毁灭性的火力使其成为重型支援角色的最爱，但其重量和体积限制了机动性。
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Minigun.label: 转机枪
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Minigun.tools.0.label: 桶
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_MkI_Avenger.description: 早期型号的复仇者重型武器，以其高射速和可靠性而闻名。
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_MkI_Avenger.label: MkI 复仇者
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_MkI_Avenger.tools.0.label: 桶
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Vindicator.description: 一种强大的重型武器，专为最大程度的压制和区域封锁而设计。
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Vindicator.label: 辩护者
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Vindicator.tools.0.label: 桶
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Pipe_BoltAction.description: 一种用废弃管道和废金属组装而成的简陋自制栓动步枪。虽然与普通步枪相比，它的射击速度较慢且威力较小，但它易于生产和维护，使其成为废土幸存者中的常见武器。
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Pipe_BoltAction.label: 管螺栓作用
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Pipe_BoltAction.tools.0.label: 库存
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Pipe_BoltAction.tools.1.label: 桶
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Pipe_Pistol.description: 一把用废弃的管道和废金属拼凑而成的自制手枪。虽然不可靠且缺乏制动力，但它易于制作和维护，使其成为最绝望的废土人中常见的随身武器。
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Pipe_Pistol.label: 管手枪
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Pipe_Pistol.tools.0.label: 紧握
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Pipe_Pistol.tools.1.label: 桶
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Pipe_Revolver.description: 一把用废弃管道和废金属组装而成的简陋自制左轮手枪。虽然不可靠且装弹速度慢，但它易于制作和维护，使其成为废土幸存者中常见的随身武器。
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Pipe_Revolver.label: 管左轮手枪
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Pipe_Revolver.tools.0.label: 紧握
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Pipe_Revolver.tools.1.label: 桶
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Pipe_Rifle.description: 一把用废弃管道和废金属组装而成的简陋自制半自动步枪。虽然不可靠且不准确，但它因其简单的结构而提供了不错的火力，使其在袭击者和定居者中很受欢迎。
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Pipe_Rifle.label: 管步枪
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Pipe_Rifle.tools.0.label: 库存
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Pipe_Rifle.tools.1.label: 桶
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Pipe_Shotgun.description: 一把用管道和废料拼凑而成的简陋单发霰弹枪。它在近距离具有毁灭性，但装弹速度缓慢，是那些需要在预算内阻止力量的绝望废土人的最爱。
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Pipe_Shotgun.label: 管霰弹枪
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Pipe_Shotgun.tools.0.label: 库存
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Pipe_Shotgun.tools.1.label: 桶
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Pipe_Sniper.description: 一种简陋的长管步枪，配有临时瞄准镜。虽然它的精确度远不及真正的狙击步枪，但它为买不起更好装备的废土人提供了更大的射程。
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Pipe_Sniper.label: 管式狙击步枪
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Pipe_Sniper.tools.0.label: 库存
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Pipe_Sniper.tools.1.label: 桶
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_10mm_Pistol.description: 10毫米手枪是一种半自动手枪，可发射10毫米子弹。它因其可靠性和制动力而受到青睐，是荒地居民和战前安全部队中常见的景象。
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_10mm_Pistol.label: 10毫米手枪
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_10mm_Pistol.tools.0.label: 紧握
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_10mm_Pistol.tools.1.label: 桶
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_10mm_Pistol_MkII.description: 经典 10 毫米手枪的改进版本，具有增强的可靠性和准确性。受到废土精英和战前安全部队的青睐。
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_10mm_Pistol_MkII.label: 10 毫米 MkII 手枪
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_10mm_Pistol_MkII.tools.0.label: 紧握
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_10mm_Pistol_MkII.tools.1.label: 桶
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_127mm_Pistol.description: 12.7 毫米手枪是一款重型半自动手枪，可发射 12.7 毫米子弹。其巨大的制动力和装甲穿透力使其成为荒地执法者的最爱，但其重量和后​​坐力需要强大的手感。
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_127mm_Pistol.label: 12.7毫米手枪
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_127mm_Pistol.tools.0.label: 紧握
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_127mm_Pistol.tools.1.label: 桶
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_14mm_Pistol.description: 14 毫米手枪是一款威力强大的手枪，可发射 14 毫米子弹，具有卓越的制动力和穿透力。在荒地中十分稀有且备受追捧。
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_14mm_Pistol.label: 14毫米手枪
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_14mm_Pistol.tools.0.label: 紧握
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_14mm_Pistol.tools.1.label: 桶
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_223_Pistol.description: .223 手枪是一款独特的手枪，可容纳 0.223 步枪子弹，具有较高的速度和精度。其设计深受射手和收藏家的青睐。
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_223_Pistol.label: .223手枪
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_223_Pistol.tools.0.label: 紧握
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_223_Pistol.tools.1.label: 桶
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_556_Pistol.description: 5.56 毫米手枪是一种罕见的高威力手枪，可发射 5.56 毫米步枪弹。与典型手枪相比，其独特的设计提供了卓越的穿透力和射程，但后坐力和磨损增加。
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_556_Pistol.label: 5.56毫米手枪
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_556_Pistol.tools.0.label: 紧握
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_556_Pistol.tools.1.label: 桶
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_9mm_Pistol.description: 9 毫米手枪是一款轻型半自动手枪，可装载 9 毫米子弹。它的低后坐力和充足的弹药使其成为平民和废土人的热门选择，尽管它缺乏大口径的制动力。
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_9mm_Pistol.label: 9毫米手枪
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_9mm_Pistol.tools.0.label: 紧握
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_9mm_Pistol.tools.1.label: 桶
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Chinese_Pistol.description: 中国手枪是一款紧凑型半自动手枪，可装 9 毫米子弹。它是在第一次世界大战之前制造的，重量轻且易于隐藏，但其制动力低且可靠性值得怀疑。
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Chinese_Pistol.label: 中国手枪
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Chinese_Pistol.tools.0.label: 紧握
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Chinese_Pistol.tools.1.label: 桶
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Colt_6520_Pistol.description: Colt 6520 是一款经典的战前手枪，以其可靠性和易用性而闻名。它的弹匣容量为 0.45 发，仍然是荒地幸存者的最爱。
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Colt_6520_Pistol.label: 柯尔特 6520
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Colt_6520_Pistol.tools.0.label: 紧握
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Colt_6520_Pistol.tools.1.label: 桶
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Deagle.description: Deagle 是一款大型半自动手枪，可容纳 0.50 AE 子弹。其令人生畏的体型和火力使其成为废土上地位和力量的象征。
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Deagle.label: 迪格尔
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Deagle.tools.0.label: 紧握
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Deagle.tools.1.label: 桶
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Silenced_10mm_Pistol.description: 消音 10 毫米手枪是一款半自动手枪，可发射 10 毫米子弹，并配有一体式消音器。它受到刺客和秘密特工的青睐，提供了制止能力和隐秘性的平衡。
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Silenced_10mm_Pistol.label: 10毫米消音手枪
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Silenced_22_Pistol.description: 消音 0.22 手枪是一款轻型半自动手枪，可容纳 0.22 LR 子弹，并配有一体式消音器。它极其安静且易于控制，适合秘密行动，但缺乏制动力。
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Silenced_22_Pistol.label: 消音 .22 手枪
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Silenced_22_Pistol.tools.0.label: 紧握
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Silenced_22_Pistol.tools.1.label: 桶
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_357_Revolver.description: .357 左轮手枪是一款经典的六发手枪，可容纳 0.357 Magnum 子弹。它以其可靠性和制动力而闻名，是荒原上执法者和枪手最喜欢的武器。
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_357_Revolver.label: .357左轮手枪
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_357_Revolver.tools.0.label: 紧握
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_357_Revolver.tools.1.label: 桶
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_44Magnum_Revolver.description: .44 Magnum 左轮手枪是一款威力强大的六发手枪，可容纳 0.44 Magnum 子弹。它以其高阻止力和令人生畏的存在而闻名，是荒地猎人和执法者的珍贵武器。
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_44Magnum_Revolver.label: .44 马格南左轮手枪
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_44Magnum_Revolver.tools.0.label: 紧握
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_44Magnum_Revolver.tools.1.label: 桶
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Hunting_Revolver.description: 狩猎左轮手枪是一款大型单动左轮手枪，可容纳 0.45-70 发政府子弹。它专为狩猎大型动物而设计，具有毁灭性的力量和准确性，但其沉重的框架和缓慢的射速使其在近距离战斗中显得笨拙。
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Hunting_Revolver.label: 狩猎左轮手枪
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Hunting_Revolver.tools.0.label: 紧握
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Hunting_Revolver.tools.1.label: 桶
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_223_Rangemaster.description: .223 Rangemaster 是一款可容纳 0.223 发子弹的精密栓动步枪。它因其高精度和射程而受到神枪手的青睐，是荒地狩猎和远程交战的可靠选择。
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_223_Rangemaster.label: .223 Rangemaster 步枪
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_223_Rangemaster.tools.0.label: 库存
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_223_Rangemaster.tools.1.label: 桶
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_223_Rifle.description: .223 步枪是一款轻型半自动步枪，可容纳 0.223 发子弹。它以其精确度和低后坐力而闻名，是荒地狩猎和战斗的热门选择。
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_223_Rifle.label: .223步枪
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_223_Rifle.tools.0.label: 库存
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_223_Rifle.tools.1.label: 桶
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_32_Hunting_Rifle.description: .32 狩猎步枪是一款战前的栓动步枪，可装 0.32 口径子弹。它以其简单和可靠而闻名，是废土人中的常见武器，为中距离交战提供了不错的精度和制动力。
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_32_Hunting_Rifle.label: .32 狩猎步枪
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_32_Hunting_Rifle.tools.0.label: 库存
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_32_Hunting_Rifle.tools.1.label: 桶
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_BB_Gun.description: 简单的气动 BB 枪。虽然不致命，但它会蜇人，通常用于训练或害虫防治。不推荐用于激烈的战斗。
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_BB_Gun.label: BB枪
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_BB_Gun.tools.0.label: 库存
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_BB_Gun.tools.1.label: 桶
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Brush_Gun.description: Brush Gun 是一款杠杆式步枪，可容纳 0.45-70 发政府子弹。它因其高制动力和可靠性而受到青睐，是荒地猎人和射手击落大型猎物和装甲目标的热门选择。
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Brush_Gun.label: 刷枪
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Brush_Gun.tools.0.label: 库存
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Brush_Gun.tools.1.label: 桶
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Combat_Rifle_Standard.descriptio: 标准战斗步枪是一款坚固耐用的半自动步枪，可装 0.45 ACP 子弹。它可靠且用途广泛，因其火力、准确性和耐用性的平衡而深受废土人的喜爱。
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Combat_Rifle_Standard.label: 战斗步枪
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Cowboy_Repeater.description: 经典的杠杆式步枪，可容纳 0.357 发子弹。牛仔中继器重量轻、可靠，因其快速循环和令人尊敬的准确性而受到射手和流浪者的青睐。
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Cowboy_Repeater.label: 牛仔中继器
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Cowboy_Repeater.tools.0.label: 库存
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Cowboy_Repeater.tools.1.label: 桶
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Trail_Carbine.description: Trail 卡宾枪是一款杠杆式步枪，可装 0.44 Magnum 子弹。它以其坚固性和准确性而闻名，因其快速的骑行和可靠的制动力而深受荒地侦察兵和猎人的喜爱。
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Trail_Carbine.label: 追踪卡宾枪
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Trail_Carbine.tools.0.label: 库存
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Trail_Carbine.tools.1.label: 桶
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Varmint_Rifle.description: The Varmint Rifle is a lightweight, bolt-action rifle chambered for .223 rounds. Originally designed for pest control and s商场 game hunting, it is accurate and easy to handle, but lacks the stopping power of larger rifles.
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Varmint_Rifle.label: 鼠鼠步枪
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Varmint_Rifle.tools.0.label: 库存
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Varmint_Rifle.tools.1.label: 桶
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Caravan_Shotgun.description: 一种双管断动霰弹枪，深受商队守卫和商人的欢迎。其简单的设计使其易于维修和维护，但它的缺点是装弹速度慢且射程有限
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Caravan_Shotgun.label: 商队霰弹枪
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Caravan_Shotgun.tools.0.label: 库存
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Caravan_Shotgun.tools.1.label: 桶
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Citykiller.description: Citykiller 是一款大容量半自动霰弹枪，专为城市作战而设计。它的快速火力和大弹匣使其在近距离内具有毁灭性。
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Citykiller.label: 城市杀手霰弹枪
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Citykiller.tools.0.label: 库存
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Citykiller.tools.1.label: 桶
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Combat_Shotgun.description: 战斗霰弹枪是一款半自动弹匣供弹霰弹枪，可发射 12 号子弹。它专为军事和执法部门设计，在近距离战斗中具有高射速和可靠性，使其成为荒地执法者的最爱。
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Combat_Shotgun.label: 战斗霰弹枪
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Combat_Shotgun.tools.0.label: 库存
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Combat_Shotgun.tools.1.label: 桶
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Combat_Shotgun_MkII.description: 战斗霰弹枪的高级版本，具有改进的可靠性、准确性和射速。受到精英军事单位和荒地执法者的青睐。
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Combat_Shotgun_MkII.label: MkII 战斗霰弹枪
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Hunting_Shotgun.description: 专为狩猎游戏设计的泵动式霰弹枪。因其坚固的结构、高容量以及在最恶劣的荒地条件下的可靠性而受到青睐。
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Hunting_Shotgun.label: 狩猎霰弹枪
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Hunting_Shotgun.tools.0.label: 库存
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Hunting_Shotgun.tools.1.label: 桶
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Jackhammer.description: 手提钻是一款全自动、鼓式供弹霰弹枪，能够在几秒钟内发射大量炮弹。它十分稀有且价值极高，是任何交火中不可忽视的力量。
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Jackhammer.label: 手提钻霰弹枪
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Jackhammer.tools.0.label: 库存
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Jackhammer.tools.1.label: 桶
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_LeverAction_Shotgun.description: 一款经典的杠杆式霰弹枪，因其快速循环和可靠性而备受赞誉。它在牧场主和执法人员中很受欢迎，具有强大的制动力，并且可以在熟练的手中快速发射。
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_LeverAction_Shotgun.label: 杠杆式霰弹枪
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Riot_Shotgun.description: 这款战前的半自动战斗霰弹枪专为执法和军事用途而设计。其高射速和大弹匣使其在近距离战斗中具有毁灭性。
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Riot_Shotgun.label: 防暴霰弹枪
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Riot_Shotgun.tools.0.label: 库存
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Riot_Shotgun.tools.1.label: 桶
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_SawnOff_Shotgun.description: 一种双管霰弹枪，其枪管和枪托被缩短，更容易隐藏。近距离极其致命，但极其不准确且射程短。
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_SawnOff_Shotgun.label: 锯短霰弹枪
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_SawnOff_Shotgun.tools.0.label: 库存
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_SawnOff_Shotgun.tools.1.label: 桶
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Single_Shotgun.description: 一种简单的单管断动霰弹枪。生产成本低且易于维护，但装弹速度慢且一次只能发射一发。
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Single_Shotgun.label: 单霰弹枪
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Single_Shotgun.tools.0.label: 库存
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Single_Shotgun.tools.1.label: 桶
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_10mm_SMG.description: 10 毫米 SMG 是一款紧凑型全自动冲锋枪，可发射 10 毫米子弹。它以其高射速和易用性而闻名，非常适合近距离战斗，但会牺牲远距离的准确性。
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_10mm_SMG.label: 10毫米冲锋枪
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_10mm_SMG.tools.0.label: 库存
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_10mm_SMG.tools.1.label: 桶
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_127mm_SMG.description: 12.7 毫米 SMG 是一款威力强大的全自动冲锋枪，可发射 12.7 毫米子弹。它以其高伤害输出和快速射速而闻名，在近距离战斗中具有毁灭性，但后坐力大且射程精度有限。
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_127mm_SMG.label: 12.7毫米冲锋枪
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_127mm_SMG.tools.0.label: 库存
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_127mm_SMG.tools.1.label: 桶
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_9mm_SMG.description: 9 毫米冲锋枪是一款轻型全自动冲锋枪，可发射 9 毫米子弹。它以其易用性和高射速而闻名，在近距离战斗中非常有效，但在远距离作战时缺乏制动力和准确性。
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_9mm_SMG.label: 9毫米冲锋枪
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_9mm_SMG.tools.0.label: 库存
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_9mm_SMG.tools.1.label: 桶
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_HK_10_SMG.description: HK-10 是一款现代化的紧凑型冲锋枪，以其可靠性和高射速而闻名。受到安全部队和城市作战精锐部队的青睐。
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_HK_10_SMG.label: HK-10冲锋枪
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_HK_10_SMG.tools.0.label: 库存
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_HK_10_SMG.tools.1.label: 桶
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Silenced_22_SMG.description: 一种轻型全自动冲锋枪，可容纳 0.22 LR 子弹，并配有一体式消音器。极其安静且易于控制，但与大口径相比缺乏制动力。
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Silenced_22_SMG.label: .22 消音冲锋枪
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Silenced_22_SMG.tools.0.label: 库存
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Silenced_22_SMG.tools.1.label: 桶
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_DKS_501_Sniper_Rifle.description: DKS-501 是一款战前栓动式狙击步枪，可装 0.308 发子弹。它以其卓越的准确性和制动力而闻名，是远程交战射手的最爱。
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_DKS_501_Sniper_Rifle.label: DKS-501 狙击步枪
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Scoped_Hunting_Rifle.description: 带瞄准镜狩猎步枪是一款战前栓动步枪，可容纳 0.308 发子弹。它配备了瞄准镜，在中远距离交战中具有高度精确性和有效性，使其成为猎人和射手的可靠选择。
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Scoped_Hunting_Rifle.label: 带瞄准镜的猎枪
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_AbileneKidLEBBGun.description: 专为阿比林小子打造的稀有限量版 BB 枪。它以其独特的标记和卓越的工艺而著称，因其怀旧价值和精准度而受到收藏家和射手的青睐。
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_AbileneKidLEBBGun.label: Abilene Kid LE BB 枪
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_AllAmerican.description: All-American 是一款传奇射手卡宾枪，以其卓越的准确性、可靠性和定制工艺而闻名。它具有独特的设计和先进的光学器件，擅长在远距离提供精确、快速的连发，使其成为精英射手和收藏家的珍贵武器。
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_AllAmerican.label: 全美国
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_BigBoomer.description: Big Boomer 是一款传奇的定制双管霰弹枪，以其强大的制动力和坚固的工艺而闻名。其加固的框架和超大的枪管可产生毁灭性的近距离爆炸，使其成为荒地猎人和收藏家的珍贵武器。
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_BigBoomer.label: 大婴儿潮一代
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Deliverer.description: Deliverer 是一款传奇的紧凑型 10 毫米手枪，以其卓越的射速和轻巧的设计而闻名。它受到秘密特工的青睐，具有定制的抑制器和符合人体工程学的握把，使其成为秘密行动和近距离快速交战的理想选择。
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Deliverer.label: 送货员
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_DinnerBell.description: Dining Bell 是一款独特的定制泵动霰弹枪，因其卓越的可靠性和制动力而备受赞誉。它具有抛光的表面和精确的修改，可提供紧密的射击分组和更高的伤害，使其成为寻求性能和风格的经验丰富的荒地猎人的首选武器。
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_DinnerBell.label: 晚餐铃声
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_GobiCampaignScoutRifle.descripti: 戈壁战役侦察步枪是一款传奇的定制狙击步枪，授予精英射手。它以其轻质框架、卓越的精度和快速操控而闻名，是荒原上最令人垂涎​​的远程武器之一。其独特的工艺和传奇的历史使其成为神枪手和收藏家的珍贵藏品。
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_GobiCampaignScoutRifle.label: 戈壁战役侦察步枪
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_HHToolsNailgun.description: 坚固耐用的工业射钉枪，适用于建筑和战斗。其重型框架和快速射击能力使其成为一种强大的简易武器，受到那些重视多功能性和原始制动力的人的青睐。
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_HHToolsNailgun.label: HH 工具钉枪
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_LincolnsRepeater.description: 林肯连发步枪是一款传奇的杠杆式步枪，以其卓越的工艺和历史意义而闻名。凭借其抛光的表面和无与伦比的准确性，这把武器成为自由和精确的象征，使其成为收藏家和射手的珍贵财产。
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_LincolnsRepeater.label: 林肯的复读机
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Lucky.description: Lucky 是一款传奇的 .357 Magnum 左轮手枪，以其完美的镀铬表面和华丽的雕刻而闻名。这种武器以其完美的动作和不可思议的准确性而闻名，深受那些相信技巧和运气的枪手的青睐。
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Lucky.label: 幸运的
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Maria.description: Maria 是一把雕刻精美的 9 毫米手枪，饰有精致的银色镶嵌物和珍珠握把。它曾经属于一位传奇人物，它将优雅与致命的精准融为一体，使其成为那些重视风格和性能的人的珍贵武器。
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Maria.label: 玛丽亚
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_MkIIAvenger.description: MkII Avenger 是一款传奇的 5 毫米口径迷你机枪，以其毁灭性的射速和坚固的可靠性而闻名。其先进的设计和定制改装使其成为废土上最强大的自动武器之一，深受精英特工的青睐。
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_MkIIAvenger.label: MkII 复仇者
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_OlPainless.description: Ol' Painless 是一款传奇狩猎步枪，以其卓越的精度和轻巧的设计而闻名。这款步枪代代相传，将可靠性与精确性结合在一起，使其成为任何射手的珍贵武器。
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_OlPainless.label: 老无痛
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Ratslayer.description: Ratslayer is a unique, silenced varmint rifle equipped with a custom scope and lightweight frame. Renowned for its exceptional accuracy and stealth, it excels at eliminating s商场 targets from a distance without drawing attention. Its precision engineering and quiet operation make it a favorite among marksmen and hunters alike.
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Ratslayer.label: 灭鼠者
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_ReservistsRifle.description: 预备役步枪是一把稀有、制作精良的狙击步枪，曾经由精英军事射手携带。它重量轻且极其精准，因其远程精确度和快速操控而备受赞誉，使其成为神枪手和收藏家梦寐以求的武器。
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_ReservistsRifle.label: 预备役军人的步枪
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Vances9mmSMG.description: Vance 的 9 毫米冲锋枪是一款传奇冲锋枪，经过专业定制，可实现快速射击和卓越的操控性。其抛光的表面和独特的雕刻使其与众不同，而其增强的准确性和可靠性使其成为收藏家和枪手之间的珍贵武器。
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Vances9mmSMG.label: 万斯的 9 毫米冲锋枪
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_VictoryRifle.description: 胜利步枪是一款传奇的定制狙击步枪，以其卓越的制动力和独特的击倒能力而闻名。其加固的框架和精密的工程使其成为神枪手中的珍贵武器，能够在极远的距离内进行毁灭性的射击，同时可靠地震慑目标。
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_VictoryRifle.label: 胜利步枪
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Wanda.description: 万达是一把来自首都废土的独特定制战斗霰弹枪。与标准战斗霰弹枪相比，它以其绿色表面和可靠性而著称，具有更快的射速和更轻的重量。受到那些在近距离战斗中重视速度和可靠性的人的青睐。
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Wanda.label: 万达
LanguageData.FCP_BoS_Lyons_Pride_Vertibird.label: BoS 里昂骄傲飞鸟
LanguageData.FCP_BoS_Lyons_VertibirdIncoming.label: BoS 里昂骄傲飞鸟（即将到来）
LanguageData.FCP_BoS_Lyons_VertibirdLeaving.label: BoS 里昂骄傲飞鸟（离开）
LanguageData.FCP_BoS_Outcast_Vertibird.label: BoS 弃儿飞鸟
LanguageData.FCP_BoS_Outcast_VertibirdIncoming.label: BoS 弃儿 vertibird（传入）
LanguageData.FCP_BoS_Outcast_VertibirdLeaving.label: BoS 弃儿 vertibird（离开）
LanguageData.FCP_BoS_Vertibird.label: BoS 飞鸟
LanguageData.FCP_BoS_VertibirdIncoming.label: BoS vertibird（传入）
LanguageData.FCP_BoS_VertibirdLeaving.label: BoS vertibird（离开）
LanguageData.FCP_Item_BoS_Food_Crate.description: A 钢铁兄弟会 ration crate containing preserved military meals, purified water, and nutritional supplements. Designed to sustain s老旧iers during extended operations in the harsh wasteland environment.
LanguageData.FCP_Item_BoS_Food_Crate.label: 兄弟会食品供应箱
LanguageData.FCP_Item_BoS_Lyons_Pride_Uniform_Crate.d: A specialized 钢铁兄弟会 uniform crate containing the distinctive gear worn by Elder Lyons' reformed Brotherhood. These uniforms represent the faction's humanitarian mission and their commitment to protecting the innocent.
LanguageData.FCP_Item_BoS_Outcast_Uniform_Crate.descr: 一个兄弟会被遗弃者的补给箱，里面装着纯粹派所穿的独特的红黑制服。这些制服象征着他们对原始法典的坚定奉献以及他们不惜一切代价夺回战前技术的使命。
LanguageData.FCP_Item_BoS_Outcast_Uniform_Crate.label: 被遗弃的制服箱
LanguageData.FCP_Item_BoS_Standard_Tech_Resource_Crat: A sealed 钢铁兄弟会 supply crate containing essential technological components, spare parts, and advanced materials. These resources are crucial for maintaining and upgrading their sophisticated equipment and installations.
LanguageData.FCP_Item_BoS_Standard_Uniform_Crate.desc: A 钢铁兄弟会 supply crate containing standard-issue uniforms, fatigues, and protective gear worn by regular Brotherhood personnel. Each piece bears the distinctive colors and insignia of the faction.
LanguageData.FCP_Item_BoS_Standard_Weapon_Crate.descr: A sealed 钢铁兄弟会 weapon crate containing high-quality firearms and energy weapons used by their forces. The distinctive red and metallic finish bears the Brotherhood's emblematic cogwheel.
LanguageData.FCP_Item_BoS_Standard_Weapon_Crate.label: 钢铁兄弟会 Weapon Crate
LanguageData.FCP_Currency_BoS_Scrip.description: An official paper currency issued by the 钢铁兄弟会. These notes are backed by the Brotherhood's vast technological resources and can be exchanged for advanced equipment, supplies, and services within Brotherhood controlled territories. More valuable than standard bottle caps due to the organization's strict resource management and reputation for honoring debts.
LanguageData.FCP_Currency_BoS_Scrip.label: 兄弟会票据
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_BoS_Appalachia_Fatigues.desc: Standard-issue 钢铁兄弟会 fatigues. Made from a robust and durable material, these fatigues are worn by members of the Brotherhood during their daily operations in Appalachia.
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_BoS_Appalachia_Infantry_Unif: A pristine military dress uniform worn by Brotherhood infantry during formal occasions. The uniform bears the insignia of the 钢铁兄弟会 and represents the discipline and order of the organization.
BoS 阿巴拉契亚步兵制服
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_BoS_B35C_Armor.description: A vacuum-sealed asbestos jumpsuit covering the entire body. Its purpose is twof老旧: it allows the user to actually operate the armor and protect soft tissue from moving parts inside the suit and heat. Unlike the BOS uniform, the Recon Armor provides decent protection on its own and is often used by Brotherhood agents on scouting missions or other situations where the clunky and loud power armor would draw too much attention.
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_BoS_B35C_Armor.label: BoS B35C 装甲
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_BoS_Battle_Coat.description: 兄弟会军官穿的坚固的军大衣。这件外套带有兄弟会的徽章，旨在承受严酷的战斗，同时保持专业的外观。
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_BoS_Battle_Coat.label: BoS 战斗外套
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_BoS_Bomber_Jacket.descriptio: 兄弟会飞行员和飞鸟机组成员穿着的皮革飞行夹克。该夹克带有兄弟会的装备和剑徽记，并在飞行操作期间提供保护。
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_BoS_Bomber_Jacket.label: BoS 飞行员夹克
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_BoS_Brotherhood_Fatigues.des: Standard-issue field uniform of the 钢铁兄弟会. These durable fatigues are worn by enlisted personnel and junior officers during daily operations and provide basic protection against environmental hazards.
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_BoS_Brotherhood_Field_Medic_: 兄弟会战地医务人员穿着的专业医疗制服。迷彩服设有额外的口袋，可存放医疗用品，旨在防止伤员治疗过程中的污染。
BoS 兄弟会战地军医疲劳
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_BoS_Classic_Combat_Armor_Rei: Enhanced combat armor upgraded with 钢铁兄弟会 technology. This armor retains the design of the original while incorporating improved protection and environmental sealing systems.
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_BoS_Elder_Robes.description: Ceremonial robes worn by Brotherhood Elders. These robes symbolize the authority and responsibility that comes with leading the 钢铁兄弟会 in their sacred mission to preserve technology.
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_BoS_Elder_Robes.label: BoS长老长袍
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_BoS_Field_Scribe.description: 兄弟会抄写员在兄弟会设施安全之外执行研究任务时所穿的野战制服。该制服将学术传统与实际领域的要​​求结合起来。
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_BoS_Field_Scribe.label: BoS 现场抄写员制服
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_BoS_Jumpsuit.description: 一款从头开始设计的连身衣，可与 West Tek 动力装甲框架配合使用。它是一款合身的套装，旨在在操作装甲时提供最大的舒适度和实用性。虽然这不是操作装甲的要求，但它使长期使用更加舒适并减少擦伤。
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_BoS_Jumpsuit.label: BoS 连身裤
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_BoS_Lancer_Captain_Uniform.d: A formal dress uniform worn by Lancer Captains of the 钢铁兄弟会. The uniform features g老旧 braiding and ceremonial shoulder boards, marking the wearer as an officer of the Brotherhood's air fleet.
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_BoS_Outcast_Recon_Armor.desc: 兄弟会流亡者侦察兵和先遣队穿着的专门侦察装甲。该装甲经过改进，具有增强的机动性系统和隐身增强功能，具有独特的流放者标记和战术修改，反映了他们更具侵略性的作战原则。
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_BoS_Outcast_Scribe_Robes.des: 兄弟会弃儿专家和技术人员穿着的功能性长袍。这些长袍具有独特的流放者色彩和徽章，经过修改，适合学者和工程师与战士一起追求技术霸权的野外行动。
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_BoS_Recon_Armor.description: 兄弟会侦察部队使用的轻型战术装甲。侦察装甲提供坚实的保护，同时保持机动性和隐身能力，使其成为侦察任务和全动力装甲不切实际的情况的理想选择。采用先进的复合材料和集成传感器系统。
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_BoS_Recon_Armor.label: BoS 侦察装甲
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_BoS_Science_Scribe.descripti: Laboratory attire worn by Science Scribes of the 钢铁兄弟会. The clean, white coat is designed for work with 危险 pre-war technology and experimental equipment.
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_BoS_Science_Scribe.label: BoS 科学抄写员服装
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_BoS_Scribe_Robes.description: 兄弟会文士在正式仪式上穿着的连帽长袍。这些长袍代表了抄写员会的学术传统以及他们对保存技术知识的奉献精神。
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_BoS_Scribe_Robes.label: BoS 抄写长袍
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_BoS_Squire.description: 兄弟会侍从所穿的训练服。这款实用的服装专为战斗训练和教育而设计，同时标志着穿着者在兄弟会等级制度中的初级地位。
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_BoS_Squire.label: BoS 乡绅制服
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_BoS_Appalachia_Beret.descrip: 阿巴拉契亚兄弟会分遣队佩戴的软贝雷帽。它绣有兄弟会徽章，用于军官和特种部队的识别和仪式任务。
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_BoS_Appalachia_Beret.label: BoS 阿巴拉契亚贝雷帽
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_BoS_Appalachia_Infantry_Hood: 兄弟会步兵使用的标准头罩，用于在巡逻和战术行动期间进行隐蔽和基本防护。
BoS 阿巴拉契亚步兵兜帽
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_BoS_B35C_Helmet.description: A reinforced combat helmet issued to Brotherhood ground troops. Built to resist shrapnel and s商场-arms fire, commonly paired with infantry armor on patrols and engagements.
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_BoS_B35C_Helmet.label: BoS B35C 头盔
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_BoS_Field_Scribe_Hat.descrip: 兄弟会抄写员和研究人员在探险时佩戴的野战帽。它提供阳光和光天气保护，同时将佩戴者标记为研究和恢复干部的一部分。
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_BoS_Field_Scribe_Hat.label: BoS 科学领域帽子
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_BoS_Flight_Helmet.descriptio: 兄弟会机组人员和飞鸟机组人员使用的飞行员头盔，配有衬垫和基本通讯设备，以在飞行和旋翼操作期间保护机组人员。
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_BoS_Flight_Helmet.label: BoS 飞行头盔
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_BoS_Lancer_Captain_Hat.descr: 枪骑兵部队军官所戴的鸭舌帽，用于在检查和公务期间表示兄弟会内的等级和权威。
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_BoS_Lancer_Captain_Hat.label: BoS Lancer 的队长帽
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_BoS_Outcast_Recon_Hood.descr: 兄弟会流亡者侦察专家所佩戴的战术兜帽。该引擎盖具有增强的光学集成、通信设备和环保系统，这些系统均根据 Outcast 规范进行修改，用于在敌后进行扩展的野战作战。
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_BoS_Outcast_Recon_Hood.label: BoS 流放者侦察兜帽
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_BoS_Recon_Hood.description: 轻质兜帽深受侦察队青睐。采用低能见度和减少眩光的编织方式，有助于侦察、观察和秘密行动。
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_BoS_Recon_Hood.label: BoS 侦察帽
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_BoS_Science_Scribe_Hat.descr: 科学抄写员佩戴的帽子，用于识别兄弟会研究团的成员。抄写员专注于研究、抢救和保存战前技术。
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_BoS_Science_Scribe_Hat.label: BoS 科学抄写帽
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_BoS_Squire_Hat.description: 发给侍从和受训者的简单帽子。侍从是附属于骑士和圣武士的学徒，学习野战技能和兄弟会传统。
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_BoS_Squire_Hat.label: BoS 乡绅帽子
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_BoS_Appalachia_T60_Power_Arm: Advanced T-60 power armor bearing the distinctive colors and insignia of the Appalachian 钢铁兄弟会. This battle-tested armor provides exceptional protection while maintaining mobility, representing the pinnacle of pre-war American military engineering adapted for wasteland operations.
BoS 阿巴拉契亚 T-60 动力装甲
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_BoS_Lost_Hills_T51_Power_Arm: T-51 动力装甲采用失落山脉原始兄弟会章节的经典颜色。这件盔甲代表了兄弟会传统的基础，以及保护和控制战前技术以造福人类的最初使命。
BoS 失落山丘 T-51 动力装甲
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_BoS_Midwestern_Power_Armor.d: The distinctive power armor of the Midwestern 钢铁兄弟会, featuring a unique horned helmet design that has become their signature on the battlefield. This armor represents the Midwest chapter's adaptive nature - maintaining Brotherhood standards while developing their own identity separate from Lost Hills. The intimidating silhouette strikes fear into raiders and mutants alike across the wastes of the former American Midwest.
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_BoS_Midwestern_Power_Armor.l: 中西部兄弟会动力装甲
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_BoS_T45_Lyons_Power_Armor.de: T-45 power armor bearing the distinctive markings of Elder Lyons' progressive Brotherhood. This armor represents a departure from traditional Brotherhood doctrine, used by s老旧iers who prioritized protecting the innocent over hoarding technology, marking a controversial but heroic chapter in Brotherhood history.
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_BoS_T45_Lyons_Power_Armor.la: BoS Lyons T-45 动力装甲
兄弟会流亡者所穿着的 T-45 动力装甲，涂有他们特有的黑色和红色。这些强硬的传统主义者脱离了里昂长老的富有同情心的政策，认为兄弟会应该只专注于获取技术而不是帮助废土人。
BoS 流放者 T-45 动力装甲
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_BoS_T51_Appalachia_Power_Arm: T-51动力装甲专为恶劣的阿巴拉契亚环境而定制。该变体具有增强的环境密封和辐射屏蔽功能，适合兄弟会阿巴拉契亚分会在回收和保护技术的使命中所面临的独特挑战。
BoS 阿巴拉契亚 T-51 动力装甲
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_BoS_T51_Power_Armor.descript: The venerable T-51 power armor, a mainstay of Brotherhood forces. While 老旧er than the T-60 series, this armor has proven its reliability through decades of wasteland combat. Its tried-and-true design offers excellent protection and has been extensively field-tested by Brotherhood knights and paladins.
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_BoS_T51_Power_Armor.label: BoS T-51 动力装甲
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_BoS_T60_Power_Armor.descript: Standard issue T-60 power armor worn by 钢铁兄弟会 s老旧iers. Built for maximum protection and battlefield durability, this armor represents the apex of pre-war power armor technology, enhanced with post-war modifications and field improvements developed by Brotherhood engineers.
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_BoS_T60_Power_Armor.label: BoS T-60 动力装甲
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_BoS_Appalachia_T60_Power_Arm: 先进的 T-60 动力装甲头盔配备集成 HUD 系统和环境传感器。独特的阿巴拉契亚兄弟会徽章标志着该组织属于从 76 号避难所崛起的派系，旨在开垦荒地并保护人类的技术遗产。
BoS 阿巴拉契亚 T-60 动力装甲头盔
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_BoS_Midwestern_Power_Armor_H: The iconic horned helmet of the Midwestern 钢铁兄弟会. This distinctive headgear has become synonymous with the Midwest chapter's pragmatic but formidable approach to wasteland warfare. The intimidating horned design serves both as a symbol of their independence from Lost Hills and as a psychological weapon against their enemies.
中西部兄弟会动力装甲头盔
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_BoS_T45_Lyons_Power_Armor_He: T-45 power armor helmet worn by s老旧iers loyal to Elder Lyons' humanitarian mission. This helmet symbolizes a Brotherhood more concerned with protecting the innocent than hoarding technology, representing hope and compassion in the wasteland.
BoS Lyons T-45 动力装甲头盔
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_BoS_T45_Outcast_Power_Armor_: T-45 动力装甲头盔涂有兄弟会流亡者的黑色和红色。这款头盔代表了对传统兄弟会使命的坚定不移的奉献，即技术获取高于一切，由那些拒绝妥协原则的人佩戴。
BoS Outcast T-45 动力装甲头盔
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_BoS_T51_Appalachia_Power_Arm: T-51 动力装甲头盔针对阿巴拉契亚行动的独特挑战进行了改装。通过改进的辐射探测系统和环境过滤得到增强，这对于战后阿巴拉契亚受辐射的山脉和森林的生存至关重要。
BoS 阿巴拉契亚 T-51 动力装甲头盔
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_BoS_T51_Power_Armor_Helmet.d: Time-tested T-51 power armor helmet that has protected Brotherhood s老旧iers for generations. While lacking some of the advanced features of newer models, its proven reliability and rugged construction make it a trusted companion in the wasteland.
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_BoS_T51_Power_Armor_Helmet.l: BoS T-51 动力装甲头盔
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_BoS_T60_Power_Armor_Helmet.d: 兄弟会骑士和圣骑士佩戴的标准 T-60 动力装甲头盔。具有先进的瞄准系统、环境保护和标志性的红色光学传感器，让那些滥用技术的人感到恐惧。
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_BoS_T60_Power_Armor_Helmet.l: BoS T-60 动力装甲头盔
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_BoS_Crusader_Pistol.description: A precision-engineered 10mm pistol manufactured by the 钢铁兄弟会. The Crusader represents the Brotherhood's philosophy of combining proven ballistic technology with modern manufacturing techniques. Featuring a reinforced frame, enhanced rifling, and superior materials, this sidearm offers exceptional reliability and accuracy compared to standard wasteland pistols. Brotherhood knights and paladins carry these as secondary weapons, trusting in their consistent performance when every shot counts.
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_BoS_Crusader_Pistol.label: BoS 10 毫米十字军手枪
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_BoS_M94_Plasma_Rifle.description: A refined plasma rifle developed and manufactured by the 钢铁兄弟会's West Coast chapters. The M-94 represents decades of Brotherhood weapons research, featuring improved magnetic confinement, enhanced cooling systems, and superior durability compared to standard plasma rifles. Each weapon is carefully crafted by Brotherhood scribes and tested to rigorous military standards. The Brotherhood's trademark attention to detail and technological excellence make this one of the most reliable plasma weapons in the wasteland.
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_BoS_M94_Plasma_Rifle.label: BoS M-94 等离子步枪
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_BoS_Ultracite_Rifle.description: A cutting-edge energy weapon developed by the 钢铁兄弟会 using ultracite, a rare crystalline material with exceptional energy-conducting properties. This experimental rifle fires rapid bursts of ultracite-charged plasma that penetrates armor more effectively than standard plasma weapons while maintaining a higher rate of fire. The weapon's advanced cooling system and compact design make it a favorite among Brotherhood field operatives who need to engage heavily armored targets quickly. Each rifle is painstakingly assembled in Brotherhood workshops from carefully refined ultracite cores.
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_BoS_Ultracite_Rifle.label: BoS Ultracite 步枪
LanguageData.FCP_Melee_BoS_Super_Sledge.description: A 钢铁兄弟会 manufactured super sledgehammer, built to their exacting specifications. This legendary weapon combines a reinforced durasteel head with advanced kinetic energy storage technology. Upon impact, the stored energy releases in a devastating shockwave, multiplying the force of each blow. Brotherhood paladins favor this weapon for breaching fortifications and engaging heavily armored targets in close combat. The BoS insignia stamped on the handle marks this as official Brotherhood equipment, built to last through countless battles.
LanguageData.FCP_Melee_BoS_Super_Sledge.label: BoS 超级雪橇
LanguageData.FCP_Melee_BoS_Super_Sledge.tools.0.label: 处理
LanguageData.FCP_Melee_BoS_Super_Sledge.tools.1.label: 动力头
LanguageData.FCP_Animal_Legion_Guard_Dog.description: 有些狗已经被驯化，甚至被赋予保护主人及其所有财产的责任，这种动物会尽其所能。这种动物是由军团饲养的，作为侦察犬和护卫犬，以对抗任何可能出现的敌人。
LanguageData.FCP_Animal_Legion_Guard_Dog.label: 军团看门狗
LanguageData.FCP_Currency_Legion_Denarius.description: 凯撒军团使用这种硬币作为货币的主要形式之一。这枚硬币的一面印有凯撒本人的肖像，另一面印有凯撒、乔苏亚·格雷姆和比尔·卡尔霍恩的肖像。
LanguageData.FCP_Currency_Legion_Denarius.label: 军团银币
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_Caesar_Robes.description: The ornate ceremonial robes worn by Caesar himself, the supreme leader of the Legion. These magnificent red and g老旧 robes are crafted from the finest pre-war materials and adorned with g老旧en trim, symbolizing absolute authority over the Legion. The robes provide modest protection but their true power lies in the awe and respect they command from all who see them.
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_Caesar_Robes.label: 凯撒长袍
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_Legion_Centurion_Armor.descr: 军团百夫长、军团精英所穿的重型盔甲。它由各种各样的不同盔甲组成，包括战斗盔甲、动力盔甲、皮甲甚至超级变异盔甲。这些物品很可能是从被佩戴者击败的敌人身上取得的。尽管盔甲种类繁多，但它提供了卓越的保护。
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_Legion_Centurion_Armor.label: 军团百夫长盔甲
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_Legion_Centurion_Helmet.desc: 这顶头盔由凯撒军团的先遣侦察兵 vexillarii 佩戴，由郊狼头部的毛皮制成。它提供的保护很少，因为它的主要用途本质上是象征性的。
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_Legion_Explorer_Armor.descri: 军团侦察兵穿着的一套轻型盔甲，外观与新兵盔甲非常相似。与大多数军团盔甲一样，它由改造后的运动装备制成，包括足球运动员的保护性肩部和胸垫，并用额外的皮革衬垫加固，并穿在棒球接球手的背心外面。它不能很好地保护。
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_Legion_Explorer_Armor.label: 军团探索者护甲
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_Legion_Explorer_Hood.descrip: 一种基本的轻型头盔，由厚厚的棕色布头巾组成，配有护目镜，可保护佩戴者的眼睛免受灼热阳光的伤害。为凯撒军团服务的探险家、侦察兵所佩戴
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_Legion_Explorer_Hood.label: 军团探险者兜帽
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_Legion_Legate_Armor.descript: The armor of a Legate, a close confidante of the mighty Caesar himself. A full suit of heavy gauge steel, bearing numerous scratches and dents from countless battles, and offers full body protection. It was crafted to closely resemble the armors of the 古老 romans and has little to do with the repurposed sports equipment most members of the Legion wear. Unsurprisingly it provides it�s wearer with superior protection but is incredibly heavy.
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_Legion_Legate_Armor.label: 军团军团长甲
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_Legion_Legate_Helmet.descrip: The helmet of a legate, the highest-ranking warlords in the Legion, apart from Caesar of course. Its fashioned after the enclosed masks often worn by the cavalry of 古老 Rome and sports red frills and horns to make the wearer look more intimidating.
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_Legion_Legate_Helmet.label: 军团使节头盔
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_Legion_Plate.description: 一套军团板甲，通常由战前的足球垫制成，并在肩膀上添加钉子以提供额外的保护。
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_Legion_Plate.label: 军团板甲
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_Legion_Praetorian_Armor.desc: 凯撒私人卫队通常穿的这套盔甲与新兵盔甲类似，但前臂上有额外的金属护腕，可能是因为禁卫军喜欢用拳头打人，还有红色短斗篷和红色兜帽。尽管非常相似，但这种盔甲对佩戴者的保护比新兵盔甲要好得多，而重量却差不多。
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_Legion_Prime_Armor.descripti: 军团的主要战斗力量，与新兵相比，主力军团士兵有权穿着更好的盔甲。它仍然由相同的防护肩垫和胸垫制成，但在上身周围缠绕着额外的装甲带。
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_Legion_Prime_Armor.label: 军团主甲
战前装饰有羽毛的橄榄球头盔，配有红色面罩和黑色护目镜。虽然它提供了相当多的保护，但它的主要用途是作为等级的象征。头盔上固定的黑色羽毛表明佩戴者是首席十官，凯撒军团中的中级军官，领导着一队首席军团士兵。
军团 Prime Decanus 头盔
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_Legion_Prime_Helmet.descript: 高级头盔是棕色帽子，配有黑色护目镜，下脸包裹着红色头巾。它与新兵的头盔本质上是一样的，但有不同颜色的头巾来标记不同的军衔。
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_Legion_Prime_Helmet.label: 军团 Prime 头盔
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_Legion_Recruit_Armor.descrip: 与大多数军团盔甲一样，新兵盔甲由改造后的运动装备制成，包括足球运动员的保护性肩部和胸垫，并用额外的皮革衬垫加固，并穿在棒球接球手的背心外面。
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_Legion_Recruit_Armor.label: 军团新兵盔甲
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_Legion_Recruit_Decanus_Helme: 战前装饰有羽毛的橄榄球头盔，配有红色面罩和黑色护目镜。虽然它提供了相当多的保护，但它的主要用途是作为等级的象征。头盔上固定的红色和黑色羽毛表明佩戴者是新兵十位，这是凯撒军团中级别最低的军官，领导着一队缺乏经验的新兵。
军团新兵 Decanus 头盔
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_Legion_Recruit_Helmet.descri: 棕色皮帽，戴着黑色护目镜，下脸裹着头巾。不是最好的头盔，但它易于制造且重量轻。
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_Legion_Recruit_Helmet.label: 军团新兵头盔
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_Legion_Tunic.description: 凯撒军团成员所穿的普通外衣。
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_Legion_Tunic.label: 军团外衣
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_Legion_Vest.description: A lightweight leather vest used by the Legion. The base of the vest seams to be made from an 老旧 baseball umpires pads, or even some football training pads. Either way it gives the user some more protection than nothing at all.
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_Legion_Vest.label: 军团背心
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_Legion_Veteran_Armor.descrip: 与普通军团士兵的铠甲相比，老兵铠甲在小腿处多了铠甲垫，肩垫和右臂上的皮包裹上还伸出了几根锋利的钉子。它提供了更多的保护，同时仍然有点轻。
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_Legion_Veteran_Armor.label: 军团老兵盔甲
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_Legion_Veteran_Decanus_Helme: 战前装饰有羽毛的橄榄球头盔，配有红色面罩和黑色护目镜。虽然它提供了相当多的保护，但它的主要用途是作为等级的象征。头盔上固定的红、白、黑羽毛表明佩戴者是一名退伍军人，凯撒军团中的高级军官，领导着一支由顽强的退伍军人组成的小队。
军团老兵 Decanus 头盔
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_Legion_Veteran_Helmet.descri: 带有铝制头盔的棒球帽、护目镜和面罩。与军团较低级别的头盔相比，它提供了更多的保护，但重量却不重。
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_Legion_Veteran_Helmet.label: 军团老兵头盔
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_Legion_Vexillarius_Armor.des: 以一套军团退伍军人盔甲为基础，在躯干上附加了圆形金属板，以及背面佩戴的展示军团旗帜的横幅。虽然它比低等级的装甲有所提升，但它也更重。
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_Legion_Vexillarius_Armor.lab: 维克斯拉留斯军团盔甲
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_Legion_Vexillarius_Helmet.de: 这顶头盔由凯撒军团的先遣侦察兵 vexillarii 佩戴，由郊狼头部的毛皮制成。它提供的保护很少，因为它的主要用途本质上是象征性的。
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_Legion_Vexillarius_Helmet.la: 军团维克斯拉里乌斯头盔
LanguageData.FCP_Chem_Addictol.description: A powerful anti-addiction medication that purges the body of chemical dependencies. Addictol works by resetting neurological pathways and breaking the addiction cycle, though the process is uncomfortable and temporary exhaustion is common.\n\nA lifesaver for those trying to kick 危险 habits, though its high cost limits availability.
LanguageData.FCP_Chem_Addictol.label: 成瘾者
LanguageData.FCP_Chem_Auto_Stimpak.description: 一种自动输送系统，可在检测到受伤时分配标准针剂剂量。 The auto-injector mechanism eliminates the need for manual application, making it ideal for solo travelers.
LanguageData.FCP_Chem_Auto_Stimpak.label: 自动刺激剂
LanguageData.FCP_Chem_Auto_Super_Stimpak.description: 一种自动输送系统，装载有超级针剂配方，可实现快速紧急治疗。这种先进的注射器将军用级愈合化合物与自动输送技术相结合，使其成为荒地中最有价值的医疗物品之一。
LanguageData.FCP_Chem_Auto_Super_Stimpak.label: 自动超级刺激剂
LanguageData.FCP_Chem_Berry_Mentats.description: A Mentats variant infused with berry flavoring and enhanced formula. Berry Mentats 可显着提升魅力和社交技能，使用户在谈判和社交场合中更具说服力和讨人喜欢。\n\n受到商人、外交官和任何需要留下好印象的人的青睐。
LanguageData.FCP_Chem_Berry_Mentats.label: 浆果门塔斯
LanguageData.FCP_Chem_Blood_Pack.description: A sterile bag of preserved blood suitable for emergency transfusions. Blood packs provide immediate restoration of blood volume and help stabilize critically wounded patients.虽然不如现代医疗技术先进，但这些战前的医疗用品在荒原上仍然很有价值。\n\n血包是通用捐献者，适用于所有血型。
LanguageData.FCP_Chem_Blood_Pack.label: 血包
LanguageData.FCP_Chem_Buffout.description: 一种战前增强表现的类固醇。 Buffout dramatically increases strength and endurance, improving melee damage and carrying capacity.然而，长期使用会导致成瘾和潜在的器官损伤。\n\n战前深受运动员和劳工的欢迎，现在是荒地战士和拾荒者的主要产品。
LanguageData.FCP_Chem_Buffout.label: 布福特
LanguageData.FCP_Chem_Cateye.description: An experimental drug that temporarily enhances night vision and low-light perception. Cateye dilates the pupils and enhances retinal sensitivity, allowing users to see clearly in near-total darkness.\n\nValued by night scouts and scavengers exploring dark 废墟s, though the light sensitivity during daytime can be problematic.
LanguageData.FCP_Chem_Cateye.label: 猫眼
LanguageData.FCP_Chem_Daddy_O.description: A pre-war cognitive enhancer that boosts intelligence and perception at the cost of social skills. Daddy-O 使用户变得更聪明、更有洞察力，但在社交方面更加尴尬和孤僻。\n\n受到优先考虑心理敏锐度而非社交互动的研究人员和技术人员的青睐。
LanguageData.FCP_Chem_Daddy_O.label: 爸爸-O
LanguageData.FCP_Chem_Day_Tripper.description: 一种战前消遣性药物，可增强情绪和社交魅力。 Day Tripper 使用户更具魅力和讨人喜欢，同时提供令人愉悦的温和快感。经常使用会让人上瘾。\n\n在战前社交圈中很受欢迎，现在仍然被那些寻求提高社会地位的人使用。
LanguageData.FCP_Chem_Day_Tripper.label: 一日游
LanguageData.FCP_Chem_Diluted_Stimpak.description: 一种淡化的刺激传递系统，随着时间的推移提供轻微的愈合效果。由于其成本较低且可用性较高，因此在荒地拾荒者中很常见。
LanguageData.FCP_Chem_Diluted_Stimpak.label: 稀释的针剂
LanguageData.FCP_Chem_Dixons_Jet.description: A refined and purified version of Jet created through an advanced filtration process. Dixon's Jet 比标准 Jet 提供更强烈、更持久的快感，杂质更少，但仍然很容易上瘾。\n\n这种高级变体以其创造者的名字命名，在 Jet 用户中售价很高。
LanguageData.FCP_Chem_Dixons_Jet.label: 迪克森喷气式飞机
LanguageData.FCP_Chem_Doctors_Bag.description: A comprehensive medical kit containing surgical tools, antiseptics, splints, and pharmaceutical supplies.医生包可以对严重受伤和残废的肢体进行现场治疗，但正确使用需要医学知识和时间。\n\n对于任何认真的荒地医生来说都是必不可少的设备。
LanguageData.FCP_Chem_Doctors_Bag.label: 医生包
LanguageData.FCP_Chem_Fixer.description: A specialized anti-addiction compound that helps break chemical dependencies.虽然不如 Addictol 强大，但 Fixer 更容易获得，并且在对抗戒断症状和减轻成瘾严重程度方面仍然有效。\n\n这是荒地医生的工具，可帮助成瘾者康复，而无需获得昂贵的战前药物。
LanguageData.FCP_Chem_Fixer.label: 固定器
LanguageData.FCP_Chem_Grape_Mentats.description: A balanced Mentats variant that enhances both intelligence and charisma. Grape Mentats 使用户变得更聪明、更善于社交，非常适合技术谈判或科学演示。\n\n需要向非专家解释复杂想法的科学家的选择。
LanguageData.FCP_Chem_Grape_Mentats.label: 葡萄门塔斯
LanguageData.FCP_Chem_Healing_Powder.description: A traditional wasteland medicine made from ground broc flower and xander root. While less effective than modern stimpaks, healing powder is cheaper to produce and has been used by tribal healers for generations.随着时间的推移，混合物可以逐渐愈合。
LanguageData.FCP_Chem_Healing_Powder.label: 愈合粉
LanguageData.FCP_Chem_Hydra.description: An experimental pre-war drug designed to rapidly heal crippled limbs. Hydra uses advanced regenerative compounds to repair damaged tissue and bone, though the process is painful and can cause temporary disorientation.\n\nPopular among wasteland combatants for its ability to get wounded s老旧iers back into the fight quickly.
LanguageData.FCP_Chem_Hydra.label: 九头蛇
LanguageData.FCP_Chem_Jet.description: A highly addictive meta-amphetamine created from brahmin dung fumes. Jet 可以显着提高动作速度和反应能力，但效果很严重，而且很难戒掉。\n\nJet 由一位名叫 Myron 的化学天才发明，成为战后荒原上最广泛、最具破坏性的药物。
LanguageData.FCP_Chem_Jet.label: 喷射
LanguageData.FCP_Chem_MedX.description: 战前的止痛药。 Med-X works by blocking pain receptors and reducing incoming damage through enhanced pain tolerance.该药物非常有效，但具有很大的成瘾风险。\n\nMed-X 最初作为全身麻醉剂销售，现已成为荒地中有价值的战斗药物。
LanguageData.FCP_Chem_MedX.label: 医学-X
LanguageData.FCP_Chem_Mentats.description: A nootropic drug that enhances cognitive function. Mentats improve perception, intelligence, and mental acuity, making users sharper and more aware of their surroundings.长期使用可能会导致心理依赖。\n\n受到科学家、贸易商以及任何在谈判或技术工作中需要心理优势的人的青睐。
LanguageData.FCP_Chem_Mentats.label: 门塔茨
LanguageData.FCP_Chem_Orange_Mentats.description: A specialized Mentats variant that dramatically enhances perception and awareness. Orange Mentats sharpen the senses and improve accuracy, making them invaluable for scouts, snipers, and anyone needing enhanced sensory perception.\n\nA marksman's 秘密 weapon for those critical shots.
LanguageData.FCP_Chem_Orange_Mentats.label: 橙色门塔斯
LanguageData.FCP_Chem_Party_Time_Mentats.description: A recreational Mentats variant designed for social gatherings.派对时间 Mentats 可以增强魅力和心情，使社交互动更加愉快和成功，同时提供温和的欣快效果。\n\n任何废土派对的生活，但最好谨慎使用。
LanguageData.FCP_Chem_Party_Time_Mentats.label: 派对时间 门塔斯
LanguageData.FCP_Chem_Psycho.description: A military combat drug that sends the user into a berserker rage. Psycho dramatically increases damage output and resistance to injury, but suppresses higher brain functions and is highly addictive.\n\nDeveloped before the war for special forces operations, Psycho turns ordinary s老旧iers into fearless killing machines.
LanguageData.FCP_Chem_Psycho.label: 心理
LanguageData.FCP_Chem_Radaway.description: A pre-war intravenous chemical solution that bonds with radiation contamination in the body and flushes it out through the bloodstream.虽然可以有效地治疗有毒物质的积聚，但这个过程会让人筋疲力尽，并使患者在几个小时内变得虚弱。\n\nRad-Away 是荒地中的一种宝贵商品，那里的辐射暴露是一个持续的威胁。
LanguageData.FCP_Chem_Radaway.label: 辐射远离
LanguageData.FCP_Chem_RadX.description: A pre-war anti-radiation chemical that significantly increases the body's resistance to toxic and radioactive contamination. Rad-X 的工作原理是暂时改变细胞结构以抵抗辐射吸收，尽管此过程会导致轻微的定向障碍和反射减弱。\n\n与消除现有污染的 Rad-Away 不同，Rad-X 在暴露于危险环境之前采取预防措施。
LanguageData.FCP_Chem_RadX.label: 辐射X
LanguageData.FCP_Chem_Rebound.description: A basic anti-addiction medication that helps reduce withdrawal symptoms and cravings.虽然 Rebound 的功效不如 Addictol，但价格更便宜，并且仍然可以为那些与化学依赖作斗争的人提供显着的缓解。\n\n这是荒地诊所在预算内治疗成瘾患者的常见选择。
LanguageData.FCP_Chem_Rebound.label: 反弹
LanguageData.FCP_Chem_Rocket.description: A 危险 mixture of Jet and Nuka-Cola that provides an intense burst of energy and speed. The combination of stimulants creates a powerful but unstable high that significantly boosts action speed and reflexes.\n\nPopular among couriers and raiders who need quick bursts of performance.
LanguageData.FCP_Chem_Rocket.label: 火箭
LanguageData.FCP_Chem_Slasher.description: A brutal combat stimulant specifically designed to enhance melee combat effectiveness. Slasher increases melee damage output dramatically while reducing pain sensitivity, creating fearless close-combat fighters.\n\nPopular among raiders and melee specialists, though its addictive nature and side effects make it a 危险 choice.
LanguageData.FCP_Chem_Slasher.label: 砍杀者
LanguageData.FCP_Chem_Steady.description: A muscle relaxant and neural stabilizer that dramatically improves shooting accuracy and reduces weapon sway. Steady 可以平息颤抖并稳定双手，这对于精确工作和狙击而言非常宝贵。\n\nSteady 是为射手和外科医生开发的，对于任何需要完美手眼协调的人来说已经成为必不可少的工具。
LanguageData.FCP_Chem_Steady.label: 稳定的
LanguageData.FCP_Chem_Stimpak.description: 用于治愈损伤的标准刺激传递系统。刺激剂是荒地中最常见的医疗物品，它结合了愈合剂和生物再生化合物来快速修复伤口。
LanguageData.FCP_Chem_Stimpak.label: 针剂
LanguageData.FCP_Chem_Super_Stimpak.description: 强大的军用级刺激包，可提供快速和广泛的治疗。 Super stimpaks use a highly concentrated formula with advanced bio-regenerative compounds, making them extremely valuable and rare.
LanguageData.FCP_Chem_Super_Stimpak.label: 超级针剂
LanguageData.FCP_Chem_Turbo.description: An extremely potent inhaler that dramatically accelerates the user's perception and reflexes. Turbo makes time seem to slow down, allowing for superhuman reaction speeds.效果虽然短暂，但却非常强大。\n\nTurbo 通过先进的精炼过程创建，是荒地中最受欢迎的战斗增强器之一。
LanguageData.FCP_Chem_Turbo.label: 涡轮
LanguageData.FCP_Chem_Ultra_Stimpak.description: 增强型刺激包，具有改善的治疗特性和更快的作用。这些改进的刺激剂使用更浓缩的配方和额外的生物再生化合物。
LanguageData.FCP_Chem_Ultra_Stimpak.label: 超级针剂
LanguageData.FCP_Chem_Ultrajet.description: An extremely potent combination of Jet and Psycho. Ultrajet provides the speed enhancement of Jet combined with the combat fury of Psycho, creating a devastating combat stimulant. Highly addictive and 危险.\n\nA favorite among the most desperate and violent wasteland fighters.
LanguageData.FCP_Chem_Ultrajet.label: 超喷射
LanguageData.FCP_Chem_X_Cell.description: An extremely rare and expensive pre-war super-drug that enhances all physical and mental capabilities simultaneously. X-Cell 提供了所有统计数据的全面增强，但生产起来极其困难且成本高昂。\n\nX-Cell 是战前制药成就的顶峰，是最终的性能增强剂。
LanguageData.FCP_Chem_X_Cell.label: X细胞
LanguageData.FCP_Enclave_Vertibird.description: Vertibird 是一系列垂直起降 (VTOL) 飞机的名称。这些多用途倾转旋翼机由美国军方开发，并迅速成为主要的武装直升机和运输机。该值现在由 英克雷 使用。
LanguageData.FCP_Enclave_Vertibird.label: 英克雷 飞鸟
LanguageData.FCP_Enclave_VertibirdIncoming.label: 英克雷 vertibird（传入）
LanguageData.FCP_Enclave_VertibirdLeaving.label: 英克雷 vertibird（离开）
LanguageData.FCP_Item_Enclave_Standard_Weapon_Crate.d: Vault-Tec 收藏版午餐盒。它有点脏，但仍然可以打开，里面可能有一些有用的东西！
LanguageData.FCP_Item_Enclave_Standard_Weapon_Crate.l: 肮脏的 Vault-Tec 收藏版午餐盒
LanguageData.FCP_Item_Enclave_Tech_Crate.label: 标准技术资源箱
LanguageData.FCP_Currency_Enclave_Platinum_Bullion.de: High-purity platinum coins minted by the 英克雷 as a reserve currency for high-value transactions. Each bullion coin bears the distinctive 英克雷 eagle emblem and represents the technological supremacy and economic power of America's shadow government. These precious metal coins are highly valued both for their platinum content and as symbols of 英克雷 authority.
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_Enclave_Combat_Armor.descrip: Advanced combat armor issued to 英克雷 troopers. Constructed from reinforced composites, it offers substantial protection against ballistic and melee threats while allowing for mobility in hostile environments.
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_Enclave_Combat_Armor.label: 英克雷 Combat Armor
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_Enclave_Officer_Coat.descrip: A formal coat worn by 英克雷 officers, tailored from high-quality materials and adorned with insignia. It signifies authority and provides moderate protection while maintaining a commanding presence.
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_Enclave_Officer_Coat.label: 英克雷 Officer Coat
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_Enclave_Scientist_Boots.desc: Specialized boots worn by 英克雷 scientists, designed with reinforced soles and advanced materials to protect against chemical spills, radiation, and hazardous terrain during field research.
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_Enclave_Scientist_Glove.desc: Protective gloves worn by 英克雷 scientists, made from advanced polymers to shield hands from chemicals, contaminants, and the harsh elements encountered during fieldwork.
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_Enclave_Scientist_Outfit.des: A suit commonly worn by the 英克雷's scientists, especially when working in the hazardous wasteland. It's a fully enclosed white suit with special polymers woven into it and a helmet with an orange visor made from plexiglass. It comes with a built-in computer system and various scientific instruments to support all manners of intellectual pursuits.
Advanced combat armor issued to 英克雷 troopers. Constructed from reinforced composites, it offers substantial protection against ballistic and melee threats while allowing for mobility in hostile environments.
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_Enclave_Trooper_Uniform.desc: 漆黑的制服，外面套着棕褐色的夹克和裤子。外层由坚固的材料制成，旨在承受荒地的恶劣条件。制服配有一双及膝靴、黑色手套和实用腰带。它确实能很好地抵御自然灾害，但抵御子弹的能力较差。
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_Enclave_Officer_Cap.descript: A distinguished cap worn by 英克雷 officers, symbolizing authority and discipline. Made from high-quality materials, it offers moderate protection and a professional appearance.
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_Enclave_Officer_Cap.label: 英克雷 Officer Cap
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_Enclave_Scientist_Helmet.des: An advanced helmet designed for 英克雷 scientists, equipped with protective visors and integrated sensors to assist in hazardous environments.
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_Enclave_Trooper_Cap.descript: A practical cap issued to 英克雷 troopers, providing basic protection and shielding against the elements while maintaining a professional look.
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_Enclave_Trooper_Cap.label: 英克雷 Trooper Cap
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_Enclave_Advanced_Power_Armor: A suit of advanced power armor developed by the 英克雷. Offers exceptional protection against all forms of damage, enhanced mobility, and complete environmental sealing. Wearing this armor marks its user as a force to be reckoned with on the battlefield.
The MkII variant of the 英克雷 Advanced Power Armor, featuring improved environmental sealing and enhanced durability for prolonged combat scenarios.
英克雷 Advanced Power Armor MkII
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_Enclave_Hellfire_Power_Armor: The Hellfire Power Armor is an advanced 英克雷 suit designed for extreme environments and frontline assault. Its reinforced plating and advanced heat dispersal systems provide unmatched protection against fire and explosions, making its wearer a walking fortress in the most hazardous conditions.
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_Enclave_X02_Power_Armor.desc: A next-generation 英克雷 power armor, the X-02 offers formidable protection and advanced environmental sealing. It is lighter and more intimidating than earlier models.
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_Enclave_X02_Tesla_Power_Armo: 特斯拉动力装甲是 X-02 的罕见变体，配备电磁屏蔽和能量分散线圈。它提供了卓越的防热和电攻击保护，使其佩戴者在战场上成为令人恐惧的景象。
英克雷 X-02 Tesla Power Armor
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_Enclave_Advanced_Power_Armor: An advanced helmet designed for 英克雷 s老旧iers, offering exceptional protection against ballistic, blunt, and heat damage. Equipped with integrated systems for toxic environment resistance.
英克雷 Advanced Power Armor Helmet
先进动力装甲头盔的 Mk II 变体，具有增强的耐用性和针对危险条件的环境耐受性。
英克雷 Advanced Power Armor Mk II Helmet
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_Enclave_Hellfire_Power_Armor: 适用于地狱火动力装甲的重型头盔，提供无与伦比的保护和抵抗极端环境条件的能力。
英克雷 Hellfire Power Armor Helmet
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_Enclave_X02_Power_Armor_Helm: The standard helmet for the X02 Power Armor, providing balanced protection and advanced features for 英克雷 operatives in the field.
英克雷 X02 Power Armor Helmet
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_Enclave_X02_Tesla_Power_Armo: X02 Tesla Power Armor 的专用头盔，旨在防御基于能量的攻击，同时保持对环境危害的高抵抗力。
英克雷 X02 Tesla Power Armor Helmet
LanguageData.FCP_Bullet_Plasma_Cannon.label: 增压等离子螺栓
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Enclave_Advanced_Multiplas_Rifle: An 英克雷 refinement of the multiplas design, featuring three independently-controlled plasma generation chambers in a triangular array. Each trigger pull unleashes a devastating barrage of three plasma bolts simultaneously. The advanced targeting computer helps maintain accuracy despite the weapon's aggressive spread pattern, making it a feared close-to-medium range weapon.
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Enclave_Assault_Plasma_Rifle.des: The pinnacle of 英克雷 plasma rifle technology. This advanced assault variant features an upgraded plasma generation chamber, enhanced magnetic confinement, and superior targeting systems. Significantly more accurate and reliable than standard plasma rifles, it represents the cutting edge of pre-war American military technology.
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Enclave_Plasma_Cannon.descriptio: A devastating heavy weapon platform developed by the 英克雷 for anti-armor and siege operations. This massive plasma cannon generates and magnetically accelerates supercharged plasma bolts with enough energy to melt through bunker walls and power armor alike. The weapon's immense power comes at the cost of weight, slow cycling time, and the need for enhanced cooling systems. Typically mounted on vehicles or power armor, it can be wielded by sufficiently strong s老旧iers in desperate situations.
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Enclave_Plasma_Cannon.label: 英克雷 Plasma Cannon
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Enclave_Plasma_SMG.description: A compact plasma submachine gun developed by the 英克雷 for close-quarters operations. This weapon sacrifices range and raw power for a dramatically increased rate of fire, making it ideal for room clearing and urban combat. The miniaturized plasma generation system allows for rapid cycling between shots.
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Enclave_Plasma_SMG.label: 英克雷 Plasma SMG
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Enclave_Plasma_SMG.tools.0.label: 紧握
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Enclave_Plasma_SMG.tools.1.label: 桶
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Enclave_SMELE_Plasma_Rifle.descr: The Self-Modulating Energy Loadout Efficiency (SMELE) plasma rifle represents the 英克雷's answer to the need for versatile energy weapons. This sophisticated platform features adaptive power regulation, allowing it to balance between sustained fire and devastating single shots. Its modular design incorporates both offensive and defensive systems, making it the preferred weapon of elite 英克雷 special operations units.
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Enclave_SMELE_Plasma_Rifle.label: 英克雷 SMELE Plasma Rifle
LanguageData.FG_Filth_AshPile.label: 灰堆
LanguageData.FG_Filth_Goop.label: 粘糊糊的
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Flamer_MkI.description: 火焰喷射器 Mk I 是一种早期燃烧武器，可在近中距离喷射燃烧燃料流。它在战前受到军队青睐，用于清理战壕和防御工事，擅长在密闭空间内对付成群的敌人。其粗糙但有效的设计使其成为战场上的恐怖分子。
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Flamer_MkI.label: 火焰喷射器 Mk I
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Flamer_MkI.tools.0.label: 库存
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Flamer_MkI.tools.1.label: 桶
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Flamer_MkI.verbs.0.label: 喷雾燃烧燃料
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Flamer_MkII.description: Mk II 是原始火焰喷射器设计的改进版本，具有更高的燃油效率、更大的射程和更一致的火焰投射。它在战前突击队和战后拾荒者中很受欢迎，代表了战前便携式燃烧武器技术的巅峰。
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Flamer_MkII.label: 火焰喷射器 Mk II
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Flamer_MkII.tools.0.label: 库存
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Flamer_MkII.tools.1.label: 桶
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Flamer_MkII.verbs.0.label: 喷雾燃烧燃料
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Heavy_Incinerator.description: The Heavy Incinerator is a unique and devastating pre-war heavy flamethrower issued to elite 英克雷 Hellfire units. Built with reinforced components and an advanced fuel delivery system, it projects an intense stream of fire over considerable distances. This weapon is both a symbol of terror and a masterpiece of destructive engineering, capable of reducing enemies to ash.
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Heavy_Incinerator.label: 重型焚烧炉
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Heavy_Incinerator.tools.0.label: 库存
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Heavy_Incinerator.tools.1.label: 桶
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Heavy_Incinerator.verbs.0.label: 喷雾燃烧燃料
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Gauss_Minigun.description: 一种毁灭性的重型武器，将电磁加速技术与转机枪式旋转枪管相结合。高斯迷你枪发射连续的电磁推进射弹，能够撕碎盔甲和血肉。其巨大的火力是以相当大的重量和功率需求为代价的。
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Gauss_Minigun.label: 高斯转轮机枪
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Gauss_Minigun.tools.0.label: 桶
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Gauss_Sniper_Rifle.description: 一款精工高斯武器，专为极高的远程精度而设计。这种独特的步枪具有加长的枪管、先进的瞄准光学器件和精致的电磁线圈，可在令传统狙击手羡慕的距离上提供无与伦比的精度。每一次射击都代表了战前科学与致命效率的完美结合。
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Gauss_Sniper_Rifle.label: 高斯狙击步枪
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Gauss_Sniper_Rifle.tools.0.label: 库存
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Gauss_Sniper_Rifle.tools.1.label: 桶
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_M72_A2_Gauss_Rifle.description: M72 高斯步枪的实验原型具有先进的磁线圈配置和增强的电池效率。 M72 A2 代表了战前电磁武器技术的巅峰，与标准同类武器相比，精度更高，装甲穿透力更强。第一次世界大战之前只生产了极少数。
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_M72_A2_Gauss_Rifle.label: M72 A2 高斯步枪
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_M72_A2_Gauss_Rifle.tools.0.label: 库存
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_M72_A2_Gauss_Rifle.tools.1.label: 桶
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_M72_Gauss_Rifle.description: M72 高斯步枪是一款顶级战前武器，利用电磁线圈将金属射弹加速到高超音速。高斯步枪能够轻松击穿大多数装甲，是战前军事创新的证明。其精准度和制动力在废土幸存者中堪称传奇。
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_M72_Gauss_Rifle.label: M72高斯步枪
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_M72_Gauss_Rifle.tools.0.label: 库存
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_M72_Gauss_Rifle.tools.1.label: 桶
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_PPK12_Gauss_Pistol.description: PPK12高斯手枪是德国设计的电磁武器，利用磁感应以极高的速度推动射弹。它紧凑而可靠，以最小的后坐力提供毁灭性的动能，对于那些能够负担得起这种先进技术的人来说，它是一款出色的随身武器。
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_PPK12_Gauss_Pistol.label: PPK12高斯手枪
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_PPK12_Gauss_Pistol.tools.0.label: 紧握
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_PPK12_Gauss_Pistol.tools.1.label: 桶
