LanguageData.FCP_Gun_AER14_Prototype.description: AER14 原型机是 AER 激光步枪系列的实验变体，具有改进的聚焦晶体和先进的能量调节器。它比标准激光步枪具有更高的精度和伤害，但其原型状态使其生产稀有且昂贵。
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_AER14_Prototype.label: AER14原型机
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_AER14_Prototype.tools.0.label: 库存
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_AER14_Prototype.tools.1.label: 桶
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Gatling_Laser.description: A huge and heavy laser weapon reminiscent of Minigun and popular with the 钢铁兄弟会. Its individual shots do little damage, but this is entirely compensated by its extremely high rate of fire. It excels at the same areas as the Minigun, providing suppressing fire over short and medium distances.
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Gatling_Laser.label: 加特林激光
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Gatling_Laser.tools.0.label: 库存
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Gatling_Laser.tools.1.label: 桶
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Gatling_Laser_MkI.description: 这种重型武器是加特林激光机的早期型号，采用旋转枪管设计，可实现持续自动射击。虽然不如后来的型号精致，但它仍然是一种强大的压制武器，能够发射致命的激光火力。
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Gatling_Laser_MkI.label: 加特林激光 Mk I
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Gatling_Laser_MkI.tools.0.label: 库存
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Gatling_Laser_MkI.tools.1.label: 桶
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Laser_Carbine.description: 标准激光步枪的紧凑型缩短版，专为近距离作战和城市作战而设计。激光卡宾枪牺牲了一些射程和功率，以提高机动性和更快地捕获目标，使其在侦察兵和特种部队中很受欢迎。
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Laser_Carbine.label: 激光卡宾枪
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Laser_Carbine.tools.0.label: 库存
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Laser_Carbine.tools.1.label: 桶
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Laser_Pistol.description: The AEP7 laser pistol comes with a generous battery size, tight shot grouping at range, resilience to extended use, and fairly decent damage output, it is a very good choice for a sidearm and is used extensively in this role by the 钢铁兄弟会 and the 英克雷. Like other energy weapons, the laser pistol has the ability to reduce enemies to piles of steaming ash.
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Laser_Pistol.label: 激光手枪
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Laser_Pistol.tools.0.label: 库存
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Laser_Pistol.tools.1.label: 桶
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Laser_RCW.description: 激光快速电容武器是一种模仿冲锋枪的奇怪枪。 RCW 的独特之处在于增加了弹鼓，这赋予了这款武器独特的外观、高射速和名称。由于激光武器的传播范围较高，该武器表现出中等精度，使其可用于击落几乎任何范围内的敌人。
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Laser_RCW.label: 激光RCW
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Laser_RCW.tools.0.label: 库存
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Laser_RCW.tools.1.label: 桶
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Laser_Rifle.description: 作为战前武装部队的主力武器，激光步枪在荒原上已成为一种不寻常的景象，尤其是状态良好的激光步枪。它们发射出一束集中的相干光束，能够对目标物体或目标造成严重伤害。
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Laser_Rifle.label: 激光步枪
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Laser_Rifle.tools.0.label: 库存
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Laser_Rifle.tools.1.label: 桶
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_MF_Hyperbreeder_Alpha.descriptio: 一种先进的实验武器，具有革命性的超级增殖能量电池，能够以前所未有的速度再生弹药。这种独特的手枪可以比传统能量武器持续更长时间的持续射击，尽管每次射击都相对较弱。其未来派设计和卓越的可靠性使其成为珍贵的财产。
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_MF_Hyperbreeder_Alpha.label: MF 超级饲养员阿尔法
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Pew_Pew.description: 一款造型独特的能量手枪，具有独特的蓝色。尽管 Pew Pew 的名字和外观都像玩具，但它使用先进的能量聚焦系统，可以拍摄出令人惊讶的强大镜头。其独特的设计使其不仅成为武器，而且成为话题。
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Pew_Pew.label: 皮尤皮尤
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Pew_Pew.tools.0.label: 紧握
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Pew_Pew.tools.1.label: 桶
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Recharger_Pistol.description: 充电手枪是充电步枪的紧凑型版本，具有微融合增殖器，可以自动补充弹药，无需重新装填。虽然它可以快速发射，但与激光手枪相比，射弹造成的伤害较小。繁殖机产生弹药的速度很慢，这意味着它可以快速发射射弹，但这些射弹之间有相当长的时间。它通常比充电步枪更便宜、更便携。
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Recharger_Pistol.label: 充电手枪
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Recharger_Pistol.tools.0.label: 库存
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Recharger_Pistol.tools.1.label: 桶
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Recharger_Rifle.description: 充电步枪是第一种具有微融合增殖器的能量武器。它会自动补充弹药，无需重新装填。然而，底层技术还不是很复杂。它可以快速射击，但与激光步枪相比，射弹造成的伤害要小得多。效率低下的繁殖机产生弹药的速度很慢，这意味着它可以快速发射射弹，但这些射弹之间有相当长的时间。至少它通常比激光步枪便宜很多。
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Recharger_Rifle.label: 充电步枪
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Recharger_Rifle.tools.0.label: 库存
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Recharger_Rifle.tools.1.label: 桶
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Sprtel_Wood_9700_Unique.descript: 9700 型号是 Sprtel-Wood 制造的民用激光手枪，战前作为家庭防御武器销售。虽然不如军用级能源武器那么强大，但其可靠性和易用性使其受到定居者和贸易商的欢迎。
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Sprtel_Wood_9700_Unique.label: Sprtel-Wood 9700
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Tri_Beam_Laser_Rifle.description: 三光束激光步枪似乎是一种缩短的激光步枪，其尖端有不同的发射器。它可以同时发射三束激光，是霰弹枪的高科技替代品。与不太先进的霰弹枪一样，三光束激光步枪最适合短距离作战。
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Tri_Beam_Laser_Rifle.label: 三光束激光步枪
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Wattz_1000_Laser_Pistol.descript: An 老旧er model laser pistol manufactured by Wattz Electronics before the Great War. The Wattz 1000 uses a simpler focusing lens system than modern designs, resulting in somewhat reduced performance, but its robust construction ensures reliable operation even decades after manufacture.
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Wattz_1000_Laser_Pistol.label: Wattz 1000 激光手枪
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Wattz_2000_Laser_Rifle.descripti: The rifle variant of Wattz Electronics' laser weapon line, the 2000 model features an extended barrel and improved power cell. While using 老旧er technology than modern AER series rifles, the Wattz 2000 remains a capable weapon favored for its durability and ease of maintenance.
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Wattz_2000_Laser_Rifle.label: Wattz 2000 激光步枪
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Glock_86_Plasma_Pistol.descripti: A pre-War German-designed plasma pistol that represents the pinnacle of compact energy weapon engineering. The Glock 86 features revolutionary magnetic field stabilization that dramatically improves accuracy and reduces co老旧own time compared to standard plasma pistols. This exceptionally rare weapon was never mass-produced.
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Glock_86_Plasma_Pistol.label: 格洛克 86 等离子手枪
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Multiplas_Rifle.description: Multiplas Rifle 是一种经过大幅改造的等离子武器，每次射击都会发射三枚等离子射弹。虽然它在近距离具有毁灭性，但在远距离时精度会迅速下降，因此最适合中短程战斗。
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Multiplas_Rifle.label: 多功能步枪
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Multiplas_Rifle.tools.0.label: 库存
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Multiplas_Rifle.tools.1.label: 桶
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_P_94_Plasma_Rifle.description: 实验性等离子步枪原型，配备增强型磁场发生器和先进的等离子遏制系统。与标准等离子步枪相比，P-94 可以发射威力更大、稳定性更高的等离子枪。由于其复杂的维护要求，这种独特的武器从未超越现场测试。
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_P_94_Plasma_Rifle.label: P-94 等离子步枪
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_P_94_Plasma_Rifle.tools.0.label: 库存
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_P_94_Plasma_Rifle.tools.1.label: 桶
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Plasma_Caster.description: 等离子施法器的功能与基于步枪的对应物非常相似。 它最初是作为工业工具开发的，但很快就被缩小规模 虽然它被改装成武器，但仍然很重。与等离子体相比 步枪，它的射击速度更快，威力更大，但精度明显较低。
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Plasma_Caster.label: 等离子施法器
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Plasma_Caster.tools.0.label: 库存
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Plasma_Caster.tools.1.label: 桶
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Plasma_Caster_MkI.description: Plasma Caster 系列的早期原型。虽然缺乏后来型号的改进，Mk I 仍然是一种强大的重型等离子武器，能够提供持续的等离子轰击。其粗糙的磁约束系统使其精确度稍差，但破坏性却丝毫不减。
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Plasma_Caster_MkI.label: 等离子施法者 Mk I
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Plasma_Caster_MkI.tools.0.label: 库存
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Plasma_Caster_MkI.tools.1.label: 桶
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Plasma_Defender.description: 一款紧凑、精致的等离子手枪，专为可靠性和易于维护而设计。与标准等离子手枪相比，等离子卫士具有改进的磁瓶密封装置和更高效的能量转换，使其成为能够维护它的废土人最喜欢的随身武器。
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Plasma_Defender.label: 等离子防御者
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Plasma_Defender.tools.0.label: 紧握
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Plasma_Defender.tools.1.label: 桶
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Plasma_Machine_Gun.description: 等离子机枪（PMG）是一种实验性自动等离子武器，结合了传统机枪的快速射击能力和等离子技术的毁灭性威力。使用革命性的多阴极循环点火系统，它可以维持全自动等离子点火，但代价是显着的重量和功耗。这种独特的重型武器由于极其复杂，在批量生产之前就被放弃了。
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Plasma_Machine_Gun.label: 等离子机枪
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Plasma_Machine_Gun.tools.0.label: 库存
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Plasma_Machine_Gun.tools.1.label: 桶
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Plasma_Pistol.description: 等离子步枪的缩小版。等离子手枪有五个支流 能量弧连接到中央阴极，阴极充当能量点 焦点，或桶。能量向前投射并形成等离子体箍缩；虽然 相当缓慢，夹点携带着高水平的热能和动能， 造成巨大的损害。
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Plasma_Pistol.label: 等离子手枪
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Plasma_Pistol.tools.0.label: 库存
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Plasma_Pistol.tools.1.label: 桶
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Plasma_Rifle.description: 等离子步枪是一种强大的能量武器，可以发射过热的等离子束。它受到先进派系的青睐，它能造成毁灭性的伤害，并且对装甲和非装甲目标都有效，尽管它的射弹比激光慢。
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Plasma_Rifle.label: 等离子步枪
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Plasma_Rifle.tools.0.label: 库存
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Plasma_Rifle.tools.1.label: 桶
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Q35_Matter_Modulator.description: 第一次世界大战前由 REPCONN Aerospace 开发的极其罕见的原型等离子武器。 Q-35 使用实验性物质-能量转换技术来制造异常强大的等离子体射弹，同时降低能耗。其独特的结晶能量室和卓越的性能使其成为废土上最抢手的能量武器之一。
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Q35_Matter_Modulator.label: Q-35 物质调制器
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_YK32_Pulse_Pistol.description: YK32是一种紧凑型电磁脉冲武器，专为近距离反机械战斗而设计。它发射集中电磁脉冲，破坏电子系统和神经植入物，同时造成中等动能伤害。对机械机器人和屏蔽目标特别有效，但对无装甲有机目标的杀伤力不如常规武器。
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_YK32_Pulse_Pistol.label: YK32脉冲手枪
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_YK32_Pulse_Pistol.tools.0.label: 紧握
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_YK32_Pulse_Pistol.tools.1.label: 桶
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_YK42B_Pulse_Rifle.description: YK42B 代表了战前电磁脉冲武器的巅峰之作。这种军用级脉冲步枪发射高强度电磁爆发，能够在中距离内灾难性地破坏机械系统和神经网络。其先进的电容器阵列允许持续的反机械行动，使其在与自动化部队的冲突中发挥无价的作用。该武器对屏蔽目标和电子目标尤其具有破坏性，尽管其对非装甲有机体的杀伤力降低限制了其多功能性。
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_YK42B_Pulse_Rifle.label: YK42B脉冲步枪
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_YK42B_Pulse_Rifle.tools.0.label: 库存
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_YK42B_Pulse_Rifle.tools.1.label: 桶
深受大汗和其他荒地掠夺者青睐的强化皮甲。这款盔甲结合了灵活性和良好的保护，具有金属螺柱和缝在厚皮革中的板。对于那些重视机动性和威胁性外观的人来说，它是理想的选择。
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_Great_Khan_Helmet.descriptio: 大可汗佩戴的部落头盔，装饰有战争油漆、羽毛，有时还有动物头骨。虽然它提供了不错的头部保护，但其主要目的是恐吓敌人并展示战士在部落中的地位。
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_Great_Khan_Helmet.label: 大汗头盔
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_Great_Khan_Simple_Armor.desc: 低级大汗所穿的轻质盔甲。它由回收材料和皮革制成，在提供基本保护的同时保持灵活性。部落图案标志着佩戴者是大汗的成员。
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_Great_Khan_Soldier_Armor.des: Durable armor worn by Great Khan s老旧iers. Built from reinforced leather and scavenged metal plates, this armor provides substantial protection without sacrificing too much mobility. The skull emblems and war paint show this warrior has proven themselves in battle.
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_Great_Khan_Suit_Armor.descri: 精英大汗和高级成员所穿的时尚且具有防护作用的服装。这种独特的盔甲将战前的正装与战略性放置的装甲板相结合，创造出值得尊重的独特外观。它是部落内地位的象征。
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_Great_Khan_Suit_Armor.label: 套装盔甲
LanguageData.FCP_Melee_9_Iron.description: 战前的高尔夫球杆，9 号铁杆。加重的杆头和长杆使挥杆效果惊人。前锋！
LanguageData.FCP_Melee_9_Iron.label: 9 铁
LanguageData.FCP_Melee_9_Iron.tools.0.label: 紧握
LanguageData.FCP_Melee_9_Iron.tools.1.label: 俱乐部头
LanguageData.FCP_Melee_Bat.description: 经典的木制棒球棒，被重新改造为简单但有效的近战武器。虽然不是为战斗而设计的，但有力的挥杆可以折断骨头并威慑攻击者。
LanguageData.FCP_Melee_Bat.label: 棒球棒
LanguageData.FCP_Melee_Bat.tools.0.label: 处理
LanguageData.FCP_Melee_Bat.tools.1.label: 蝙蝠
LanguageData.FCP_Melee_Bat_Aluminum.description: 轻质铝制棒球棒。比木制产品更耐用，并且能够提供更快、更强的挥杆。荒野乱斗者的最爱。
LanguageData.FCP_Melee_Bat_Aluminum.label: 铝棒
LanguageData.FCP_Melee_Bat_Aluminum.tools.0.label: 处理
LanguageData.FCP_Melee_Bat_Aluminum.tools.1.label: 蝙蝠
LanguageData.FCP_Melee_Bat_Saw.description: 一种棒球棒，其头部装有圆锯片。一种残酷而可怕的武器，可以切开肉体和盔甲。
LanguageData.FCP_Melee_Bat_Saw.label: 锯蝙蝠
LanguageData.FCP_Melee_Bat_Saw.tools.0.label: 处理
LanguageData.FCP_Melee_Bat_Saw.tools.1.label: 锯片
LanguageData.FCP_Melee_Bat_Spiked.description: 一根棒球棒，头部有钉子和金属钉。将简单的钝器变成更加凶恶的东西，能够撕裂肉体和折断骨头。
LanguageData.FCP_Melee_Bat_Spiked.label: 尖刺蝙蝠
LanguageData.FCP_Melee_Bat_Spiked.tools.0.label: 处理
LanguageData.FCP_Melee_Bat_Spiked.tools.1.label: 尖刺头
LanguageData.FCP_Melee_Board_Spiked.description: 一块简单的木板，上面钉有钉子。这种临时武器虽然简陋但有效，在袭击者和绝望的幸存者中很常见。
LanguageData.FCP_Melee_Board_Spiked.label: 尖刺板
LanguageData.FCP_Melee_Board_Spiked.tools.0.label: 木板
LanguageData.FCP_Melee_Board_Spiked.tools.1.label: 指甲
LanguageData.FCP_Melee_Bumper_Sword.description: A massive blade forged from a pre-war car bumper. Heavy and unwieldy, but capable of cleaving through enemies with tremendous force. A favorite of 超级变种人 and other hulking wastelanders.
LanguageData.FCP_Melee_Bumper_Sword.label: 碰碰剑
LanguageData.FCP_Melee_Bumper_Sword.tools.0.label: 处理
LanguageData.FCP_Melee_Bumper_Sword.tools.1.label: 刀刃
LanguageData.FCP_Melee_Chainsaw.description: 战前的电锯被重新用于战斗。 The roaring engine and spinning chain make for a terrifying and deadly weapon, capable of tearing through flesh and light armor.
LanguageData.FCP_Melee_Chainsaw.label: 电锯
LanguageData.FCP_Melee_Chainsaw.tools.0.label: 处理
LanguageData.FCP_Melee_Chainsaw.tools.1.label: 链
LanguageData.FCP_Melee_Meat_Cleaver.description: 专为切肉和骨头而设计的重型屠宰刀。在荒地中，它同样可以对付人类目标。
LanguageData.FCP_Melee_Meat_Cleaver.label: 切肉刀
LanguageData.FCP_Melee_Meat_Cleaver.tools.0.label: 处理
LanguageData.FCP_Melee_Meat_Cleaver.tools.1.label: 刀刃
LanguageData.FCP_Melee_Mr_Handy_Buzz_Blade.descriptio: 从 Mr. Handy 机器人中回收的圆锯片，经过修改后可手持使用。旋转的刀片几乎可以轻松切开任何东西。
LanguageData.FCP_Melee_Mr_Handy_Buzz_Blade.label: 方便的嗡嗡声刀片先生
LanguageData.FCP_Melee_Pool_Cue.description: A long wooden pool cue.虽然与专用武器相比脆弱，但其射程和快速刺击的能力使其在紧要关头很有用。
LanguageData.FCP_Melee_Pool_Cue.label: 台球杆
LanguageData.FCP_Melee_Pool_Cue.tools.0.label: 提示
LanguageData.FCP_Melee_Pool_Cue.tools.1.label: 轴
LanguageData.FCP_Melee_Rebar_Club.description: A heavy length of construction rebar wrapped with tape for a grip. Simple, brutal, and readily available in the 废墟s of the 老旧 world.
LanguageData.FCP_Melee_Rebar_Club.label: 钢筋俱乐部
LanguageData.FCP_Melee_Rebar_Club.tools.0.label: 处理
LanguageData.FCP_Melee_Rebar_Club.tools.1.label: 头
LanguageData.FCP_Melee_Ripper.description: A compact handheld chainsaw designed by the U.S. military for close-quarters combat. The s商场, fast-spinning chain can rip through flesh and armor with horrifying efficiency.
LanguageData.FCP_Melee_Ripper.label: 开膛手
LanguageData.FCP_Melee_Ripper.tools.0.label: 处理
LanguageData.FCP_Melee_Ripper.tools.1.label: 链
LanguageData.FCP_Melee_Rolling_Pin.description: 通常用于烘焙的木制擀面杖。在荒原里，连厨具都可以成为武器。轻且快，即使不是特别致命。
LanguageData.FCP_Melee_Rolling_Pin.label: 擀面杖
LanguageData.FCP_Melee_Rolling_Pin.tools.0.label: 处理
LanguageData.FCP_Melee_Rolling_Pin.tools.1.label: 滚筒
LanguageData.FCP_Melee_Scrap_Axe.description: 由废金属和木柄制成的简易斧头。粗糙但对于砍木头和劈开头骨都很有效。
LanguageData.FCP_Melee_Scrap_Axe.label: 废斧头
LanguageData.FCP_Melee_Scrap_Axe.tools.0.label: 处理
LanguageData.FCP_Melee_Scrap_Axe.tools.1.label: 边缘
LanguageData.FCP_Melee_Scrap_Machete.description: 用废金属制成的粗糙砍刀。刀片很粗糙，但足够锋利，可以切开血肉和植物。
LanguageData.FCP_Melee_Scrap_Machete.label: 废弯刀
LanguageData.FCP_Melee_Scrap_Machete.tools.0.label: 处理
LanguageData.FCP_Melee_Scrap_Machete.tools.1.label: 刀刃
LanguageData.FCP_Melee_Scrap_Pipe.description: A length of metal pipe scavenged from 老旧 plumbing or industrial 废墟s. Heavy and durable, making for a reliable bludgeoning weapon.
LanguageData.FCP_Melee_Scrap_Pipe.label: 废管
LanguageData.FCP_Melee_Scrap_Pipe.tools.0.label: 管端
LanguageData.FCP_Melee_Scrap_Pipe.tools.1.label: 管道
LanguageData.FCP_Melee_Shishkebab.description: 一种传奇的荒地武器 - 由摩托车油箱、指示灯和割草机刀片制成的临时火焰剑。燃料供给的火焰覆盖在刀片上，使其能够同时切割和燃烧敌人。
LanguageData.FCP_Melee_Shishkebab.label: 什什凯巴布
LanguageData.FCP_Melee_Shishkebab.tools.0.label: 处理
LanguageData.FCP_Melee_Shishkebab.tools.1.label: 火焰之刃
LanguageData.FCP_Melee_Sledgehammer.description: 专为拆除工作而设计的重型大锤。挥动速度缓慢，但会产生毁灭性的打击，可以压碎骨头，使盔甲凹陷。
LanguageData.FCP_Melee_Sledgehammer.label: 大锤
LanguageData.FCP_Melee_Sledgehammer.tools.0.label: 处理
LanguageData.FCP_Melee_Sledgehammer.tools.1.label: 头
LanguageData.FCP_Melee_Super_Sledge.description: 采用动能存储技术增强的战前大型军用大锤。每一次挥击都会释放出巨大的力量，能够将敌人击飞并粉碎动力装甲。真正的废土传奇。
LanguageData.FCP_Melee_Super_Sledge.label: 超级雪橇
LanguageData.FCP_Melee_Super_Sledge.tools.0.label: 处理
LanguageData.FCP_Melee_Super_Sledge.tools.1.label: 动力头
LanguageData.FCP_Shuttle_NCR_Vertibird.description: Vertibird 是一系列垂直起降 (VTOL) 飞机的名称。这些多用途倾转旋翼机由美国军方开发，并迅速成为主要的武装直升机和运输机。该系统现在由新加利福尼亚共和国使用。
LanguageData.FCP_Shuttle_NCR_Vertibird.label: NCR 飞鸟
LanguageData.FCP_Shuttle_NCR_VertibirdIncoming.label: NCR 飞鸟（传入）
LanguageData.FCP_Shuttle_NCR_VertibirdLeaving.label: NCR vertibird（离开）
LanguageData.FCP_Animal_California_Grizzly.descriptio: 这是一只来自加利福尼亚山区的大型双头熊，它是 NCR 及其军队的思想和政治象征。这种巨大的野兽应该受到尊重和荣誉对待。
LanguageData.FCP_Animal_California_Grizzly.label: 加州灰熊队
LanguageData.FCP_Animal_NCR_Guard_Dog.description: Some dogs have been domesticated, even charged with guarding its owner and all thier property this animal will do so to the best of its ability. While others have been specially bred to be a true battle buddy for the NCR. Tasked with defending troops from harm in the form of 危险 chems, explosives and enemy combatants themselves.
LanguageData.FCP_Animal_NCR_Guard_Dog.label: NCR看门狗
LanguageData.FCP_NCR_Building_Boulder_City_Memorial.d: 公元2277年左右，新加利福尼亚共和国在第一次胡佛水坝战役中对凯撒军团发起决定性攻击，将敌人的大部分引诱到大部分装满烈性炸药的博尔德城并引爆，摧毁了凯撒军团的进攻，但牺牲了许多无法及时逃脱的士兵。战斗结束后，新加州共和国建立了这座纪念碑，以纪念当天丧生的 107 名游骑兵和军人。
LanguageData.FCP_Currency_NCR_Dollar.description: 新加州共和国政府制作和分发的纸币作为更换上限的手段。虽然其价值不如上限，但它仍然是一种货币手段，应该按其价值进行评估。
LanguageData.FCP_Currency_NCR_Dollar.label: NCR 美元
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_Ranger_Ricks_Armor.descripti: 由战斗铠甲的胸甲组成的战斗背心。它经常被护林员佩戴并提供强大的保护。它最大的缺点是它只覆盖躯干，而使附肢不受保护。该套装似乎是定制的，带有额外的衬垫，并且胸件上有耐热涂层。您还可以辨认出刮在颈饰上的粉丝名称以及单位名称所在的商场y。 《游侠瑞克》
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_Ranger_Ricks_Armor.label: 游侠里克斯的盔甲
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_Ranger_Ricks_Duster.descript: 护林员经常佩戴的掸子。它的主要用途是保护佩戴者免受莫哈韦沙漠的阳光和高温的影响，但它的厚度足以在交火中提供额外的保护。这个看起来比大多数都粗糙一点，因为看过很多动作。颜色也与NCR退伍军人不同，它有更深的棕色。胸前还别着沙漠游骑兵的徽章。一个过去时代的遗迹。有人在掸子内侧匆匆写下了“瑞克”。
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_Ranger_Ricks_Duster.label: 游侠里克斯的除尘器
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_Ranger_Ricks_Helmet.descript: NCR 游骑兵佩戴的封闭式军用头盔，内置低光光学器件和防毒面具。与士兵头盔相比，它提供了更好的保护，但数量却少得多。这个版本似乎添加了增强的低可见光光学器件以及油漆工作。标准 NCR 物品标签上写有一个名字“Rick”，头盔正面则画有“FORGIVE ME MASHED”字样。让你想知道这个捣碎的人发生了什么......
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_Ranger_Ricks_Helmet.label: 游侠里克斯的头盔
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_Ranger_Ricks_Uniform.descrip: 由皮革等坚韧材料制成的一套衣服。看起来这一套比标准制服更坚固、更坚韧。标准的裤子也被一条破旧的蓝色牛仔裤所取代，衬衫也被染色了。 Rick 的名字也被潦草地写在球衣内侧的标准 NCR 物品标签上。
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_Ranger_Ricks_Uniform.label: 游侠里克斯的制服
LanguageData.FCP_Accessories_NCR_Bandoleer.descriptio: NCR 士兵经常佩戴的弹带。它用于存放弹药以及个人饰品或护身符。
LanguageData.FCP_Accessories_NCR_Bandoleer.label: 士兵弹带
LanguageData.FCP_Accessories_NCR_Mantle.description: 由厚重织物制成的简单斗篷。 NCR 官员经常将其绑在肩上。它不能提供太多保护，但绝缘效果相当好。
LanguageData.FCP_Accessories_NCR_Mantle.label: 士兵斗篷
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_NCR_Ambassador_Dress.descrip: 新加州共和国大使经常穿着的时尚连衣裙。虽然它几乎没有提供任何实际的 保护，它可以增强佩戴者在谈判中的信心。
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_NCR_Ambassador_Dress.label: NCR 大使连衣裙
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_NCR_Ambassador_Suit.descript: 新加州共和国大使经常穿着的时尚套装。虽然它几乎没有提供任何实际保护，但它可以增强佩戴者在谈判过程中的信心。
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_NCR_Ambassador_Suit.label: NCR 大使套装
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_NCR_Engineer_Jumpsuit.descri: 卡其色连身裤，附有许多口袋和小袋。它通常由与 NCR 相关的工程师和其他技术人员佩戴。它可以用来携带一些备用工具，但在交火时几乎无法提供保护。
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_NCR_Engineer_Jumpsuit.label: NCR 工程师连身裤
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_NCR_Generals_Uniform.descrip: 为共和国军队最高级别军官——将军们保留的制服。它大量装饰着与 NCR 相关的图案，例如双头熊。然而，它并没有提供太多保护，因为军队的将军很少在前线服役。
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_NCR_Generals_Uniform.label: NCR 通用制服
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_NCR_Presidents_Suit.descript: 新加州共和国总统和类似的高级政府官员经常穿着的时尚西装。虽然它几乎没有提供任何实际保护，但它赋予佩戴者一种权威的气息。
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_NCR_Presidents_Suit.label: NCR 总统套装
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_NCR_Ranger_Casual.descriptio: An outfit often worn by the rangers off-duty or underneath additional armour pieces. It�s reminiscent of the outfits worn by the cowboys of 老旧. It�s quite rugged and offers good protection against the scorching sun but should not be the only protection a rangers has once the bullets start flying.
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_NCR_Ranger_Casual.label: NCR 游骑兵休闲装
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_NCR_Ranger_Patrol_Armor.desc: 一套棕色战斗装甲，在 NCR 手工制作，NCR 游骑兵最常穿着。由于它是战斗装甲，因此很坚固并且可以很好地防止损坏，但重量相当重。
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_NCR_Ranger_Red_Scarf.descrip: 沙漠护林员穿的坚固的衣服。这件特别的衣服配有一条红领巾。与大多数护林员服装一样，它可以很好地隔热。
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_NCR_Ranger_Red_Scarf.label: NCR 游侠红领巾套装
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_NCR_Ranger_Vest.description: NCR 流浪者队穿着的坚固背心。它提供了良好的防风雨保护，非常适合在恶劣环境下进行长时间巡逻和侦察任务。
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_NCR_Ranger_Vest.label: NCR 游骑兵背心套装
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_NCR_Ranger_Veteran_Armor.des: 由战斗盔甲的胸甲组成的战斗背心。它经常被护林员佩戴并提供强大的保护。它最大的缺点是它只覆盖躯干，而使附肢不受保护。
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_NCR_Ranger_Veteran_Duster.de: 护林员经常佩戴的掸子。它的主要用途是保护佩戴者免受莫哈韦沙漠的阳光和高温的影响，但它的厚度足以在交火中提供额外的保护。
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_NCR_Ranger_Veteran_Duster.la: NCR 老兵游骑兵除尘器
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_NCR_Ranger_Veteran_Uniform.d: 由皮革等坚韧材料制成的一套衣服。它经常被游骑兵穿在盔甲下面，并且隔热效果特别好。
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_NCR_Salvaged_Power_Armor.des: A suit of T-45d power armor, captured by the NCR during the NCR-Brotherhood war. Technicians stripped out the servomotors and replaced the rad scrubbers with a custom air conditioning module, allowing it to be used by s老旧iers without the need of specialised training. This process, however, makes the armor much less effective. Despite that it still is, essentially, power armor and offers superior protection at the cost of enormous weight. It's usually only worn by the NCR heavy troopers.
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_NCR_Scout_Recon_Armor.descri: NCR 狙击手小队和侦察队通常穿着的盔甲。它的外观与其他 NCR 装甲非常相似，但出于伪装目的而颜色更深。它提供了良好的保护，但与大多数 NCR 装甲一样，相当重。
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_NCR_Scout_Recon_Armor.label: NCR 侦察突击装甲
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_NCR_Trooper_Armor.descriptio: NCR 军队普通士兵的标准装甲。它由卡其色野战夹克和马裤、装甲胸甲和棕色作战靴组成。它可以很好地保护佩戴者，但很重。
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_NCR_Trooper_Armor.label: NCR 士兵装甲
该装甲本质上是常规 NCR 武装部队制服，由卡其色野战夹克和马裤、装甲胸甲和棕色作战靴组成，但具有用于携带额外弹药和其他军事装备的弹带。
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_NCR_Trooper_Fatigues.descrip: 这件轻便的衣服由标准的卡其色野战夹克和马裤组成，但缺少其他 NCR 装甲运动中的装甲胸甲。因此，它更轻，但提供的保护效果较差。
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_NCR_Trooper_Fatigues.label: NCR 士兵疲劳
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_NCR_Trooper_Mantle_Armor.des: NCR 军队的中士和下士经常穿着这套盔甲。除了标准的卡其色野战夹克和马裤以及装甲胸甲外，这件盔甲还配有包裹在肩膀上的迷彩布。它提供了不错的保护，但相当重。
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_NCR_Trooper_MP_Uniform.descr: 一种制服，将穿着者标记为 NCR 宪兵成员。它与其他 NCR 制服非常相似，但散发着宪兵的权威。
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_NCR_Trooper_MP_Uniform.label: NCR MP 制服
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_NCR_Trooper_Vest.description: NCR 士兵经常穿的背心。它由加固胸甲和装甲肩甲组成。虽然它提供了相当多的额外保护，但它只覆盖了躯干和肩膀，使下半身部分和头部不受保护。
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_NCR_Trooper_Vest.label: NCR 士兵背心
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_NCRCF_Guard_Vest.description: A padded vest often worn by the guards of the NCRCF. While less protective than full-blown armour, it guards its wearer quite well against s商场 firearms.
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_NCRCF_Guard_Vest.label: NCRCF 防护背心
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_NCRCF_Inmate_Uniform.descrip: 为 NCRCF 的囚犯发放了一件简单的蓝色衬衫和裤子。这些是在国家首都区大量廉价生产的简单衣服。因此，他们在战斗中几乎没有提供任何保护，但可以很好地隔离炎热，因为 NCR 喜欢使用囚犯作为道路工人。
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_NCRCF_Inmate_Uniform.label: NCRCF 囚犯制服
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_NCRCF_Over_Shirt.description: NCRCF 囚犯穿的简单外套。它的目的是识别囚犯本身，并不能提供针对任何类型威胁的太多保护。尽管如此，火药帮仍然穿着这些，可能是因为缺乏替代服装。
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_NCRCF_Over_Shirt.label: NCRCF 衬衫外套
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_NCR_Beret.description: NCR 陆军军官通常佩戴的简单绿色贝雷帽。它主要用作等级徽章，但也能提供一定程度的防风雨保护。
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_NCR_Beret.label: NCR贝雷帽
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_NCR_Beret_1st_Recon.descript: 著名的第一侦察营成员所佩戴的红色贝雷帽。他们被誉为共和国可以召集的最优秀的狙击手。他们的座右铭是：“你永远不会看到的最后一件事。”
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_NCR_Beret_1st_Recon.label: NCR 第一侦察贝雷帽
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_NCR_Face_Wrap_Goggles_Helmet: 带有护目镜和附有一块织物的士兵头盔。这种织物可以包裹在脸上，以保护佩戴者免受莫哈韦地区常见的沙尘暴的侵害。
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_NCR_Face_Wrap_Helmet.descrip: 带有护目镜和附有一块织物的士兵头盔。这种织物可以包裹在脸上，以保护佩戴者免受莫哈韦地区常见的沙尘暴的侵害。
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_NCR_Face_Wrap_Helmet.label: 裹面士兵头盔
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_NCR_General_Cap.description: 帽子上装饰着新加州共和国的纹章动物双头熊。它是共和国将军等级的象征，通常是为他们保留的。
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_NCR_General_Cap.label: NCR 一般上限
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_NCR_Goggles_Helmet.descripti: A cheap, mass-produced helmet worn by the NCR’s s老旧iers. This version comes with a pair of goggles attached which provide additional, albeit modest, protection for the wearer’s eyes.
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_NCR_Goggles_Helmet.label: 护目镜 士兵头盔
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_NCR_MP_Helmet.description: NCR 宪兵通常佩戴的带护目镜的头盔。就像制服本身一样，它赋予穿着者一种权威的光环。
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_NCR_MP_Helmet.label: MP 士兵头盔
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_NCR_Ranger_Hat_Brown.descrip: NCR 护林员喜爱的棕色牛仔帽。它有助于保护佩戴者免受荒地酷热的侵害。
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_NCR_Ranger_Hat_Brown.label: NCR 棕色游骑兵帽
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_NCR_Ranger_Hat_Grey.descript: NCR 护林员喜爱的灰色牛仔帽。它有助于保护佩戴者免受荒地酷热的侵害。
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_NCR_Ranger_Hat_Grey.label: NCR 灰色游骑兵帽
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_NCR_Ranger_Hat_Patrol.descri: 一顶简单的牛仔帽，深受沙漠护林员的青睐，尤其是在莫哈韦沙漠巡逻的护林员。它有助于保护佩戴者免受荒地酷热的侵害。
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_NCR_Ranger_Hat_Patrol.label: NCR 巡逻队员帽子
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_NCR_Ranger_Hat_Tan.descripti: NCR 护林员喜爱的棕褐色牛仔帽。它有助于保护佩戴者免受荒地酷热的侵害。
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_NCR_Ranger_Hat_Tan.label: NCR 棕褐色游骑兵帽子
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_NCR_Salvaged_Power_Armor_Hel: T-45 动力装甲头盔通常与 NCR 回收的动力装甲搭配佩戴。尽管它具有回收性质，但它提供了出色的保护，并且与装甲本身相比，与常规动力装甲相比没有重大缺点。
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_NCR_Trooper_Helmet.descripti: NCR武装部队的标准头盔。它在 NCR 大规模生产，易于制造和维护，但仅提供有限的保护。
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_NCR_Trooper_Helmet.label: 士兵头盔
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_NCR_Veteran_Ranger_Helmet.de: NCR 游骑兵佩戴的封闭式军用头盔，内置低光光学器件和防毒面具。与士兵头盔相比，它提供了更好的保护，但数量却少得多。
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_NCRCF_Guard_Helmet.descripti: NCRCF 警卫曾经佩戴的防暴头盔。与他们装备的许多其他部件一样，它已被火药帮逮捕。它提供了良好的保护，尤其是防止钝器损坏。
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_NCRCF_Guard_Helmet.label: NCRCF 防护头盔
LanguageData.FCP_Item_NCR_Food_Crate.description: 来自新加州共和国的一箱食物，标准发行。
LanguageData.FCP_Item_NCR_Food_Crate.label: NCR 食品供应箱
LanguageData.FCP_Item_NCR_Ranger_Weapon_Crate.descrip: 一箱来自新加州共和国的武器，标准配置。
LanguageData.FCP_Item_NCR_Ranger_Weapon_Crate.label: NCR 武器补给箱
LanguageData.FCP_Item_NCR_Standard_Uniform_Crate.desc: 一箱来自新加州共和国的制服，标准版。
LanguageData.FCP_Item_NCR_Standard_Weapon_Crate.descr: 一箱来自新加州共和国的武器，标准配置。
LanguageData.FCP_Item_NCR_Standard_Weapon_Crate.label: NCR 武器补给箱
LanguageData.FCP_Item_NCR_Uniform_Ranger_Crate.descri: 一箱来自新加州共和国的制服，标准版。
LanguageData.FCP_Item_NCR_Uniform_Ranger_Crate.label: NCR 游骑兵制服补给箱
LanguageData.FCP_Item_NCR_Uniform_Ranger_Patrol_Armor: 一箱来自新加州共和国的制服，标准版。
LanguageData.FCP_Item_NCR_Uniform_Ranger_Veteran_Armo: 一箱来自新加州共和国的制服，标准版。
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Anti_Material_Rifle.description: 反器材步枪是一种大口径栓动精确步枪，最初用于对抗军事装备。当然，它可以并且已经被用来对付活体目标。荒原中流通的反器材步枪相对较少，大部分掌握在较大派系的精锐部队或者高端雇佣兵手中。作为一把纯粹的狙击步枪，它非常笨重，无法在近战中有效使用。然而，在长距离上，它的准确性和威力是无与伦比的，对于经验丰富的射手来说，它是一种真正可怕的武器。
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Anti_Material_Rifle.label: 反器材步枪
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_NCR_Hunting_Rifle.description: 一款威力强大的栓动步枪，配有铁瞄准器，用于狩猎大型动物。它耐用、精准且易于使用和维护，因此不仅是猎人的热门选择，也是 NCR、军团和其他团体中许多狙击手的热门选择。这种特殊的设计为 NCR 侦察狙击手所夸耀，其特征是二头熊徽章。
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_NCR_Hunting_Rifle.label: NCR 标准狩猎步枪
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_NCR_Hunting_Rifle.tools.0.label: 库存
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_NCR_Hunting_Rifle.tools.1.label: 桶
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Ranger_Sequoia.description: 一把稀有的大口径双动左轮手枪，在服役 20 年后赠送给 NCR 游骑兵。这是一款制作精美的武器，并饰有 NCR 符号和引言。然而，这绝不只是为了展示。事实上，它是整个废土上最强大的手枪之一，也是共和国枪匠技艺的证明。
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Ranger_Sequoia.label: 游侠红杉
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Ranger_Sequoia.tools.0.label: 紧握
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Ranger_Sequoia.tools.1.label: 桶
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Service_Rifle.description: 用于野战或城市作战的通用气动突击步枪。它具有良好的射程、不错的功率和良好的精度。
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Service_Rifle.label: 服务步枪
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Service_Rifle.tools.0.label: 库存
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Service_Rifle.tools.1.label: 桶
LanguageData.FCP_Nuka_Fridge.description: A specialized c老旧 fermentation cabinet used by Nuka-Cola bottling teams to create the Ice C老旧 variant. Works like a fermenting barrel but maintains cooler temperatures for a crisper product.
LanguageData.FCP_Nuka_Fridge.label: 核子可乐冰箱
LanguageData.FCP_Nuka_Cola.description: 标志性瓶子中的标准核子可乐。独特的成分混合物提供清爽和温和的兴奋效果。
LanguageData.FCP_Nuka_Cola.label: 核子可乐瓶
LanguageData.FCP_Nuka_Cola_Can.description: 核子可乐装在方便的铝罐中。与瓶装版本相同的美味和能量提升，但更容易堆叠和运输。
LanguageData.FCP_Nuka_Cola_Can.label: 核子可乐罐
LanguageData.FCP_Nuka_Cola_Cherry.description: 核子可乐的樱桃味变种。添加的水果调味剂除了具有标志性的能量提升作用外，还具有轻微的健康益处。战前特别受欢迎。
LanguageData.FCP_Nuka_Cola_Cherry.label: 核子可乐樱桃
LanguageData.FCP_Nuka_Cola_Classic.description: The standard Nuka-Cola that took the world by storm before the war. This sweet, carbonated beverage provides a quick energy boost and a s商场 amount of joy. The distinctive rocket-shaped bottle is instantly recognizable.
LanguageData.FCP_Nuka_Cola_Classic.label: 核子可乐
LanguageData.FCP_Nuka_Cola_Cranberry.description: 酸果蔓口味的核子可乐变体。浆果味平衡了甜味，带来令人愉快的微酸口感，这在假日营销活动中很受青睐。
LanguageData.FCP_Nuka_Cola_Cranberry.label: 核子蔓越莓
LanguageData.FCP_Nuka_Cola_Dark.description: 朗姆酒口味的酒精型核子可乐变体。将核子可乐与酒精的刺激作用相结合，产生独特但潜在危险的作用。深受喜欢冒险的饮酒者的欢迎。
LanguageData.FCP_Nuka_Cola_Dark.label: 核核暗
LanguageData.FCP_Nuka_Cola_Grape.description: 葡萄味核子可乐，具有独特的紫色色调。葡萄调味剂增加了甜味，同时保持了标准核子可乐的活力特性。
LanguageData.FCP_Nuka_Cola_Grape.label: 核子可乐葡萄
LanguageData.FCP_Nuka_Cola_Ice_Cold.description: A chilled variant of Nuka-Cola. C老旧, crisp, and refreshing — a pre-war marketing hit. Said to be made by a special c老旧-fermentation process that gives it a sharper fizz and a brisk, invigorating kick.
LanguageData.FCP_Nuka_Cola_Ice_Cold.label: nuka-cola (ice c老旧)
LanguageData.FCP_Nuka_Cola_Orange.description: 带有柑橘味的橙味核子可乐。橙子香料中的维生素含量除了具有提神作用外，还对免疫系统有轻微的好处。
LanguageData.FCP_Nuka_Cola_Orange.label: 橙子核子可乐
LanguageData.FCP_Nuka_Cola_Quantum.description: 稀有而强效的量子核子可乐，具有温和放射性同位素发出的蓝色光芒。提供大量能量，但存在潜在的健康风险。因其极端的效果而备受追捧。
LanguageData.FCP_Nuka_Cola_Quantum.label: 核子可乐量子
LanguageData.FCP_Nuka_Cola_Quartz.description: 一种罕见的沙漠地区变种，具有独特的透明外观和增强的配方。在恶劣条件下提供卓越的清爽和能量。
LanguageData.FCP_Nuka_Cola_Quartz.label: 核子可乐石英
LanguageData.FCP_Nuka_Cola_Rum.description: 核子可乐的烈性朗姆酒变种，酒精含量更高。更少的碳化，更多的冲击力。提供显着的中毒效果并具有轻微的兴奋作用。
LanguageData.FCP_Nuka_Cola_Rum.label: 努卡朗姆酒
LanguageData.FCP_Nuka_Cola_Twist.description: 核子可乐的柑橘味变种，带有明亮的柠檬酸橙味。因其浓郁的味道和略高的清爽感而广受欢迎。
LanguageData.FCP_Nuka_Cola_Twist.label: 核子扭曲
LanguageData.FCP_Nuka_Cola_Victory.description: 庆祝军事胜利的高级战前变体。添加额外的兴奋剂并增强口感。因其卓越的效果而售价高昂。
LanguageData.FCP_Nuka_Cola_Victory.label: 核子可乐胜利
LanguageData.FCP_Nuka_Cola_Wild.description: 一种野生浆果味的核子可乐，具有积极的营销活动。异国情调的水果混合物提供了增强的味道和坚实的能量提升。
LanguageData.FCP_Nuka_Cola_Wild.label: 野生核子可乐
LanguageData.FCP_Nukashine.description: 一种以核子可乐为基础制成的强力自制酒精混合物。它极其有效且难以预测，会导致记忆丧失和昏厥。只有绝望或鲁莽的人才会经常食用这种东西。
LanguageData.FCP_Nukashine.label: 核子
LanguageData.FCP_Currency_PRC_Yuan.description: 战前的中国货币，由中华人民共和国发行。这些鲜红的钞票上印有毛主席的肖像和各种共产主义自豪感的象征。尽管自第一次世界大战以来已经过去了几个世纪，但在受中国文化影响的地区以及处理前中华人民共和国遗迹的商人中，人民币纸币仍然是公认的交换媒介。
LanguageData.FCP_Currency_PRC_Yuan.label: 人民币
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_PRC_Jumpsuit.description: A practical crimson and g老旧 jumpsuit worn by s老旧iers and low-ranking military personnel of the People's Liberation Army. The bright red fabric bears the iconic yellow star, symbolizing loyalty to the state. While offering minimal protection, it's designed for comfort during long duty shifts and provides basic insulation against the elements.
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_PRC_Jumpsuit.label: 中国陆军连衣裤
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_PRC_Jumpsuit_General.descrip: 标准中国陆军连身裤的军官变体，具有额外的装饰元素、肩板和强化面料。这款制服由中国人民解放军军官和高级官员穿着，在保持标准版实用设计的同时，赢得了尊重和权威。额外的装饰和奖牌增强了佩戴者的信心和谈判风度。
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_PRC_Jumpsuit_General.label: 中国陆军将领连衣裤
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_PRC_Jumpsuit_Winter.descript: A heavily insulated variant of the standard Chinese army jumpsuit, designed for operations in harsh winter conditions. This padded crimson uniform features a quilted construction with synthetic insulation, fur-lined collar, and reinforced seams. Originally developed for Chinese troops stationed in the frozen northern territories, it provides excellent protection against extreme c老旧 while maintaining the distinctive red and g老旧 color scheme of the People's Republic.
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_PRC_Jumpsuit_Winter.label: 中国陆军冬季连衣裤
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_PRC_Stealth_Suit.description: 这款合身的隐形服是中国军事技术的尖端产品，采用了先进的光弯曲技术和隔音材料。该套装由中国人民解放军为秘密行动而开发，采用灵活的聚合物结构和集成电路，可提供主动伪装功能。其轻量化设计和机动性增强使其成为渗透、侦察和暗杀任务的理想选择。该套装的标志性深红色和黑色配色方案在激活时可以转变以与周围环境融为一体。
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_PRC_Stealth_Suit.label: 中国隐形服
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_PRC_Submariner.description: A specialized uniform worn by submariners of the People's Liberation Army Navy. This practical ensemble features water-resistant fabrics, reinforced stitching, and multiple sealed pockets designed to protect essential equipment in damp, confined submarine environments. The dark navy and crimson design includes reflective strips for emergency visibility and a high collar for protection against c老旧 ocean winds. While not a full diving suit, it provides basic environmental protection and is valued by sailors, dock workers, and naval personnel.
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_PRC_Submariner.label: 中国潜艇兵制服
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_PRC_Army_Cap.description: A simple red cap bearing the g老旧en star emblem of the People's Republic of China. This practical headwear is standard issue for s老旧iers and low-ranking military personnel of the People's Liberation Army. The bright red fabric and prominent star design display allegiance to the state while providing basic protection from sun and light rain.
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_PRC_Army_Cap.label: 中国军帽
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_PRC_Naval_Cap.description: A naval service cap worn by submariners and sailors of the People's Liberation Army Navy. This water-resistant cap features the red star emblem and provides protection against ocean spray and harsh weather conditions.深海军蓝色搭配红色点缀，一眼就能认出属于中国海军。
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_PRC_Naval_Cap.label: 中国海军帽
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_PRC_Officer_Cap.description: A peaked service cap bearing the g老旧en star emblem of the People's Republic of China. This formal headwear is worn by officers and high-ranking officials of the Chinese military. The rigid design and prominent insignia command respect and denote authority, making it a symbol of leadership within the ranks.
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_PRC_Officer_Cap.label: 中国军官帽
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_PRC_Stealth_Helmet.descripti: 融合中国隐形技术的先进战术头盔。这款时尚头盔配有加固面罩、内置循环呼吸器和传感器阵列。气密密封设计可防止环境危害，并在与兼容装甲一起佩戴时可与隐形野战系统连接。
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_PRC_Stealth_Helmet.label: 中国隐形头盔
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_PRC_Ushanka.description: A fur-lined winter cap featuring the iconic red star of the People's Republic of China. This warm ushanka is standard issue for Chinese military personnel operating in c老旧 climates. The ear flaps provide excellent protection against frostbite, while the red exterior proudly displays allegiance to the state.
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_PRC_Ushanka.label: 中国乌尚卡
LanguageData.FCP_Raw_Broc_Flower.description: 从西兰花花植物中采收的药用花卉。用于治疗粉。
LanguageData.FCP_Raw_Broc_Flower.label: 西兰花花
LanguageData.FCP_Raw_Buffalo_Gourd.description: 从水牛葫芦植物中收获的种子和果肉。紧要关头可以吃。
LanguageData.FCP_Raw_Buffalo_Gourd.label: 水葫芦
LanguageData.FCP_Raw_Carrot.description: 一种从胡萝卜植物中收获的甜味、营养丰富的根类蔬菜。荒地里的主食。
LanguageData.FCP_Raw_Carrot.label: 胡萝卜
LanguageData.FCP_Raw_Carrot_Flower.description: 从野胡萝卜植物中采摘的精致花朵。用于繁殖和作为一种罕见的享受。
LanguageData.FCP_Raw_Carrot_Flower.label: 胡萝卜花
LanguageData.FCP_Raw_Cranberry.description: 从蔓越莓植物中收获的酸红色浆果。用于蜜饯和幸存者餐食。
LanguageData.FCP_Raw_Cranberry.label: 蔓越莓
LanguageData.FCP_Raw_Food_Banana_Yucca.description: 从香蕉丝兰植物中收获的甜的淀粉类水果。生存的主食。
LanguageData.FCP_Raw_Food_Banana_Yucca.label: 香蕉丝兰水果
LanguageData.FCP_Raw_Food_Barrel_Cactus.description: 从桶状仙人掌中收获的可食用果实。提供水分和营养。
LanguageData.FCP_Raw_Food_Barrel_Cactus.label: 桶装仙人掌果
LanguageData.FCP_Raw_Glowing_Mushroom.description: 从发光蘑菇植物中收获的突变真菌。发出微弱的光芒，可能具有轻微的放射性。
LanguageData.FCP_Raw_Glowing_Mushroom.label: 发光蘑菇
LanguageData.FCP_Raw_Gourd.description: 从葫芦植物中收获的一种多功能蔬菜。可食用且可用作容器。
LanguageData.FCP_Raw_Gourd.label: 葫芦
LanguageData.FCP_Raw_Honey_Mesquite.description: 从蜂蜜豆科灌木中收获的甜豆荚。用于食品、燃料和药品。
LanguageData.FCP_Raw_Honey_Mesquite.label: 蜂蜜豆科灌木荚
LanguageData.FCP_Raw_Jalapeno.description: 从墨西哥辣椒植物中收获的辣椒。为荒地食谱增添热量。
LanguageData.FCP_Raw_Jalapeno.label: 墨西哥辣椒
LanguageData.FCP_Raw_Maize.description: 从玉米植株上收获的丰盛的玉米穗。幸存者膳食的关键成分。
LanguageData.FCP_Raw_Maize.label: 玉米
LanguageData.FCP_Raw_Melon.description: 从瓜类植物中收获的甜多汁的水果。因其清爽的口感而备受赞誉。
LanguageData.FCP_Raw_Melon.label: 瓜
LanguageData.FCP_Raw_Mutated_Fern.description: 从突变的蕨类植物中收获的坚韧的叶子。有时用于权宜之计。
LanguageData.FCP_Raw_Mutated_Fern.label: 突变的蕨叶
LanguageData.FCP_Raw_Mutfruit.description: 从mutfruit树上收获的转基因水果。香甜浓郁。
LanguageData.FCP_Raw_Mutfruit.label: 番木瓜
LanguageData.FCP_Raw_Nevada_Agave.description: 从内华达州龙舌兰收获的甜汁液和纤维叶。用于食品、饮料和手工艺品。
LanguageData.FCP_Raw_Nevada_Agave.label: 内华达龙舌兰
LanguageData.FCP_Raw_Prickly_Pear.description: 可食用的垫子和从仙人掌收获的甜果。对于沙漠居民至关重要。
LanguageData.FCP_Raw_Prickly_Pear.label: 仙人掌梨
LanguageData.FCP_Raw_Razorgrain.description: 从剃刀植物中收获的坚韧的茎和营养丰富的种子。用于面包和粥。
LanguageData.FCP_Raw_Razorgrain.label: 剃刀粒
LanguageData.FCP_Raw_Siltbean.description: 从粉豆植物中收获的富含蛋白质的豆类。在贫瘠的土壤中茁壮成长。
LanguageData.FCP_Raw_Siltbean.label: 粉砂豆
LanguageData.FCP_Raw_Tarberry.description: 从柏油植物中收获的突变浆果。甜且有轻微放射性。
LanguageData.FCP_Raw_Tarberry.label: 塔伯里
LanguageData.FCP_Raw_Tato.description: 从马铃薯植物中收获的杂交块茎。丰盛而浓郁。
LanguageData.FCP_Raw_Tato.label: 塔托
LanguageData.FCP_Raw_Xander_Root.description: 从 xander 根植物中收获的粗糙根。因其药用特性而受到高度重视。
LanguageData.FCP_Raw_Xander_Root.label: 桑德根
LanguageData.FCP_Plant_Banana_Yucca.description: 香蕉丝兰是一种耐寒的沙漠植物，遍布莫哈韦沙漠，它产生甜甜的淀粉类水果，是生存的主食。其厚实的叶子和坚韧的韧性使其成为荒地流浪者可靠的营养来源。
LanguageData.FCP_Plant_Banana_Yucca.label: 香蕉丝兰
LanguageData.FCP_Plant_Barrel_Cactus.description: 这种圆形的多刺仙人掌将水储存在其粗壮的茎中，可以在干旱的地区散布。桶状仙人掌果实是可食用的，为恶劣的荒地提供了适度但重要的水合作用和营养来源。
LanguageData.FCP_Plant_Barrel_Cactus.label: 桶状仙人掌
LanguageData.FCP_Plant_Broc_Flower.description: 一种稀有的沙漠花，因其药用特性而备受推崇。西兰花是治疗粉的关键成分，因其恢复功效而受到荒地幸存者的追捧。
LanguageData.FCP_Plant_Broc_Flower.label: 布罗克花
LanguageData.FCP_Plant_Buffalo_Gourd.description: 生长于干旱地区的一种坚韧的野生葫芦。虽然不是特别美味，但它的种子和果肉可以在紧要关头吃掉，有时被废土人用在传统食谱中。
LanguageData.FCP_Plant_Buffalo_Gourd.label: 水葫芦
LanguageData.FCP_Plant_Carrot.description: 一种营养丰富的根类蔬菜，由幸存者种植，味道甘甜且用途广泛。胡萝卜是许多荒地定居点的主要农作物。
LanguageData.FCP_Plant_Carrot.label: 胡萝卜
LanguageData.FCP_Plant_Carrot_Flower.description: 胡萝卜植物的娇嫩花朵，有时被发现野生。它的种子用于繁殖，对于采集者来说是一种难得的享受。
LanguageData.FCP_Plant_Carrot_Flower.label: 胡萝卜花
LanguageData.FCP_Plant_Cranberry.description: 一种在荒地农场种植的酸红色浆果，具有营养价值并可用于蜜饯。蔓越莓是一种生命力极强的作物，在潮湿的土壤中茁壮成长。
LanguageData.FCP_Plant_Cranberry.label: 蔓越莓
LanguageData.FCP_Plant_Glowing_Mushroom.description: 一种变异的真菌，发出微弱的、诡异的光芒。发光蘑菇存在于受辐射的洞穴中，有时用于荒地疗法，尽管它们可能具有轻微的放射性。
LanguageData.FCP_Plant_Glowing_Mushroom.label: 发光蘑菇
LanguageData.FCP_Plant_Gourd.description: 一种用途广泛的蔬菜，因其果肉可食用并可用作容器而种植。葫芦是荒地花园中常见的景观，提供可靠的食物来源。
LanguageData.FCP_Plant_Gourd.label: 葫芦
LanguageData.FCP_Plant_Honey_Mesquite.description: 一种耐寒的沙漠灌木，有甜豆荚。蜂蜜豆科灌木被荒地居民用作食物、燃料，甚至药品，使其成为干旱地区的宝贵资源。
LanguageData.FCP_Plant_Honey_Mesquite.label: 蜂蜜豆科灌木
LanguageData.FCP_Plant_Jalapeno.description: 墨西哥胡椒是一种生长在荒地花园中的辛辣辣椒，为许多幸存者的食谱增添了热量和风味。它们耐寒且多产，是耕种者的最爱。
LanguageData.FCP_Plant_Jalapeno.label: 墨西哥辣椒
LanguageData.FCP_Plant_Maize.description: 玉米是荒地上的主要作物，人们种植玉米是因为它的穗数丰富且用途广泛。它是许多幸存者膳食的关键成分，可以长期保存。
LanguageData.FCP_Plant_Maize.label: 玉米
LanguageData.FCP_Plant_Melon.description: 一种生长在荒地花园中的甜美多汁的水果。瓜类因其清爽的口感和高含水量而备受推崇，使其成为干旱地区的宝贵作物。
LanguageData.FCP_Plant_Melon.label: 瓜
LanguageData.FCP_Plant_Mutated_Fern.description: 在辐射地区发现的一种奇怪的变异蕨类植物。它的叶子很坚韧，有时用于临时补救措施，但由于可能受到污染，建议谨慎使用。
LanguageData.FCP_Plant_Mutated_Fern.label: 变异蕨类植物
LanguageData.FCP_Plant_Mutfruit.description: 突变水果是一种转基因水果，是《辐射》宇宙中的主要作物。其味甜、味浓、产量高，深受荒地农民的喜爱。
LanguageData.FCP_Plant_Mutfruit.label: 水果
LanguageData.FCP_Plant_Nevada_Agave.description: 内华达龙舌兰是一种生命力极强的沙漠多肉植物，因其甜美的汁液和纤维状的叶子而被收获。废土人用它来制作食物、饮料和工艺品。
LanguageData.FCP_Plant_Nevada_Agave.label: 内华达龙舌兰
LanguageData.FCP_Plant_Prickly_Pear_Cactus.descriptio: 莫哈韦沙漠中发现的一种多刺仙人掌，因其可食用的肉垫和甜美的果实而备受推崇。仙人掌是沙漠居民水分和营养的重要来源。
LanguageData.FCP_Plant_Prickly_Pear_Cactus.label: 仙人掌仙人掌
LanguageData.FCP_Plant_Razorgrain.description: 一种耐寒、变异的谷物作物，因其坚韧的茎和营养丰富的种子而种植。剃刀粒是许多荒地定居点的主食，用于制作面包和粥。
LanguageData.FCP_Plant_Razorgrain.label: 剃刀粒
LanguageData.FCP_Plant_Siltbean.description: 粉砂豆是一种富含蛋白质的豆类作物，因其营养价值和在贫瘠土壤中茁壮成长的能力而在荒地中种植。它们是许多幸存者膳食的关键成分。
LanguageData.FCP_Plant_Siltbean.label: 粉砂豆
LanguageData.FCP_Plant_Tarberry.description: 酸杨子是一种在沼泽地区发现的变异浆果，因其甜味和温和的放射性而备受推崇。用于独特的荒地食谱，有时用于贸易。
LanguageData.FCP_Plant_Tarberry.label: 塔伯里
LanguageData.FCP_Plant_Tato.description: 土豆是番茄和马铃薯的杂交品种，是《辐射》宇宙中的主要作物。它丰盛的块茎和浓郁的水果是幸存者可靠的食物来源。
LanguageData.FCP_Plant_Tato.label: 塔托
LanguageData.FCP_Plant_Xander_Root.description: 一种多节的沙漠根，具有有效的药用特性。 Xander 根是治疗粉的关键成分，受到荒地治疗师的高度重视。
LanguageData.FCP_Plant_Xander_Root.label: 桑德·鲁特
LanguageData.FCP_Item_Fusion_Core.description: 一种紧凑型核电池，用于为战前技术提供动力，尤其是动力装甲。这些圆柱形电池包含高效的聚变反应，可以长时间提供能量。极其有价值，受到维护战前装备的人的追捧。目前的技术无法充电。
LanguageData.FCP_Item_Fusion_Core.label: 聚变核心
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_Power_Armor_Frame.descriptio: 一种强化外骨骼框架，旨在支撑先进动力装甲的重量和系统。动力装甲框架本身提供基本的保护并增加了承载能力，但当配备完整的装甲板时，它才真正闪耀。对于任何希望在荒地操作战前动力装甲服的人来说都是必不可少的。
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_Power_Armor_Frame.label: 动力装甲框架
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_Power_Armor_T45Armor.descrip: The T-45 was the first power armor model deployed in the field, offering s老旧iers unprecedented protection and strength. Though now considered outdated, its heavy plating and servo-assisted joints still provide formidable defense and enhanced mobility to any wastelander lucky enough to find a working suit.
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_Power_Armor_T45Armor.label: T-45动力装甲
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_Power_Armor_T51Armor.descrip: T-51 是一款传奇的战前动力装甲，以其卓越的防护能力和先进的设计而闻名。其钛复合材料外壳和改进的伺服系统使其比早期型号更轻、更耐用，赋予佩戴者在战场上无与伦比的弹性和力量。
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_Power_Armor_T51Armor.label: T-51动力装甲
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_Power_Armor_T60Armor.descrip: The T-60 represents the pinnacle of pre-war military engineering, combining the best features of earlier models with enhanced armor and reliability. Favored by the 钢铁兄弟会, the T-60 offers exceptional protection, advanced environmental sealing, and a menacing presence on any battlefield.
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_Power_Armor_T60Armor.label: T-60动力装甲
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_T51_Abraxo_Power_Armor.descr: T-51 动力装甲的涂装方案灵感源自标志性的 Abraxo Cleaner 品牌。干净、清爽、明确无误——这种公司油漆工作将战前的广告美学带入了荒原。
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_T51_Abraxo_Power_Armor.label: T-51 动力涂料 Abraxo 动力装甲
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_T51_Hotrod_Flames_Power_Armo: T-51 动力装甲上饰有令人眼花缭乱的火焰贴花，可让敌人回头率直，心中充满恐惧。这种标志性的热棒设计将荒地风格带入了战场。
T-51 Hotrodder 火焰作业动力装甲
T-51 power armor in b老旧, vibrant hot pink that makes a statement. This eye-catching color scheme ensures you'll never be overlooked on the battlefield.
T-51 Hotrodder 粉红色动力装甲
T-51 动力装甲，带有凶猛的鲨鱼牙齿，采用战前战斗机的风格绘制。这种激进的涂装方案向你的敌人表明你是认真的。
T-51 Hotrodder 鲨鱼涂装动力装甲
T-51 动力装甲，带有彩色 Sugar Bombs 谷物品牌。这种有趣的涂装方案既甜蜜又爆炸，将怀旧与恐吓融为一体。
T-51动力涂料糖弹动力装甲
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_T60_Hotrod_Flames_Power_Armo: T-60 动力装甲上印有令人眼花缭乱的火焰贴花，可让敌人回头率直，心中充满恐惧。这种标志性的热棒设计将荒地风格带入了战场。
T-60 Hotrodder 火焰作业动力装甲
T-60 power armor in b老旧, vibrant hot pink that makes a statement. This eye-catching color scheme ensures you'll never be overlooked on the battlefield.
T-60 Hotrodder 粉色动力装甲
T-60 动力装甲，带有凶猛的鲨鱼牙齿，采用战前战斗机的风格绘制。这种激进的涂装方案向你的敌人表明你是认真的。
T-60 Hotrodder 鲨鱼涂装动力装甲
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_X01_Power_Armor.description: The X-01 is the most advanced power armor ever developed before the Great War, shrouded in secrecy and rarely seen outside top-秘密 military installations. Its cutting-edge materials and systems provide unmatched protection, strength, and intimidation, making it the ultimate prize for any wasteland survivor.
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_X01_Power_Armor.label: X-01动力装甲
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_Power_Armor_T45_Helmet.descr: T45 是动力装甲头盔的早期型号，可针对大多数威胁提供坚实的保护。其庞大的设计是战前工程的证明，以牺牲一些舒适性和机动性为代价提供可靠的防御。
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_Power_Armor_T45_Helmet.label: T-45 动力装甲头盔
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_Power_Armor_T51_Helmet.descr: T51 头盔是动力装甲技术的改良版，与早期型号相比，提供卓越的保护和改进的人体工程学设计。因其防御性和舒适性的平衡而受到青睐。
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_Power_Armor_T51_Helmet.label: T-51 动力装甲头盔
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_Power_Armor_T60_Helmet.descr: T60头盔代表了先进动力装甲的发展，具有增强的装甲板和改进的环境密封性。专为危险条件下的前线战斗而设计。
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_Power_Armor_T60_Helmet.label: T-60 动力装甲头盔
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_Power_Armor_X01_Helmet.descr: X01头盔是动力装甲头盔的巅峰之作，拥有尖端材料和最大程度的保护。其令人生畏的设计和先进的系统使其成为稀有且宝贵的资产。
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_Power_Armor_X01_Helmet.label: X-01动力装甲头盔
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_T51_Abraxo_Power_Armor_Helme: 带有 Abraxo Cleaner 品牌的 T-51 动力装甲头盔。干净、明快、明确的企业美学。
Abraxo T-51 动力装甲头盔
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_T51_Hotrod_Flames_Power_Armo: T-51 动力装甲头盔上饰有耀眼的火焰贴花。这种标志性的热棒设计在战场上引人注目。
Hotrodder Flame Job T-51 动力装甲头盔
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_T51_Hotrod_Pink_Power_Armor_: A T-51 power armor helmet in b老旧, vibrant hot pink. This eye-catching color scheme ensures you'll never be overlooked.
Hotrodder Hotpink T-51 动力装甲头盔
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_T51_Shark_Paint_Power_Armor_: T-51 动力装甲头盔，带有战前战斗机风格的凶猛鲨鱼牙齿。
Hotrodder 鲨鱼漆 T-51 动力装甲头盔
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_T51_Sugar_Bombs_Power_Armor_: T-51 动力装甲头盔，带有彩色 Sugar Bombs 谷物品牌。甜蜜而爆炸的怀旧之情。
糖弹 T-51 动力装甲头盔
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_T60_Hotrod_Flames_Power_Armo: T-60 动力装甲头盔上饰有耀眼的火焰贴花。这种标志性的热棒设计在战场上引人注目。
Hotrodder Flame Job T-60 动力装甲头盔
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_T60_Hotrod_Pink_Power_Armor_: A T-60 power armor helmet in b老旧, vibrant hot pink. This eye-catching color scheme ensures you'll never be overlooked.
Hotrodder Hotpink T-60 动力装甲头盔
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_T60_Shark_Paint_Power_Armor_: T-60 动力装甲头盔，带有战前战斗机风格的凶猛鲨鱼牙齿。
Hotrodder 鲨鱼漆 T-60 动力装甲头盔
LanguageData.FCP_Building_PowerArmorStation.descripti: 用于存储和展示动力装甲套件的专用站。允许在存储和使用之间快速交换盔甲部件。
LanguageData.FCP_Building_PowerArmorStation.label: 动力装甲站
LanguageData.FCP_Food_BIG_BOY_Salisbury_Steak.descrip: 一种密封的预包装餐，由碎牛排和肉汁组成，这是美国美食的另一种主食。它的馅料非常丰富，而且非常美味，即使在战后的几个世纪里，它仍然是一道受欢迎的菜肴。 BIG BOY 餐点还配有 InstaMash！
LanguageData.FCP_Food_BIG_BOY_Salisbury_Steak.label: 大男孩索尔兹伯里牛排
LanguageData.FCP_Food_Blamco_Extra_Cheezy_Flavor.desc: 战前保存完好的快餐产品。这是一个长方形的盒子，里面装满了通心粉和奶酪的混合物，这是战前美国美食的主食，因此在荒地上很常见。这似乎是Extra Cheezy 的变体，为您的膳食添加稍微更多的卡路里。
LanguageData.FCP_Food_Blamco_Original_Flavor.descript: 战前保存完好的快餐产品。这是一个长方形的盒子，里面装满了通心粉和奶酪的混合物，这是战前美国美食的主食，因此在荒地上很常见。
LanguageData.FCP_Food_Blamco_Original_Flavor.label: 布拉姆科原味
LanguageData.FCP_Food_Cram.description: A tin can full of processed meat. Its main ingredients are pork and ham pressed into form and h老旧 together by gelatine. It’s filled with enough preservatives to be edible over 200 years after its fabrication and is a common and popular ration for s老旧iers in the NCR due to its high calorie content.
LanguageData.FCP_Food_Cram.label: 补习班
LanguageData.FCP_Food_Cram_Low_Sodium.description: 一种高品质的包装食品，专为生存情况而制造。虽然它永远不会腐烂，但如果放在外面，它仍然会变质。非常适合旅行。
LanguageData.FCP_Food_Cram_Low_Sodium.label: 补习低钠
LanguageData.FCP_Food_Dandy_Boy_Apples.description: 红色纸板盒里装着蜜饯苹果，这是一种流行的战前小吃，由 Dandy Boy 公司生产。产品中添加的糖和防腐剂数量惊人，确保其即使在 200 年后仍可食用。
LanguageData.FCP_Food_Dandy_Boy_Apples.label: 丹迪男孩苹果
LanguageData.FCP_Food_Dandy_Boy_Caramel_Apples.descri: 红色纸板盒里装着蜜饯苹果，这是一种流行的战前小吃，由 Dandy Boy 公司生产。产品中添加的糖和防腐剂数量惊人，确保其即使在 200 年后仍可食用。这个变种似乎有一个美味的焦糖壳！
LanguageData.FCP_Food_Dandy_Boy_Caramel_Apples.label: 丹迪男孩焦糖苹果
LanguageData.FCP_Food_Fancy_Lad_Snack_Cakes.descripti: Pre-war snack cakes packed up in a s商场 box. Bite-sized pieces of cake with icing, these snacks are nearly unperishable and still serve as a sugary, sweet treat 200 years after their making.
LanguageData.FCP_Food_Fancy_Lad_Snack_Cakes.label: 花式小伙子小吃蛋糕
LanguageData.FCP_Food_Fancy_Lad_Snack_Cakes_Buzzbite_: Pre-war snack cakes packed up in a s商场 box. Bite-sized pieces of cake with icing, these snacks are nearly unperishable and still serve as a sugary, sweet treat 200 years after their making. Be sure to look out for this version as it is the limited edition Buzzbite Flavor!
花式小伙子零食蛋糕 Buzzbite 口味
LanguageData.FCP_Food_Gum_Drops.description: A s商场 green package with logo symbolizing a radioactive hazard sign. However, its contents are relatively harmless, apart from the omnipresent background radiation. The s商场 gum drops contained within are sweet and tasty and have endured the ravages of time quite well. A sugary snack for wasteland explorers.
LanguageData.FCP_Food_Gum_Drops.label: 口香糖滴剂
LanguageData.FCP_Food_Gum_Drops_Anchorage_Arctic_Flav: A s商场 green package with logo symbolizing a radioactive hazard sign. However, its contents are relatively harmless, apart from the omnipresent background radiation. The s商场 gum drops contained within are sweet and tasty and have endured the ravages of time quite well. A sugary snack for wasteland explorers. This popular pre-war flavor features the mountain battlefields of Anchorage Alaska.
安克雷奇北极风味口香糖
LanguageData.FCP_Food_Insta_Mash.description: 一盒冻干土豆泥粉。这种方便食品在战后两个世纪后被证明可以食用，并且可以在荒地的许多地方找到。与索尔兹伯里牛排最佳搭配！
LanguageData.FCP_Food_Insta_Mash.label: 即时混搭
LanguageData.FCP_Food_Insta_Mash_And_Bacon.descriptio: 一盒冻干土豆泥，添加培根以增加风味和口感！这种方便食品在战后两个世纪后被证明可以食用，并且可以在荒地的许多地方找到。与索尔兹伯里牛排最佳搭配！
LanguageData.FCP_Food_Insta_Mash_And_Bacon.label: Insta 捣碎培根
LanguageData.FCP_Food_Pork_N_Beans.description: A can of beans stewed in a tomato sauce with chunks of bacon and salt-cured pork. A product from the Greasy Prospector company, Pork n’Beans were s老旧 in a tin can with a blue and red label and remain edible to this day.
LanguageData.FCP_Food_Pork_N_Beans.label: 猪肉豆
LanguageData.FCP_Food_Pork_N_Beans_Hot_N_Spicy_Flavor: 一罐用番茄酱炖的豆子，配上大块培根和盐腌猪肉。 Pork n’Beans 是 Greasy Prospector 公司的产品，装在带有蓝色和红色标签的锡罐中，直到今天仍然可以食用。从包装来看，这似乎是“Hot N Spicy Flavor”。
LanguageData.FCP_Food_Potato_Crisps.description: 一盒春谷薯片。这是一种标志性的战前小吃，由薄薄的土豆片腌制并在油中烘烤而成。由于它们在战前非常受欢迎，它们仍然是荒原上常见的景象。
LanguageData.FCP_Food_Potato_Crisps.label: 薯片
LanguageData.FCP_Food_Potato_Crisps_Lightly_Salted.de: 一管春谷薯片，微咸味。这是一种标志性的战前小吃，由薄薄的土豆片腌制并在油中烘烤而成。由于它们在战前非常受欢迎，它们仍然是荒原上常见的景象。
LanguageData.FCP_Food_Salisbury_Steak.description: 一种高品质的包装食品，专为生存情况而制造。虽然它永远不会腐烂，但如果放在外面，它仍然会变质。非常适合旅行。
LanguageData.FCP_Food_Salisbury_Steak.label: 索尔兹伯里牛排
LanguageData.FCP_Food_Sugar_Bombs.description: 一盒红、白、蓝的战前早餐麦片，因其高糖含量而闻名（并且臭名昭著）。虽然如此大量的糖肯定不健康，但它也确保了它们至今仍可食用。由于其作为主要早餐麦片的地位，在荒地中几乎到处都可以找到它。
LanguageData.FCP_Food_Sugar_Bombs.label: 糖弹
LanguageData.FCP_Food_Yum_Yum_Deviled_Eggs.descriptio: 红蓝相间的包装，里面装有 YumYum 制作的干全芥末蛋。尽管是煮熟的鸡蛋，里面充满了由蛋黄、芥末和蛋黄酱制成的糊状物，但它们仍然可以食用，但最好还是自行斟酌。
LanguageData.FCP_Food_Yum_Yum_Deviled_Eggs.label: 好吃好吃芥末蛋
LanguageData.FCP_Food_Yum_Yum_Deviled_Eggs_Sour_Cream: A yellow and g老旧 package with dried whole deviled eggs made by YumYum with a hint of sour cream added flavor. Despite being hard-boiled eggs filled with a paste made from egg yolks, mustard and mayonnaise, they’re still edible for reasons best left to discretion.
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_Raider_Armor_Heavy.descripti: 技术含量低、外观野蛮的自制盔甲。它的质量和外观各不相同，大多数由废金属板融合成盔甲片，并用金属条和皮带紧固在一起的金属丝加固。重型袭击者盔甲通常是为领导者和其他向帮派发号施令的人保留的。虽然它比其他版本提供更好的保护，但它也笨重，严重损害了佩戴者的行动自由。
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_Raider_Armor_Heavy.label: 重型袭击者装甲
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_Raider_Armor_Light.descripti: 技术含量低、外观野蛮的自制盔甲。它的质量和外观各不相同，大多数由废金属板融合成装甲片，并用金属条和用皮带紧固在一起的电线加固。轻型版本的袭击者装甲仅提供基本保护，但比其他变体更轻。不是最好的盔甲，但肯定比没有好。
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_Raider_Armor_Light.label: 掠夺者装甲
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_Raider_Armor_Medium.descript: 技术含量低、外观野蛮的自制盔甲。它的质量和外观各不相同，大多数由废金属板融合成装甲片，并用金属条和皮带紧固在一起的电线组成。这个版本提供的保护比较轻的版本稍强，但仍然不是那么好。另外，它的重量要重得多
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_Raider_Armor_Medium.label: 坚固的掠夺者盔甲
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_Raider_Badlands_Armor.descri: 一件破烂的衣服，有些地方用胶带包裹着，一条宽皮带，还有黑色的军靴。这些衣服经常被袭击者穿着，几乎不能提供任何保护。
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_Raider_Badlands_Armor.label: 掠夺者荒地护甲
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_Raider_Blastmaster_Armor.des: 一件皮衣，上面覆盖着大量的碎布、链条和焊接有钢筋的金属板。就袭击者盔甲而言，这款盔甲的保护效果相当好，但反过来又相当重。通常由具有（某些）自我保护本能的袭击者佩戴。
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_Raider_Leather_Coat.descript: 掠夺者首领和那些幸存下来并赢得一定尊重的人所佩戴的长皮革掸子。提供比基本掠夺者盔甲更好的保护，同时保持令人生畏的外观。
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_Raider_Leather_Coat.label: 掠夺者皮大衣
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_Raider_Leathers.description: 由各种动物皮毛和边角料拼凑而成的粗糙皮革服装。虽然提供最低限度的保护，但它重量轻且允许快速移动 - 对于打了就跑的袭击者战术至关重要。
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_Raider_Leathers.label: 掠夺者皮革
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_Raider_Long_Johns.descriptio: 一件破烂的衣服，有些地方用胶带包裹着，一条宽皮带，还有黑色的军靴。这些衣服经常被袭击者穿着，几乎不能提供任何保护。
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_Raider_Long_Johns.label: 掠夺者装甲
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_Raider_Painspike_Armor.descr: 一件破烂的衣服，有些地方用胶带包裹着，一条宽皮带，还有黑色的军靴。这些衣服经常被袭击者穿着，几乎不能提供任何保护。
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_Raider_Painspike_Armor.label: 袭击者痛刺护甲
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_Raider_Sadist_Armor.descript: 这种古老的盔甲由金属护甲和戴在左肩上的某种皮革板组成。它使佩戴者的肩膀裸露且不受保护。但大多数袭击者对此并不关心，因为它的主要用途是恐吓敌人。
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_Raider_Sadist_Armor.label: 袭击者虐待狂盔甲
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_Raider_Tire_Armor.descriptio: 用回收的轮胎橡胶和金属废料制成的临时装甲。厚橡胶提供了良好的保护，防止钝器撞击，同时保持令人惊讶的灵活性。深受重视机动性而非重度防护的袭击者欢迎。
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_Raider_Tire_Armor.label: 袭击者轮胎装甲
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_Armored_Raider_Skull_Gas_Mas: 配有强化金属颅骨板的防毒面具。功能性保护和令人惊叹的美观相结合，使其成为掠夺者精英中最受青睐的头盔。
装甲袭击者骷髅防毒面具
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_Fiend_Battle_Helmet.descript: 一款基本的皮头盔，顶部贴有年轻大角人的头骨作为装饰。头骨上有一个红色的靶心，最常被恶魔佩戴，恶魔是来自莫哈韦荒地的一个特别邪恶的掠夺者团体。它的保护效果不佳，但看起来相当吓人，这对大多数袭击者来说更重要。
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_Fiend_Battle_Helmet.label: 掠夺者恶魔战斗头盔
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_Fiend_Helmet.description: 一款基本的皮头盔，顶部贴有年轻大角人的头骨作为装饰。头骨上有一个红色的靶心，最常被恶魔佩戴，恶魔是来自莫哈韦荒地的一个特别邪恶的掠夺者团体。它的保护效果不佳，但看起来相当吓人，这对大多数袭击者来说更重要。
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_Fiend_Helmet.label: 掠夺者恶魔头盔
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_Fiend_Warrior_Helmet.descrip: 一款基本的皮头盔，顶部贴有年轻大角人的头骨作为装饰。头骨上有一个红色的靶心，最常被恶魔佩戴，恶魔是来自莫哈韦荒地的一个特别邪恶的掠夺者团体。它的保护效果不佳，但看起来相当吓人，这对大多数袭击者来说更重要。
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_Fiend_Warrior_Helmet.label: 袭击者恶魔战士头盔
用回收的零件组装而成的临时动力装甲头盔。虽然不如军用级头盔提供保护，但它仍然远远优于传统的袭击者头盔。
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_Mrfuzzy_Power_Armor_Helmet.d: 一款不寻常的动力装甲头盔，已采用模糊先生吉祥物主题进行了修改。尽管其外观很荒谬，但它提供了与标准袭击者动力装甲头盔相同的保护。
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_Mrfuzzy_Power_Armor_Helmet.l: 模糊先生动力装甲头盔
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_Raider_Arclight_Helmet.descr: 改造后的焊接面罩。它从前面提供了相当好的保护，但后脑勺几乎不受保护。它鼓励佩戴者盲目地向敌人发起猛攻，因为撤退是一个坏主意，而且往往是致命的。
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_Raider_Arclight_Helmet.label: 掠夺者弧光头盔
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_Raider_Blastmaster_Helmet.de: 爆破大师头盔由戴在防毒面具顶部的消防员头盔组成，确实提供了良好的保护，并且通常覆盖有阻燃物质。
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_Raider_Power_Armor_Helmet.de: 被掠夺者粗暴改造过的动力装甲头盔。内部系统几乎无法运行，但它仍然可以针对大多数威胁提供出色的保护。
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_Raider_Psycho_Tic_Helmet.des: 带有护目镜和从头部两侧突出的车把的皮革无边帽。它的保护作用不是很强，主要用途是恐吓。
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_Raider_Wastehound_Helmet.des: 头盔由几块粗麻布粗略地缝合在一起制成。它还包括看起来像是从防毒面具上撕下来的护目镜和一簇头发。虽然不是很强大的盔甲，但它确实可以很好地恐吓敌人。
一个风化的防毒面具，附有腐蚀的头骨板。尽管其状况恶化，但它仍然提供足够的保护并保持令人生畏的袭击者美学。
生锈袭击者骷髅防毒面具
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_Sack_Hood.description: 袭击者经常佩戴的简单兜帽。它几乎不能提供任何防弹保护，但（勉强）比没有头盔好。
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_Sack_Hood.label: 麻袋罩
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_Scabber_Power_Armor_Helmet.d: 一顶严重腐蚀的动力装甲头盔，上面布满了锈迹和腐烂。尽管其外观已恶化，但核心结构仍然坚固并提供实质性保护。
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_Waster_Power_Armor_Helmet.de: 一顶经过战斗磨损的动力装甲头盔，显示出广泛使用和临时修理的迹象。虽然不是原始的，但它仍然是一件强大的防护装备。
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_Raider_Power_Armor.descripti: 一套简陋的动力装甲，由废弃的零件、生锈的镀层和回收的 T-45 部件拼凑而成。虽然它为废土人提供了不错的保护，但它缺乏适当的军用动力装甲的精致和可靠性。临时建筑在覆盖范围上留下了缺口，临时维修使其比战前的同类建筑明显更重、更笨重。尽管如此，在荒原上，有动力装甲总比没有好。
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_Raider_Power_Armor.label: 袭击者动力装甲
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_Scabber_Power_Armor.descript: 斑斑帮青睐的更精致的袭击者动力装甲变体。它由维护更好的废品制成，并用额外的废镀层加固，提供了更好的保护，同时保持了特有的摇摇欲坠的外观。斑斑兵对他们的盔甲上令人生畏的尖刺和锈迹斑斑的面板感到自豪，并将它们作为荣誉徽章佩戴。尽管比标准袭击者动力装甲重，但它提供了明显更好的保护，以抵御荒地的危险。
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_Scabber_Power_Armor.label: 斑斑动力装甲
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_Waster_Power_Armor.descripti: 作为袭击者动力装甲工程的顶峰，Waster 变体将回收的军用级组件与令人惊讶的精湛工艺结合在一起。虽然按照战前标准来看仍然很粗糙，但它已接近 T-45 动力装甲的防护水平，同时保持了袭击者喜欢的残酷美学。重型结构和分层镀层使其成为战场上令人敬畏的景象。废人首领和精英掠夺者对这些套装的评价高于所有其他盔甲。
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_Waster_Power_Armor.label: 废物动力装甲
LanguageData.FCP_Pre_War_Army_Truck.description: An 老旧, destroyed military truck. Used by the great nations before the bombs droped.
LanguageData.FCP_Pre_War_Army_Truck.label: 战前美国陆军卡车
LanguageData.FCP_Pre_War_Army_Vertibird.description: An 老旧, destroyed military Vertibid. Used by the great nations before the bombs droped.
LanguageData.FCP_Pre_War_Army_Vertibird.label: 战前美国陆军飞鸟
LanguageData.FCP_Wall_Bunker.description: 专为军事掩体设计的重型钢筋混凝土墙。极其耐用并提供出色的保护。这些墙通常用于战前的军事设施。
LanguageData.FCP_Wall_Bunker.label: 碉堡墙
LanguageData.FCP_Bullet_10mm.label: 10毫米子弹
LanguageData.FCP_Bullet_127mm.label: 12.7毫米子弹头
LanguageData.FCP_Bullet_12Gauge_Pellet.label: 12 号颗粒
LanguageData.FCP_Bullet_14mm.description: 适用于大口径手枪的威力强大的 14 毫米子弹。
LanguageData.FCP_Bullet_14mm.label: 14毫米子弹
LanguageData.FCP_Bullet_20Gauge_Pellet.label: 20 号颗粒
LanguageData.FCP_Bullet_223mm.label: .223子弹
LanguageData.FCP_Bullet_22LR.label: .22 LR 子弹
LanguageData.FCP_Bullet_308mm.label: .308子弹
LanguageData.FCP_Bullet_32mm.label: .32子弹头
LanguageData.FCP_Bullet_357mm.label: 357毫米子弹
LanguageData.FCP_Bullet_44Magnum.label: .44马格南子弹
LanguageData.FCP_Bullet_4570mm.label: .45-70 政府子弹
LanguageData.FCP_Bullet_45ACP.label: .45 ACP 子弹
LanguageData.FCP_Bullet_50AE.description: 大型 0.50 Action Express 子弹，适用于威力最强的手枪。
LanguageData.FCP_Bullet_50AE.label: .50 AE 子弹
LanguageData.FCP_Bullet_556mm.label: 556毫米子弹
LanguageData.FCP_Bullet_5mm.label: 5毫米子弹
LanguageData.FCP_Bullet_9mm.label: 9毫米子弹
LanguageData.FCP_Bullet_AMR.label: AMR 子弹
LanguageData.FCP_Bullet_BB.label: BB 颗粒
LanguageData.FCP_Bullet_Nail.label: 指甲
LanguageData.FCP_Bullet_Ranger_Sequoia.label: 游侠红杉子弹
LanguageData.FCP_AnimalCage_Large.description: A massive, heavily reinforced cage designed to contain the largest and most 危险 wasteland predators. Originally designed for pre-war zoos and research facilities, these cages feature reinforced steel construction and advanced containment systems. Only the most skilled engineers can properly construct these formidable enclosures.
LanguageData.FCP_AnimalCage_Large.label: 大型动物笼
LanguageData.FCP_AnimalCage_Medium.description: A reinforced cage capable of h老旧ing medium-sized wasteland creatures. Built with thicker steel bars and improved locking mechanisms, this cage can safely contain animals that would easily escape from s商场er enclosures. Popular among wasteland traders who deal in exotic mutated pets and working animals.
LanguageData.FCP_AnimalCage_Medium.label: 中型动物笼
LanguageData.FCP_AnimalCage_Small.description: A sturdy metal cage designed to safely capture and contain s商场 wasteland creatures. Originally used by pre-war researchers and hunters, these cages have proven invaluable for wastelanders looking to domesticate the various mutated animals roaming the post-nuclear landscape. Requires regular feeding to maintain captured animals.
LanguageData.FCP_AnimalCage_Small.label: s商场 animal cage
LanguageData.FCP_Animal_Brahmin.description: 婆罗门在荒地中发挥着至关重要的环境作用，它们构成了许多物种的生存基础。形成新加州经济的支柱；婆罗门可以比其他生物携带大量货物走更远的距离。婆罗门的粪便是很好的肥料和篝火的燃料。它们粪便中的烟雾也被用来合成喷气；而它们的皮和头发可以用来制作帐篷、皮衣、马鞍包，或者看起来像婆罗门的怪异伪装。
LanguageData.FCP_Animal_Brahmin.label: 婆罗门
LanguageData.FCP_Animal_Brahmin.tools.1.label: 头撞
LanguageData.FCP_Animal_Brahmin.tools.2.label: left hoof
LanguageData.FCP_Animal_Brahmin.tools.3.label: 右蹄
LanguageData.FCP_Currency_Caps.description: An 老旧 Nuka Cola bottle cap. What used to be garbage is now the most commonly used currency in the wastes today.
LanguageData.FCP_Currency_Caps.label: 帽子
LanguageData.FCP_Power_Armor_VR_Pod.description: 专为动力装甲训练模拟而设计的虚拟现实吊舱，可增强用户的战斗技能和动力装甲熟练程度。
LanguageData.FCP_Power_Armor_VR_Pod.label: 动力装甲模拟 VR 吊舱
LanguageData.FCP_Production_Ammo_Press.label: 弹药压机
LanguageData.FCP_Production_Armor_Workbench.label: 装甲工作台
LanguageData.FCP_Production_Chemistry_Workbench.descr: 用于制造化学品的工作台。
LanguageData.FCP_Production_Chemistry_Workbench.label: 化学工作台
LanguageData.FCP_Production_Clean_Table_Terminal.desc: 展台上有一个维护良好的战前计算机终端。可用于研究全息带。可以移动和认领。
LanguageData.FCP_Production_Clean_Wall_Terminal.descr: 一个保存完好的战前计算机终端安装在墙上。可用于研究全息带，并且可能仍包含战前的数据。一旦放置就无法移动或领取。
LanguageData.FCP_Production_Clean_Wall_Terminal.label: 洁净墙终端
LanguageData.FCP_Production_Complex_Weapons_Workbench: 用于制造复杂武器的工作台。
LanguageData.FCP_Production_Cooking_Station_Fueled_Co: 以木材为燃料的烹饪站。
LanguageData.FCP_Production_Cooking_Station_Fueled_Si: 以木材为燃料的烹饪站。
LanguageData.FCP_Production_Fabrication_Workbench.des: 配备先进工具的工作台，可以用更简单的材料创造技术奇迹。
LanguageData.FCP_Production_Old_Table_Terminal.descri: 展台上放置着一台饱经风霜的战前电脑终端。可用于研究全息带。可以移动和认领。
LanguageData.FCP_Production_Old_Table_Terminal.label: 老旧 表格终端
LanguageData.FCP_Production_Old_Wall_Terminal.descrip: 安装在墙上的生锈的战前计算机终端。可用于研究全息带，并且可能仍包含战前的数据。一旦放置就无法移动或领取。
LanguageData.FCP_Production_Old_Wall_Terminal.label: 老旧 墙壁终端
LanguageData.FCP_Production_Portable_Tool_Bench.label: 便携式工具台
LanguageData.FCP_Production_Tailoring_Workbench.descr: 手工剪裁衣服的工作台。工作速度是电动裁缝台的 50%。
LanguageData.FCP_Production_Tailoring_Workbench.label: 裁缝工作台
LanguageData.FCP_Production_Tool_Bench.label: 工具台
LanguageData.FCP_Bullet_Gauss.label: 2mm EC 圆形
LanguageData.FCP_Bullet_Laser.label: 激光射击
LanguageData.FCP_Bullet_Laser_S.label: 激光射击
LanguageData.FCP_Bullet_MF_Breeder.label: 激光射击
LanguageData.FCP_Bullet_Plasma.label: 等离子铸造
LanguageData.FCP_Bullet_Ultracite.label: 超矿丸
LanguageData.FCP_Item_Collectors_Card_Common.descript: Vault-Tec 收藏家交易卡。这只是一个常见的，但也许对某人来说是有价值的。
LanguageData.FCP_Item_Collectors_Card_Common.label: 常见的收藏交易卡
LanguageData.FCP_Item_Collectors_Card_Legendary.descr: 一张 Vault-Tec 收藏家交易卡，这是一张传奇卡！这是一件独一无二的作品，我确信它的价值超过几瓶！
LanguageData.FCP_Item_Collectors_Card_Legendary.label: 传奇的收藏交易卡
LanguageData.FCP_Item_Collectors_Card_Rare.descriptio: 一张 Vault-Tec 收藏家交易卡，这是一张稀有卡。虽然不是最有价值的，但仍然是一个惊人的发现！
LanguageData.FCP_Item_Collectors_Card_Rare.label: 稀有的收藏集换卡
LanguageData.FCP_Item_Collectors_Edition_Lunchbox_Dir: Vault-Tec 收藏版午餐盒。它有点脏，但仍然可以打开，里面可能有一些有用的东西！
肮脏的 Vault-Tec 收藏版午餐盒
LanguageData.FCP_Item_Collectors_Edition_Lunchbox_Min: Vault-Tec 收藏版午餐盒。状态完好，里面可能有值钱的东西！
完好无损 Vault-Tec 收藏版午餐盒
LanguageData.FCP_Beam_Gatling_Laser.label: 加特林激光束
LanguageData.FCP_Beam_Laser.label: 激光束
LanguageData.FCP_Beam_Laser_S.label: 聚焦激光束
LanguageData.FCP_Beam_MF_Breeder.label: 饲养梁
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_Pipboy3000_Mark_IV.descripti: Mark IV 是 Pip-Boy 3000 的高级版本，具有增强的处理能力和更精致的界面。其改进的数据管理系统提供了更好的工作协调和更快的信息处理。战前，Mark IV 被认为是最顶级的。与早期版本相比，该模型提供了卓越的性能，并具有增强的计算能力。
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_Pipboy3000_Mark_IV.label: 哔哔小子 3000 Mark IV
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_Pipboy3000_Mk_I.description: Pip-Boy 3000 型号是战前向避难所居民发放的最常见的个人信息处理器。这款坚固耐用的腕戴式计算机具有单色绿色显示屏，并提供基本的数据管理功能。其简单但可靠的界面有助于工作协调和任务管理。这是以其耐用性和易用性而闻名的经典型号。
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_Pipboy3000_Mk_I.label: 哔哔小子3000
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_Mysterious_Stranger_Hat.desc: 神秘陌生人所戴的独特帽子，可微妙地提高准确性。
LanguageData.FCP_VATS_Zoomer.label: 桶
LanguageData.FCP_Vertibird.description: Vertibird 是一系列垂直起降 (VTOL) 飞机的名称。这些多用途倾转旋翼机由美国军方开发，并迅速成为主要的武装直升机和运输机。
LanguageData.FCP_Vertibird.label: 飞鸟
LanguageData.FCP_VertibirdIncoming.label: 飞鸟（传入）
LanguageData.FCP_VertibirdLeaving.label: 飞鸟（离开）
LanguageData.FCP_Unarmed_Ballistic_Fist.description: 一种先进的徒手武器，将气动动力与爆炸性霰弹枪外壳相结合。当拳头连接时，它会直接向目标发射炮弹，造成巨大的创伤。终极近距离毁灭者。
LanguageData.FCP_Unarmed_Ballistic_Fist.label: 弹道拳
LanguageData.FCP_Unarmed_Ballistic_Fist.tools.0.label: 爆炸拳头
LanguageData.FCP_Unarmed_Boxing_Glove.description: 一副带衬垫的拳击手套，最初是为运动而设计的。虽然它们不会轻易造成致命伤害，但它们非常适合非致命击倒，并且仍然可以用坚固的拳头打断下巴。
LanguageData.FCP_Unarmed_Boxing_Glove.label: 拳击手套
LanguageData.FCP_Unarmed_Boxing_Glove.tools.0.label: 拳头
LanguageData.FCP_Unarmed_Displacer_Glove.description: 一种缠绕在手上的实验性能量武器。它会产生一个场，在接触时破坏物质，导致严重的组织损伤和内伤。独特的蓝色光芒暴露了其先进的技术。
LanguageData.FCP_Unarmed_Displacer_Glove.label: 置换手套
LanguageData.FCP_Unarmed_Industrial_Fist.description: 专为建筑和拆除工作而设计的重型工业假肢拳头。虽然最初并不是作为武器，但其液压执行器和强化金属结构使其在战斗中具有毁灭性的效果，可以粉碎它击中的任何东西。
LanguageData.FCP_Unarmed_Industrial_Fist.label: 工业手
LanguageData.FCP_Unarmed_Power_Fist.description: 战前的气动手套，使用加压气体发出毁灭性的拳头。当拳头撞击时，它会释放出一阵压缩空气，其力量会成倍增加，每次打击都能粉碎骨头，使盔甲凹陷。
LanguageData.FCP_Unarmed_Power_Fist.label: 动力拳头
LanguageData.FCP_Unarmed_Power_Fist.tools.0.label: 气动拳头
LanguageData.FCP_Unarmed_Zap_Glove.description: 一种经过电气元件改造的皮革手套，可在接触时产生强大的冲击力。它最初是为非致命人群控制而开发的，它可以击晕目标并使目标丧失能力。噼啪作响的蓝色能量既令人生畏又有效。
LanguageData.FCP_Unarmed_Zap_Glove.label: 电击手套
LanguageData.FCP_Unarmed_Zap_Glove.tools.0.label: 带电拳头
LanguageData.FCP_Shuttle_USA_Vertibird.description: Vertibird is a designation for a series of vertical take-off and landing (VTOL) aircraft. These multipurpose tiltrotor aircraft were developed by the United States military and rapidly became a primary gunship and transport aircraft.
LanguageData.FCP_Shuttle_USA_Vertibird.label: US vertibird
LanguageData.FCP_Shuttle_USA_VertibirdIncoming.label: U.S. vertibird (incoming)
LanguageData.FCP_Shuttle_USA_VertibirdLeaving.label: U.S. vertibird (leaving)
LanguageData.FCP_USA_Building_Anchorage_Memorial.desc: 这座宏伟的纪念碑是为了纪念安克雷奇的关键战役，在那场由康斯坦丁·蔡斯将军领导的勇敢的美国军队战胜了精卫将军指挥的入侵的中国军队。它是对那些保卫我们祖国的勇气和牺牲的人们的致敬，标志着确保我们自由的转折点。
LanguageData.FCP_Currency_USA_Pre_War_Dollar.descript: U.S. Dollar bill, standard currency in America. Used for everyday transactions and trade.
LanguageData.FCP_Currency_USA_Pre_War_Dollar.label: U.S. Dollar
LanguageData.FCP_Item_USA_MRE.description: A military Meal Ready to Eat from the United States Armed Forces. Individually packaged and designed for field use, it contains a complete meal with multiple components including an entree, sides, dessert, and accessories. More filling and palatable than standard survival packs, though it will never win any culinary awards. Never rots but can deteriorate if left outside.
LanguageData.FCP_Item_USA_MRE.label: US MRE
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_US_Generals_Uniform.descript: A distinguished uniform issued to generals of the United States Army, symbolizing command and tradition. Its immaculate condition and ornate details reflect the prestige and authority of America's military leadership.
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_US_Generals_Uniform.label: US General Uniform
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_US_Winterized_Generals_Unifo: A winterized uniform issued to generals of the United States Army, symbolizing command and tradition. Enhanced with insulated lining and weatherproof materials, it provides warmth and protection in c老旧 climates while maintaining the prestige and authority of America's military leadership.
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_USA_Army_Combat_Armor.descri: The standard-issue US Army Combat Armor of 2077, featuring advanced composite plating and modular design. Widely deployed across conflict zones, it offers robust protection against ballistic and energy threats while maintaining mobility. Integrated with environmental seals and tactical interfaces, this armor represents the pinnacle of military technology in the United States.
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_USA_Army_Combat_Armor.label: US Army Combat Armor
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_USA_Army_T51_Power_Armor.des: A United States Army variant of the legendary T-51 power armor. Painted in military olive drab and bearing the insignia of the US Armed Forces, this suit represents the standard issue for Army mechanized infantry units. The T-51's titanium composite shell and advanced servos provided unmatched battlefield superiority during the Resource Wars, making its wearers nearly unstoppable forces of pre-war military might.
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_USA_Army_T60_Power_Armor.des: The ultimate expression of United States Army power armor technology before the Great War. This T-60 variant bears the proud colors and markings of the US military, issued only to the most elite mechanized infantry divisions. Combining superior protection with advanced environmental systems and intimidating presence, the T-60 represented the cutting edge of American military engineering and the backbone of armored operations during the final days of the 老旧 world.
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_USA_Marine_Armor.description: Heavy armor worn by United States Marine Corps personnel. Provides excellent protection against ballistic threats.
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_USA_Marine_Armor.label: US Marine Armor
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_USA_Marine_Light_Armor.descr: A lighter variant of the US Marine Corps armor, sacrificing some protection for improved mobility and reduced weight. Designed for rapid deployment scenarios and extended field operations where agility is paramount. Still provides substantial ballistic protection while allowing marines to operate with greater speed and endurance.
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_USA_Marine_Light_Armor.label: US Marine Light Armor
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_USA_Marine_Wetsuit.descripti: A specialized wetsuit worn by United States Marine Corps divers and amphibious assault teams. Made from advanced neoprene composite, it provides thermal insulation and environmental protection while maintaining flexibility for underwater operations. Designed to be worn under marine armor during amphibious missions.
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_USA_Marine_Wetsuit.label: US Marine Wetsuit
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_USA_Presidents_Suit.descript: An elegant formal suit worn by the President of the United States. Made from the finest materials with exquisite tailoring, it represents the dignity and authority of the highest office in the nation. The suit is both comfortable and imposing, suitable for state functions and diplomatic meetings.
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_USA_Presidents_Suit.label: President's suit
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_USA_Secret_Service_Armor.des: Advanced tactical armor issued to elite United States 秘密 Service agents tasked with protecting the highest levels of government. Engineered from composite alloys and reinforced plating, this armor provides exceptional ballistic and energy protection without sacrificing mobility. The low-profile design allows agents to blend into formal settings while remaining combat-ready at a moment's notice.
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_USA_Secret_Service_Underarmo: A specialized tactical underarmor worn by United States 秘密 Service agents beneath their armor plating. Constructed from advanced ballistic weave and moisture-wicking fibers, it provides a baseline layer of protection and climate control. The carefully designed cut ensures full range of motion while maintaining professional appearance under formal attire when needed.
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_USA_T65_Power_Armor.descript: The pinnacle of pre-war American power armor technology, the T-65 was developed exclusively for elite 秘密 Service operatives assigned to the most critical national security operations. Incorporating cutting-edge materials science and engineering far beyond standard military issue, this armor provides unmatched protection and strength enhancement. Its distinctive profile is instantly recognizable to those familiar with the inner workings of the United States government.
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_USA_T65_Power_Armor.label: T-65 秘密 Service Power Armor
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_USA_Winterized_Army_Combat_A: The winterized variant of the US Army Combat Armor of 2077, featuring advanced composite plating, modular design, and enhanced insulation for extreme c老旧. Outfitted with weatherproof materials and environmental seals, it offers robust protection against ballistic and energy threats while ensuring s老旧ier mobility and warmth in harsh winter conditions.
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_USA_Army_Combat_Helmet.descr: The standard-issue US Army Combat Helmet of 2077, designed to complement the advanced composite plating and modular features of the armor. Widely deployed alongside its armor counterpart, it provides robust protection against ballistic and energy threats while maintaining comfort and tactical functionality. Integrated with environmental seals and communication interfaces, this helmet exemplifies the pinnacle of military headgear technology in the United States.
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_USA_Army_Combat_Helmet.label: US Army Combat Helmet
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_USA_Army_General_Cap.descrip: A distinguished cap issued to generals of the United States Army, symbolizing command and tradition. Its immaculate condition and ornate details reflect the prestige and authority of America's military leadership.
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_USA_Army_General_Cap.label: US Army General Cap
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_USA_Army_T51_Power_Armor_Hel: A United States Army variant of the T-51 power armor helmet. Painted in military olive drab with Army insignia, this helmet provides the legendary protection of the T-51 system while marking its wearer as a member of the pre-war American mechanized infantry.
US Army T-51 Power Armor Helmet
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_USA_Army_T60_Power_Armor_Hel: The helmet component of the United States Army's T-60 power armor. Bearing the colors and insignia of the pre-war military, this advanced helmet combines cutting-edge heads-up display technology with maximum protection, representing the peak of American power armor engineering before the Great War.
US Army T-60 Power Armor Helmet
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_USA_Marine_Combat_Helmet.des: The standard-issue US Marine Corps Combat Helmet of 2077, engineered specifically for the elite Marine Corps with enhanced ballistic protection and amphibious operation capabilities. Features advanced composite materials, integrated communication systems, environmental seals, and a built-in atmospheric filtration system that provides protection against chemical agents, toxic gases, and environmental hazards. This helmet represents the pinnacle of Marine Corps tactical headgear technology.
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_USA_Marine_Diving_Helmet.des: A specialized diving helmet used by United States Marine Corps combat divers and underwater demolition teams. Features an integrated breathing system, reinforced visor, and communication equipment designed for underwater operations. Provides excellent protection against environmental hazards while maintaining clear vision and communication capabilities during amphibious assaults.
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_USA_Secret_Service_Helmet.de: An advanced tactical helmet issued to United States 秘密 Service agents. Featuring reinforced composite construction, integrated communication systems, and ballistic face protection, this helmet provides comprehensive head protection while maintaining situational awareness. The sleek matte-black finish and professional appearance allow agents to remain imposing yet discreet during protective operations.
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_USA_T65_Power_Armor_Helmet.d: The helmet component of the legendary T-65 秘密 Service Power Armor. This masterwork of engineering incorporates the most advanced heads-up display systems, threat detection arrays, and life support equipment ever fielded by the United States. The multi-layered composite construction provides superior protection against all known threats while maintaining perfect environmental sealing and combat awareness.
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_USA_Winterized_Army_Combat_H: The winterized variant of the US Army Combat Helmet, issued in 2077 for operations in extreme c老旧 environments. Enhanced with advanced thermal insulation, weatherproofing, and an integrated facial protection system, it maintains the robust protection and sophisticated features of the standard model while ensuring comfort and operational effectiveness in harsh winter conditions. The built-in thermal faceguard offers superior coverage against wind and frostbite, while integrated environmental seals and communication interfaces remain standard, making this helmet essential for c老旧-weather deployments.
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_USA_Winterized_Army_General_: A white variant of the US Army General Cap, issued for winter use. It retains the same distinguished appearance and authority as the standard cap, with no additional insulation or weatherproofing.
LanguageData.FCP_Item_USA_Food_Crate.description: A crate of food from the United States of America, standard issue.
LanguageData.FCP_Item_USA_Food_Crate.label: US Food Supply Crate
LanguageData.FCP_Item_USA_Standard_Armor_Crate.descri: A crate of armor from the United States Army, standard issue.
LanguageData.FCP_Item_USA_Standard_Armor_Crate.label: US Army Armor Supply Crate
LanguageData.FCP_Item_USA_Standard_Uniform_Crate.desc: A crate of uniforms from the United States Army, standard issue.
LanguageData.FCP_Item_USA_Standard_Weapon_Crate.descr: A crate of weapons from the United States of America, standard issue.
LanguageData.FCP_Item_USA_Standard_Weapon_Crate.label: US Weapon Supply Crate
A crate of armor from the United States Marine Corps, standard issue.
LanguageData.FCP_Item_USA_Uniform_Marine_Crate.descri: A crate of uniforms from the United States Marine Corps, standard issue.
LanguageData.FCP_Item_USA_Uniform_Marine_Crate.label: US Marine Uniform Supply Crate
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Alloy_Steel_10mm_Pistol.descript: Constructed from hardened alloy steel and precision-machined components, this 10mm pistol combines reliability and enhanced stopping power with improved durability and armor penetration compared to field-grade sidearms. Favored by security forces.
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Alloy_Steel_10mm_Pistol.label: Alloy Steel 10mm Pistol
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_USA_Alloy_Steel_Assault_Rifle.de: Built from hardened alloy steel and precision-machined components, this assault rifle delivers consistent, high-velocity fire under harsh conditions. Balanced ergonomics and a tuned gas system keep recoil manageable, making rapid follow-up shots practical even in heavy combat. Favored by hardened units for its durability and ability to punch through field-grade armor.
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_Army_Uniform.description: A pre-war United States Army dress uniform in olive drab. The uniform consists of a military jacket with brass buttons and insignia, matching trousers, and a service cap. Despite its age, this formal military attire maintains its crisp appearance and represents the 老旧 world's military tradition.
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_Army_Uniform.label: Pre-War Army Uniform
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_Athletic_Outfit.description: A tattered and stitched baseball uniform with boots and knee pads, as they were common before the war. On its belt are pouches for storage. It�s not exactly a real armor and provides only a little protection but better than nothing.
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_Athletic_Outfit.label: Athletic Outfit
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_Benny_Pre_War_Fancy_Suit_Cle: Benny's suit is a black and white buffalo plaid suit jacket worn with light grey dress pants, white dress shirt, and black tie.
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_Brahmin_Skin_Outfit.descript: A basic outfit consisting of a (more or less) white shirt and patched overalls with Y-shaped suspenders complete with boots. The overalls are made of brahmin skin and are a common sight on ranches, farmsteads, and other areas where brahmins are held as livestock. Pretty basic clothing, cheap and widely available, but not very protective.
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_Brahmin_Skin_Outfit.label: Brahmin Skin Outfit
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_Bright_Brotherhood_Robe.desc: These are robes worn by Bright Follower ghouls. They are slightly tattered and have a brownish-green color.
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_Business_Pre_War.description: A light beige suit with a blue tie.
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_Business_Pre_War.label: Business Pre War
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_Caravaneer_Outfit.descriptio: Rugged and sturdy clothing, often worn by caravaneers and other travellers. It does not provide a whole lot of protection but does not weigh down its wearer and is relatively common.
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_Caravaneer_Outfit.label: Caravaneer Outfit
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_Chained_Prostitute_Outfit.de: It appears as bondage harness on the chest with multiple leather bracelets and armbands. The bottom consists of a pair of low-rise, black leather pants.
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_Combat_Armor.description: A short-sleeved armor with pauldrons and chest plates covering the torso.
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_Combat_Armor.label: Combat Armor
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_Combat_Armor_Heavy.descripti: The combat armor was the standard-issue armor of the US army before the war. It is composed of armor plates made from defensive polymer attached to pieces of ballistic fibre. It offers more protection than metal armor, while being somewhat lighter. It is rare and expensive since few groups have the knowledge, and resources, to produce more and many suits are scavenged from pre-war military caches. Exotic and powerful, heavy combat armor offers superior protection against all kinds of damage. Obviously, it is very heavy, but only power armor guards its wearer better against the perils of the wasteland.
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_Combat_Armor_Heavy.label: Combat Armor Heavy
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_Combat_Armor_Light.descripti: The combat armor was the standard-issue armor of the US army before the war. It is composed of armor plates made from defensive polymer attached to pieces of ballistic fibre. It offers more protection than metal armor, while being somewhat lighter. It is rare and expensive since few groups have the knowledge, and resources, to produce more and many suits are scavenged from pre-war military caches. While still rare, the light combat armor is the most available variant. It offers quite good protection while being lightweight.
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_Combat_Armor_Light.label: Combat Armor Light
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_Combat_Armor_Sturdy.descript: The combat armor was the standard-issue armor of the US army before the war. It is composed of armor plates made from defensive polymer attached to pieces of ballistic fibre. It offers more protection than metal armor, while being somewhat lighter. It is rare and expensive since few groups have the knowledge, and resources, to produce more and many suits are scavenged from pre-war military caches. Medium combat armor provides great protection, albeit it is quite heavy. It�s best suited for warriors in the midst of battle.
