LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_Combat_Armor_Sturdy.label: Combat Armor Sturdy
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_Exposed_Prostitute_Outfit.de: This outfit consists of black cowboy boots, black ripped tights worn under gray boxers, chains covering the wearer's chest which are connected to a spiked choker necklace, and a wrestling singlet.
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_Fancy_Gambler_Dress.descript: A worn brown dress with slingback high-heels.
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_Fancy_Gambler_Dress.label: Fancy Gambler Dress
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_Fancy_Gambler_Suit.descripti: A tan blazer with brown lapels and slacks, complete with a dark brown bow tie.
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_Fancy_Gambler_Suit.label: Fancy Gambler Suit
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_Field_Hand_Female_Outfit.des: Sturdy work clothes often worn by those settlers who make a living toiling in the fields. Lightweight and easy to make, this outfit is made to withstand the elements, not bullets (or claws and teeth).
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_Field_Hand_Male_Outfit.descr: Sturdy work clothes often worn by those settlers who make a living toiling in the fields. Lightweight and easy to make, this outfit is made to withstand the elements, not bullets (or claws and teeth).
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_Field_Hand_Male_Outfit.label: Field Hand Male Outfit
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_Gas_Ranger.description: Outfit invented by Rick, i don't know how to describe it, i'll ask him maybe
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_Gas_Ranger.label: Gas Ranger Outfit
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_Grognak_Female.description: A loincloth with a leather made bra.
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_Grognak_Female.label: Grognak Female
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_Grognak_Male.label: Grognak Male
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_Jason_Bright.description: Outfit worn by Jason Bright, it appears to resemble a weathered fancy gambler suit, without the tie.
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_Jason_Bright.label: Jason Bright Costume
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_Lab_Coat_Capital.description: A clean white lab coat with a blue undershirt and a brown tie. It provides a bonus to Intelligence while worn.
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_Lab_Coat_Capital.label: Lab Coat Capital
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_Lab_Coat_Commonwealth.descri: A lab coat with a dosimeter on the left breast and with a white undershirt and a black tie. It provides a bonus to Intelligence while worn
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_Lab_Coat_Commonwealth.label: Lab Coat Commonwealth
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_Lab_Coat_Followers.descripti: A lab coat worn by the followers of the apocalypse. It provides a bonus to science and medicine while worn.
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_Lab_Coat_Followers.label: Followers Lab Coat
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_Leather_Armor.description: Leather armor is a type of armor composed of various pieces of tanned animal hide stitched together. While providing less protection than metal armor, leather armor is lighter and easier to produce.
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_Leather_Armor.label: Leather Armor
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_Leather_Coat.description: An ankle length coat, made from leather. It has a belt which is made from the seat belt of an airplane or a car. It�s mostly seen worn by settlers and other civilians. However, it�s clothing, not armour and does not protect well against bullets.
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_Leather_Coat.label: Leather Coat
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_Manta_Man.description: An outfit stylized to resemble that of the Hubris Comics superhero Manta Man.
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_Manta_Man.label: Manta Man Costume
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_Merc_Adventurer_Outfit.descr: An outfit composed of a leather jacket with torn-off sleeves, a red sweater underneath a pair of brown pants and sturdy boots. It�s often worn by roving people and is designed to guarantee unimpaired freedom of movement, while still providing more protection than regular clothing.
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_Merc_Adventurer_Outfit.label: Merc Adventurer Outfit
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_Merc_Charmer_Dress.descripti: A gray-blue suit top with a matching mini-skirt and ripped black fishnet tights.
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_Merc_Charmer_Dress.label: Merc Charmer Dress
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_Merc_Charmer_Suit.descriptio: A faded teal suit jacket and pants with a gray shirt underneath, as well as a strange collar that protects the neck.
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_Merc_Charmer_Suit.label: Merc Charmer Suit
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_Merc_Cruiser_Outfit.descript: A long leather jacket with the sleeves removed with a white t-shirt underneath, as well as some black pants and dark boots. Like other merc outfits, it provides less protection than full-on armor, but more than regular clothing and doesn�t weigh down its wearer much.
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_Merc_Cruiser_Outfit.label: Merc Cruiser Outfit
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_Metal_Armor.description: Metal armor is composed of various metal plates attached to pieces of leather. While offering superior protection compared to leather armor, it is considerably heavier and more difficult to craft. Common materials include steel, iron, and scrap metal welded together.
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_Metal_Armor.label: Metal Armor
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_Military_Fatigues.descriptio: The military fatigues consist of a dirty set of pea-green fatigues with black boots.
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_Military_Fatigues.label: Military Fatigues
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_Mistress_Mystery.description: The outfit worn by the Mistress of Mystery, one of the longest-running and most popular superhero characters in the Hubris Comics universe.
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_Mistress_Mystery.label: Mistress of Mystery Costume
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_Naughty_Nightgown.descriptio: A set of leopard print pajamas.
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_Naughty_Nightgown.label: Naughty Nightgown
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_Naughty_Nightwear.descriptio: A set of leopard print pajamas.
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_Naughty_Nightwear.label: Naughty Nightwear
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_Prospector_Outfit.descriptio: This outfit consists of denim overalls, a brown satchel, and a long tan sleeve shirt underneath, as well as a pair of half boots. As its name implies, it�s most often worn by the prospectors rummaging through the 废墟s of the 老旧 world. As such it is designed to provide protection against dust storms and other hazards, not against bullets or beasts.
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_Prospector_Outfit.label: Prospector Outfit
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_Prostitute_Outfit_Female.des: This female outfit consists of a black leather crop-top with purple lacing down the sides of the sleeves and black leather lace-up short-shorts finished with a studded belt and spiked collar.
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_Prostitute_Outfit_Male.descr: This male outfit consists of a sheriff's vest complete with the badge, jean short-shorts and cowboy boots.
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_Prostitute_Outfit_Male.label: Prostitute Outfit Male
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_Radiation_Suit.description: A yellow full body suit complete with a helmet. While it does provide a modicum of protection against common dangers, such as bullets, its main use to shield its wearer against the invisible, and almost omnipresent, danger of radiation. It is quite rare and expensive as few groups in the wasteland possess the knowledge to create these suits.
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_Radiation_Suit.label: Radiations Suit
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_Red_Rocket_Overalls.descript: Overalls worn by the workers of the Red Rocket gas stations.
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_Red_Rocket_Overalls.label: Red Rocket Overalls
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_Reinforced_Combat_Armor.desc: A more advanced version of the standard combat armor.
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_Reinforced_Combat_Armor_II.d: An even more advanced version of the reinforced combat armor, offering more protection.
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_Rivet_City_Security_Armor.de: A suit of armor worn by the security forces of Rivet City.
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_Settler_Female_Outfit.descri: Basic settler clothing worn by women in wasteland communities. Practical and durable, designed for everyday work while providing minimal protection from the elements.
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_Settler_Female_Outfit.label: Settler Female Outfit
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_Settler_Male_Outfit.descript: Basic settler clothing worn by men in wasteland communities. Practical and durable, designed for everyday work while providing minimal protection from the elements.
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_Settler_Male_Outfit.label: Settler Male Outfit
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_Sheriff_Duster.description: An outfit consisting of a black undershirt and a pair of gray canvas pants underneath a long, brown leather overcoat with the sleeves rolled up above the elbow. It sports a sheriff badge on the right breast.
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_Sheriff_Duster.label: Sheriff Duster
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_Silver_Shroud.description: A recreation of the costume worn by the comic book character, the Silver Shroud.
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_Silver_Shroud.label: Silver Shroud Costume
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_Slave_Rags.description: Worn by slaves of the Legion, slave rags offer no protection from the elements and are composed of a torn dirty white tunic with a red "X" painted on the chest.
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_Slave_Rags.label: Slave Rags
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_Spring_Pre_War_Dress.descrip: A pink dress with red heels.
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_Spring_Pre_War_Dress.label: Spring Pre War Dress
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_Spring_Pre_War_Shirt.descrip: A red plaid shirt and brown pants.
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_Spring_Pre_War_Shirt.label: Spring Pre War Shirt
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_Surveyor_Outfit.description: A pocketed leather coat with brown cargo pants and dirty wingtip shoes, with a satchel and metal wire covering the right arm. This outfit is often worn by scouts who roam the vast wasteland to find suitable locations for new settlements. While this is certainly a highly 危险 task, these clothes provide little protection.
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_Surveyor_Outfit.label: Surveyor Outfit
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_The_Inspector.description: A costume version of the outfit worn by The Inspector, a Hubris Comics superhero and member of The Unstoppables!
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_The_Inspector.label: The Inspector Costume
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_Wasteland_Doctor_Outfit.desc: The wasteland doctor fatigues consist of a white t-shirt for males, usually bloodstained; a s商场 brown satchel bag, and brown cargo pants with pouches attached to the belt, and boots. Its most often seen worn by doctors, or any people with some medical training, as real doctors a rarity in the wastes. These are work clothes and provide little protection.
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_Wasteland_Wanderer_Outfit.de: It consists of a tan zipped-up hoodie and cargo pants tucked into riding boots. Due to its low cost and wide avail, it is very common to find, but provides little to no protection from any real danger.
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_Army_Helmet.description: Part of the army uniform, this helmet offers a little protection.
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_Army_Helmet.label: Army Helmet
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_Assault_Gas_Mask.description: An armored gasmask worn underneath a cloth hood. It provides decent protection against bullets and hazardous gases and similar substances and is most often worn by raiders.
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_Assault_Gas_Mask.label: Assault Gasmask
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_Combat_Armor_Helmet.descript: The combat armor helmet is the corresponding armor piece to the combat armor set. This model displays what is possibly a headlamp, attached to the left side above the brow line.
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_Combat_Armor_Helmet.label: Modular Combat Armor Helmet
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_Combat_Helmet.description: A matching helmet for the combat armor, it offers a bit of protection.
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_Combat_Helmet.label: Combat Helmet
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_Gas_Ranger_Gas_Mask.descript: A gas mask to go with the gas ranger outfit.
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_Gas_Ranger_Gas_Mask.label: Ranger Gas Mask
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_Gasmask_Goggles.description: A simple gas mask that covers the entire face, often seen worn by raiders. It is held on to the wearer by adjustable straps. It's not very protective against bullets and other physical attacks but provides medium protection against toxins and radiation.
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_Gasmask_Goggles.label: Gas Mask with Goggles
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_Radiations_Suit_Helmet.descr: A helmet designed to protect the wearer from radiation exposure. Part of the radiation suit set.
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_Radiations_Suit_Helmet.label: Radiation Suit Helmet
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_Reinforced_Combat_Armor_Helm: The helmet is a ballistic assembly, designed to protect the wearer from projectile, bladed weapons, and blunt trauma. An integrated polarized visor protects the user's eyes from the ordinary battlefield hazards of grit and dust.

The helmet is a ballistic assembly, designed to protect the wearer from projectile, bladed weapons, and blunt trauma. An integrated polarized visor protects the user's eyes from the ordinary battlefield hazards of grit and dust. It is similar in appearance to the helmet used with the reinforced suit but is a different color.
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_Rivet_City_Security_Helmet.d: A helmet worn by the security forces of Rivet City.
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_Sheriff_Hat.description: Part of the sheriff duster outfit. it gives a little buff to perception.
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_Sheriff_Hat.label: Sheriff Hat
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_Slave_Bandana.description: A bandana tipically worn by slaves.
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_Slave_Bandana.label: Slave Bandana
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_Slave_Rag_Hood.description: A scarf used to create a hood, tipically worn by slaves.
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_Slave_Rag_Hood.label: Slave Rag Hood
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_Slave_Scarf_Hat.description: A scarf used to create a hat, tipically worn by slaves.
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_Slave_Scarf_Hat.label: Slave Scarf Hat
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_Wrapped_Cap.description: A simple cap made of wrapped cloth, commonly worn by wastelanders for sun protection. Lightweight and provides basic protection from the elements.
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_Wrapped_Cap.label: Wrapped Cap
LanguageData.FCP_Food_Black_Blood_Sausage.description: A dark, rich sausage made from the blood and meat of various wasteland creatures. While nutritious and filling, the questionable ingredients and preparation methods can lead to minor toxic buildup. A favorite among raiders and desperate survivors.
LanguageData.FCP_Food_Black_Blood_Sausage.label: black blood sausage
LanguageData.FCP_Food_Brahmin_Pot_Pie.description: A hearty pot pie filled with tender brahmin meat, tatos, and razorgrain. This comfort food from the wasteland provides a satisfying meal that reminds settlers of better times. The rich brahmin meat provides a temporary boost to work speed.
LanguageData.FCP_Food_Brahmin_Pot_Pie.label: brahmin pot pie
LanguageData.FCP_Food_Bug_Mush.description: A paste made from various insects ground into a protein-rich but unappetizing mush. It's filling and surprisingly nutritious, though the taste leaves much to be desired. The questionable hygiene can cause minor toxic buildup.
LanguageData.FCP_Food_Bug_Mush.label: bug mush
LanguageData.FCP_Food_Chicken_Noodle_Cup.description: A simple but comforting cup of noodles with chunks of rad chicken meat. Quick to prepare and easy on the stomach, this meal reminds people of simpler times. The warm broth provides a s商场 mood boost.
LanguageData.FCP_Food_Chicken_Noodle_Cup.label: chicken noodle cup
LanguageData.FCP_Food_Cook_Cooks_Fiend_Stew.descripti: A spicy, aggressive stew made with whatever meat is available, heavily seasoned with jalapeños and wasteland spices. Named after the infamous Fiend cook, this meal gives a temporary boost to melee damage and pain tolerance, but the toxic ingredients cause buildup.
LanguageData.FCP_Food_Cook_Cooks_Fiend_Stew.label: cook-cook's fiend stew
LanguageData.FCP_Food_Crispy_Wings.description: Deep-fried rad chicken wings with a crispy g老旧en coating. A popular snack in wasteland settlements, these wings are fried in vegetable oil until perfectly crispy. The indulgent meal provides a mood boost.
LanguageData.FCP_Food_Crispy_Wings.label: crispy wings
LanguageData.FCP_Food_Deathclaw_Steak_And_Eggs.descri: A premium meal of grilled deathclaw steak served with fresh eggs. Deathclaw meat is incredibly rare and prized for its flavor and nutritional value. This meal provides significant stat boosts including increased movement speed and melee damage for a time.
LanguageData.FCP_Food_Deathclaw_Steak_And_Eggs.label: deathclaw steak and eggs
Tender deathclaw steak served alongside razorgrain. The combination of premium meat and hearty grain creates a satisfying and nutritious meal that boosts work efficiency and provides stamina.
LanguageData.FCP_Food_Flea_Soup.description: A thin broth made from s商场 wasteland creatures and scraps. While barely palatable and nearly flavorless, it prevents starvation. The questionable ingredients can cause minor toxic buildup.
LanguageData.FCP_Food_Flea_Soup.label: flea soup
LanguageData.FCP_Food_Happy_Birthday_Sweet_Roll.descr: A special sweet roll decorated for celebrations. While birthdays are rare events worth celebrating in the harsh wasteland, this pastry brings joy and nostalgia for better times. The festive treat provides a significant mood boost.
LanguageData.FCP_Food_Happy_Birthday_Sweet_Roll.label: happy birthday sweet roll
LanguageData.FCP_Food_Meat_On_A_Stick.description: Simple grilled meat skewered on a stick. Quick to prepare and easy to eat on the go, this basic meal is a staple of wasteland traders and travelers.
LanguageData.FCP_Food_Meat_On_A_Stick.label: meat on a stick
LanguageData.FCP_Food_Noodle_Cup.description: A basic cup of noodles made from razorgrain flour. While bland and unremarkable, it's cheap, filling, and quick to prepare. A wasteland staple.
LanguageData.FCP_Food_Noodle_Cup.label: noodle cup
LanguageData.FCP_Food_Prime_Meat_Steak.description: A well-prepared steak from prime wasteland beast meat. Properly cooked and seasoned, this meal is a treat in the harsh wasteland. The high-quality protein provides a temporary boost to consciousness and blood pumping.
LanguageData.FCP_Food_Prime_Meat_Steak.label: prime meat steak
LanguageData.FCP_Food_Prime_Meat_Steak_With_Corn_And_: A lavish meal featuring premium steak served with grilled maize and roasted tatos. This well-balanced meal combines the best ingredients the wasteland has to offer. Provides significant stat boosts and mood improvement.
prime meat steak with corn and tatos
LanguageData.FCP_Food_Sausages.description: Simple grilled sausages made from ground wasteland meat and spices. A straightforward, filling meal that's easy to prepare and transport. Popular among caravans.
LanguageData.FCP_Food_Sausages.label: sausages
LanguageData.FCP_Food_Skeeto_Spit.description: Grilled skeeto meat with a distinctive texture. These giant mosquito-like creatures are common in the wasteland, and while their meat is technically edible, the taste is questionable at best. The toxic nature of skeetos means this meal carries some risk.
LanguageData.FCP_Food_Skeeto_Spit.label: skeeto spit
LanguageData.FCP_Food_Sweet_Rolls.description: Soft, sweet pastries glazed with sugar. These treats are a favorite across the wasteland, bringing comfort and joy to those lucky enough to have them. The sweet taste provides a mood boost.
LanguageData.FCP_Food_Sweet_Rolls.label: sweet rolls
